name: Josh Harder
subject: My reflections on the election
body:
What went wrong

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97410279/513320271/-171021866?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhiYmEyOGEtOWJhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O6c76z9Ua12X9OBGdZXPNRJhuTCP9MjIM3JpB0XMeII=) | Peter, It’s been a few weeks since Election night, and to be honest, it’s just now setting in what the next four years look like. I wanted to send you some thoughts, so apologies ahead of time for the longer email. We have a lot of work to do to get ready to defend our freedoms. We also have a lot of work to do to prove to voters the Democratic Party deserves their vote. This year my district swung 14 points towards Donald Trump. That means tens of thousands of people in my community voted for Joe Biden in 2020 and voted for Trump in 2024. In fact, **Donald Trump won my district for the first time ever.** That means our campaign has a unique view into who these voters are and what they care about. It also means we have a tough battle ahead to hold this seat blue. One of the biggest stories of this election was that **Latino voters shifted away from Democrats.** You heard me previewing this shift all last year, and it’s why we invested so early in our Latino organizing program. (Thank you for your early support!) It is a core reason we were able to win this district even as Trump won too. I believe Democrats need to learn from our approach: reaching out early, meeting voters where they are, and then actually listening to their concerns. It’s also important that outreach is done in-language. We also learned **it’s not enough to push back against Trump; we have to share a positive vision of what Democrats stand for.** I often say I’m not anti-Trump, I’m pro-healthcare. I truly believe Democrats have the best policies for our families, but our message gets drowned out. The work to rebuild our coalition and remind voters where we stand starts _now_ — we can’t wait until 2026. So I’m asking you to join me in the fight to save the Democratic Party. We’re going to have a very tough race in the future, but I know we can come back stronger and more determined to win in 2026 and beyond. **[If you can, please send in a donation today so we can get started doing this important work. It’s never too early to prepare for the fight ahead of us!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97410280/513320295/-1280984495?refcode=E11590-20241120-Retrospective-SL-2024Race&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhiYmEyOGEtOWJhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O6c76z9Ua12X9OBGdZXPNRJhuTCP9MjIM3JpB0XMeII=)** \- Josh
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. [**Josh doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money, so please chip in now to our campaign!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97410281/513320297/-1463099547?refcode=E11590-20241120-Retrospective-footer-2024Race&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhiYmEyOGEtOWJhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O6c76z9Ua12X9OBGdZXPNRJhuTCP9MjIM3JpB0XMeII=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97410282/513320299/-1463099547?refcode=E11590-20241120-Retrospective-footer-2024Race&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhiYmEyOGEtOWJhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O6c76z9Ua12X9OBGdZXPNRJhuTCP9MjIM3JpB0XMeII=) If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. [Click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97410283/513320301/-1814317133?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDhiYmEyOGEtOWJhNy1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=O6c76z9Ua12X9OBGdZXPNRJhuTCP9MjIM3JpB0XMeII=&emci=1f4e83f8-bfa6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=48bba28a-9ba7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=6455652) to sign up for only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7te8sxLvVUSDWs_e-jVleA2?unsubscribedata=x7NuJLXv7RRRmVOE4kd19cmbVozKpRdCj5DdDA6oZyb7TJArd11pR4jCeo3NngQi658jD3qpu249xHZD1%2FYTRLrUiVRh7Q1MNRRLAslZdu%2FFTiGc8cpRyyAlV3Wu4%2FaW%2FZVWvKfQIz%2F6eR392xiaccT3%2BRzbaeBWKy799i2sYoDX85xaCYdWVrqVbVviDCfihjsNNMz%2BXv33b%2Bp5Df1Jww6OUoQDsh59fJp%2BQjn6Vq0dpQ%2BGgXntfgw94tm7YXQMI%2FBdd7pjGi%2Fi5dNN1YnpsKWTHBytfmbri6%2BcF%2FB2Qc8S6mzOwW%2FQeFxpoFr2QaddOKew7qVHhs5LXdLvuJk%2BOPjO4KgrPhqcua%2FeOP%2Fxde%2FMnrUx70emISXM0DC4LcWrl3aRykjTEEyWMTgZucn%2B3ACUptJJ0LvhjDU%2F2myNgrY9QihifyhYr%2Bdw47JI20JM). clean_body: What went wrong | = | Peter, It’s been a few weeks since Election night, and to be honest, it’s just now setting in what the next four years look like. I wanted to send you some thoughts, so apologies ahead of time for the longer email. We have a lot of work to do to get ready to defend our freedoms. We also have a lot of work to do to prove to voters the Democratic Party deserves their vote. This year my district swung 14 points towards Donald Trump. That means tens of thousands of people in my community voted for Joe Biden in 2020 and voted for Trump in 2024. In fact, Donald Trump won my district for the first time ever. That means our campaign has a unique view into who these voters are and what they care about. It also means we have a tough battle ahead to hold this seat blue. One of the biggest stories of this election was that Latino voters shifted away from Democrats. You heard me previewing this shift all last year, and it’s why we invested so early in our Latino organizing program. (Thank you for your early support!) It is a core reason we were able to win this district even as Trump won too. I believe Democrats need to learn from our approach: reaching out early, meeting voters where they are, and then actually listening to their concerns. It’s also important that outreach is done in-language. We also learned it’s not enough to push back against Trump; we have to share a positive vision of what Democrats stand for. I often say I’m not anti-Trump, I’m pro-healthcare. I truly believe Democrats have the best policies for our families, but our message gets drowned out. The work to rebuild our coalition and remind voters where we stand starts now — we can’t wait until 2026. So I’m asking you to join me in the fight to save the Democratic Party. We’re going to have a very tough race in the future, but I know we can come back stronger and more determined to win in 2026 and beyond. = \- Josh *

name: Truth to Power
subject: Help breastfeeding mothers and update TSA standards
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39313%2E3422442%2EtWzQXX)
Derek,_actions speak louder than words._
When serious problems for families come to light, Katie listens, learns, and acts quickly to take _your experiences_ and translate them into action.
Katie’s constituent Emily Calandrelli had a harrowing experience bringing breast milk through LAX, so she shared her story of mistreatment by TSA to illuminate a huge issue for traveling parents.
Katie dug in and learned how many parents have had their equipment or milk confiscated and contaminated. Many parents have been interrogated by agents who received no proper training on TSA’s _**own policies**_ on protecting breastfeeding moms and minimizing potential risks for kids.
After researching how prevalent and unfair this issue is for traveling parents, Katie and her team began drafting the **Bottles and Breastfeeding Equipment Screening (BABES) Enhancement Act** to update the current law, working with Emily herself!
As of this fall, the BABES Enhancement Act has passed the House Homeland Security Committee and Senate.**It just needs to pass the full House before it can be signed into law.**
**[Right now, Katie needs your help to get the BABES Enhancement Act signed into law by President Biden. Please sign on to show your support for this important bill today!](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-em-20241220/?source=em20241120-39313&akid=39313%2E3422442%2EtWzQXX)**
[Add Your Name](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-em-20241220/?source=em20241120-39313&akid=39313%2E3422442%2EtWzQXX)
As a single working mom, Katie knows that families rely on government to do its job to address their challenges.
As an elected official, Katie has worked to _bring families’ problems_ to light and _solve them._
Thank you for your help,
Truth to Power

**Katie Porter started Truth to Power to support Democrats who reject corporate PAC money** and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20241120-39313&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39313_3422442_tWzQXX&akid=39313%2E3422442%2EtWzQXX)**
---
Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39313%2E3422442%2EtWzQXX).

To contribute via check, please address to: Truth to Power PAC, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true.| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=68f2574cefbf4a788284678466697655&_e=hJ8bp2x-cakoNcQQJU-e6ac4VRBrSRMFUtegYGOEFTbIkQrI8ywFFnCHidCEVcCITY7WvmrJYWyUASUNypSxwYIp7xedlnOeGSr5oXK969vZ13jnjz8WrXlGdN2rWmqfie8f6qB4GXUflE-ItHVv2qWUyfLOCCB3ZmAXEsJuc271V5u5tiDI1eAM5LHmHqjS1Qs_FVFlgfnUeJOfFTSDxkrexrLv3VIJESNw_AFt8vYlvulxpgr5Qle_Gqi8rZVeCv2Fq3dUOvHbBGtkq9oAq3fvMG1ct7sisK7kDMU0nweIfzbiL7ADGbtf9Ziz__XxNKkCp07dJ5eldhF0q2cbve4QlSUH3_YZCP81m0xG40HZYQXHyJrKEVzBM3rfDtPDPPQCkirf4HJsdWV28h1MFA%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=68f2574cefbf4a788284678466697655&_e=hJ8bp2x-cakoNcQQJU-e6ac4VRBrSRMFUtegYGOEFTbIkQrI8ywFFnCHidCEVcCITY7WvmrJYWyUASUNypSxwYIp7xedlnOeGSr5oXK969vZ13jnjz8WrXlGdN2rWmqfie8f6qB4GXUflE-ItHVv2qWUyfLOCCB3ZmAXEsJuc271V5u5tiDI1eAM5LHmHqjS1Qs_FVFlgfnUeJOfFTSDxkrexrLv3VIJESNw_AFt8vYlvulxpgr5Qle_Gqi8rZVei4RjPdC6OyW0Hzp1O9gbxZvG5gIbofpKxQiSCE8hON40BK9lDnN7a98biIYdmApyo8ZUPuoqo0dtK-5_Oi03dTl-hKHoQ4wpu2edH3x77twl5cKA0SXBpezfP0b218U_l_nx9Cmb_rURNfC7csV8lw%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=68f2574cefbf4a788284678466697655&_e=hJ8bp2x-cakoNcQQJU-e6ac4VRBrSRMFUtegYGOEFTbIkQrI8ywFFnCHidCEVcCITY7WvmrJYWyUASUNypSxwYIp7xedlnOeGSr5oXK969vZ13jnjz8WrXlGdN2rWmqfie8f6qB4GXUflE-ItHVv2qWUyfLOCCB3ZmAXEsJuc271V5u5tiDI1eAM5LHmHqjS1Qs_FVFlgfnUeJOfFTSDxkrexrLv3VIJESNw_AFt8vYlvulxpgr5Qle_Gqi8rZVeHiDD0jG834iuyVaEYjCDcrESzlrF3DA-wsu1BiMpBEKLg2xpflB3heOww8UFmtPmuPfgFdDPoW_MWBT1Y1axavlaH7Y_byc-YdBDFi6YWlLc2WstpM_z1wfZ5katXOiEDpTLS9nEKOsaqYLUqKJnPA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true.| | | | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making... ...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda. I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited Ramparts – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: The real mastermind is Barack Obama. Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. That’s why I wrote The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party... ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ The Enemy Within is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote The Enemy Within because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.orgP.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | |

body:

This will only take a minute

I'm inviting you to join an exclusive group of patriots who will shape the future of our nation. As someone I trust and respect, I'm asking you to participate in the House Republicans America First Agenda Audit. _**Your input will be instrumental in crafting a winning strategy for 2025.**_

The first $41,300/$15,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to the DNC. The next $3,300/$5,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to Harris for President’s Recount Account. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting **info@kamalaharris.com**.The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
clean_body: | | | Peter, you probably didn’t think you were going to end your day by giving a donation to support the Harris Fight Fund program. But that’s what we’re asking you to do. Right now, there are races that are either too close to call, or within the margin of recounts or certain legal challenges. They all need our help to get across the finish line. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for chipping in, Team Harris-Walz | | | |

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Your 2025 Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
I’m reaching out to you today because I’d like to send you your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=49e040500e274bb09b1a35cec5b98829&_t=jWMm3gSxFxeGpBuk8eJywShilV7wtsKYHoRylM8oi7uCWBQZ_bQNVKY6H6dOwNWi8godjS5pUPXfb0PEYWJTKtwo2baRpsRp4rlU4hFjGDn1kHjd8HXwiKxNXrM-mIzL)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=49e040500e274bb09b1a35cec5b98829&_e=12j0tsPxscLTRwetbcVbbxaP5Y4-PyQBgm_6LuNx18jmwnS3CDjTBgW0FwJ_nkNHG-9g_NVdKcrbvNfeqYfDO8CMhauJAg9-AH0k7liratOR1IXWRQnlJ30WXT9iAITYKCW8f1GloDwpGkdQmAqM-RtnVaMGeLPf0Gwqrun4OkD1Yj1L18oRksDHp1ROOjSVAqpMINHR4eSX_dBMqTiAwcpTg4_YOCLXEdDMzrZUj9GHUMxRekWmSx4lL2PDSUMZh7tCSKrM73Ptu05X4-HFcEj9OAqv1AYVqd_OL8GhUkqGvPhLnu7IwS2Sls_epsdCf_Ny00IJGDZEk_zcAKwQRtTvefjUeKxWYD0w4t2sk2H5lfpmELcEK-kRArqK70F1p_ldd0t84Ckpi-fearwGjQ%3D%3D)
| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to get the 2025 calendar.

**Claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar before November 30 by clicking on this secure link:**

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=49e040500e274bb09b1a35cec5b98829&_e=12j0tsPxscLTRwetbcVbbxaP5Y4-PyQBgm_6LuNx18jmwnS3CDjTBgW0FwJ_nkNHG-9g_NVdKcrbvNfeqYfDO8CMhauJAg9-AH0k7liratOR1IXWRQnlJ30WXT9iAITYKCW8f1GloDwpGkdQmAqM-RtnVaMGeLPf0Gwqrun4OkD1Yj1L18oRksDHp1ROOjSVAqpMINHR4eSX_dBMqTiAwcpTg4_YOCLXEdDMzrZUj9FyAu0BcHAYD8XmVUNDxk3oZuWix_na-nMn8CV5rhOIHMC8_dzDUJLC_lJYYBeatTQ5bLgsn9TD2SLb1W7xZEPPnWcIt7YF4UGFbxmOPVzfrvEBV6BAPk2_UOCHlfBvOnxT2LX_lxyY3NBuYWRZg1oJylytDDbYInRTbRAqDHap0A%3D%3D)

As you know, we live in an era of increasing bureaucratic despotism. You've seen it, and you understand. More and more, we are ruled by an administrative state that operates without the say of our elected representatives.

It is, therefore, completely **unaccountable** to "we the people."

This collapse of the separation of powers has spread far beyond the federal level into our states, our cities, and maybe even where you live!

One particularly disturbing example is in our K-12 schools...

At these schools, swarms of administrators impose dangerous ideologies and actively undermine parents.

In higher education--especially at taxpayer-funded state universities--bloated administrations push ideologies that teach young Americans to disrespect or even hate their country.

But thanks to our supporters, we remain free of this corrupting influence. We stay true to our mission...

...to provide "sound learning" that preserves "the blessings of civil and religious liberty."

Indeed, as the crisis in our nation has deepened in recent years, we have redoubled our efforts to extend this mission nationwide. But we've only been able to do so thanks to supporters like you.

**Just in the last year, our dedicated supporters have helped to ...**
* **Teach 4 million Americans in Hillsdale 's _free_ online courses**, including "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism," and our newest course, "Marxism, Socialism, and Communism."

* **Distribute hundreds of thousands of free copies of the Constitution** to citizens nationwide--especially younger Americans, especially thousands of K-12 students.

* **Provide an American classical education** to young students nationwide through K-12 education programs, returning excellence and proper civics instruction to K-12 classrooms.

* **Expand the circulation of _Imprimis_** , Hillsdale's monthly digest of liberty, to more than 6.7 million households and businesses.

I hope you'll claim your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar** so that when you use it next year, you'll remember how you can advance the important work of defending liberty through education.

Remember, your support is especially crucial because we refuse every penny of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT!

Your generosity, and that of tens of thousands of people like you, reaches and teaches millions of Americans nationwide. You'll help enroll millions more Americans in free online courses, expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , and restore excellence to K-12 education.

**Please show your support today by making your best tax-deductible gift of $50, $75, or $150 --or the best gift you can--by clicking the secure link below:**

body:
Sorry to reach out like this...

| |

| | | Peter, Election Day may be in the books, _but my race isn 't done yet._

_**[I'm neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=019a916b0c054a8798754ee9ac108a8a&_e=OPcgZ6EqDQXGz_gPhL0gCE1BTBtOgmG7CL-mDSDYsKhe5T9IA5AFofxQbRbuATSd-1Pu1Lngxpz9mUS_Jo8Uag5HPVEvdk33YcOv7TTRc6Unf6pAD_uPP0fLb-X4UVHyqlxSXoo2vp893Wie5xxQkPpjDe0qSkY9mPEHu8vQvBVZknMBqAa67kyaKx9RUXSYiUU9Rk5iK17ASE9mJUhrPVk_Iaim1Bi8soMtiJjxkF7Sz-Z7i0UNPh7RlNoePZUQIcloDlxg0H2lG1p0gExPPAaXS1iCl29w4pHB7T3U1cf0mOZTyrCU13q64_v202wHinXx7I3Lbu7U2qvFjtPpIejdWdPrB5qDRZkta8IxhVvlMU8uHy6N-5ahCr07oMLUxI9o2KuJ_9C0rH0Ya2uf8l2FU27Ixbuvb2vgCpw3ly3Zm2RmZ3nbiCwdbG3iiME2T_e8a6m1FFPrKPO6h-gBzQ%3D%3D "I’m neck and neck with my radical opponent, and ballots are still being counted as I send you this message.")**_

If we're going to pull this out and keep my seat, then I'm going to need all hands on deck.

I spent every dime I had just to get through Election Day, and now I'm running on fumes. I NEED your urgent support to help me keep this fight going before the ballots are all counted.

_**[Please, can I count on you, Peter?](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=019a916b0c054a8798754ee9ac108a8a&_e=OPcgZ6EqDQXGz_gPhL0gCE1BTBtOgmG7CL-mDSDYsKhe5T9IA5AFofxQbRbuATSd-1Pu1Lngxpz9mUS_Jo8Uag5HPVEvdk33YcOv7TTRc6Unf6pAD_uPP0fLb-X4UVHyqlxSXoo2vp893Wie5xxQkPpjDe0qSkY9mPEHu8vQvBVZknMBqAa67kyaKx9RUXSYiUU9Rk5iK17ASE9mJUhrPVk_Iaim1Bi8soMtiJjxkF7Sz-Z7i0UNPh7RlNoePZUQIcloDlxg0H2lG1p0gExPPAaXS1iCl29w4pHB7T3U1ce_CgjeG5BoRz4zACSogfX0rmzewg0IDd5X7HisTM1-7oaeDqykdHWz8z8qZBRSx0xwzke4IQmU-ldAoSwGPOWrU0Orb5AM-CPnmcekYEniyEwaY-I4QO1uY3mKA7hdLNbVLRDW9obQPsfxwnbJ0tQkUUmSfQRCopiSbCH93vflDg%3D%3D "Please, can I count on you, Friend?")**_

Thank you,

Michelle Steel
_Sent from my iPhone_

subject: 7 ways Democrats made Donald Trump president
body:
Constitutional terrorism has sadly bipartisan origins

| |
---|---|---

---
# [7 ways Democrats made Donald Trump president](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=151908877&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxOTA4ODc3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzIxNTEyNzksImV4cCI6MTczNDc0MzI3OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3UhimhNPpHPLck4b_yyopEySdhZVKD9C0AV4FO0QBRs)
### Constitutional terrorism has sadly bipartisan origins
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Nov 21
---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=151908877&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxOTA4ODc3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczMjE1MTI3OSwiZXhwIjoxNzM0NzQzMjc5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Pq9cszOCCq3iNVOOcvGHxmq5rQlnDOlJTpAQHooWHGk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=151908877&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxOTA4ODc3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzIxNTEyNzksImV4cCI6MTczNDc0MzI3OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3UhimhNPpHPLck4b_yyopEySdhZVKD9C0AV4FO0QBRs&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=151908877&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxOTA4ODc3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzIxNTEyNzksImV4cCI6MTczNDc0MzI3OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3UhimhNPpHPLck4b_yyopEySdhZVKD9C0AV4FO0QBRs)
---
| | [](https://substack..Zwrnu1PE20Z0DAiXDiqXz3aSDrZTwDSzFbhEYf4f15A?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/7-ways-democrats-made-donald-trump?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Over the past two weeks, Democrats have relentlessly wrung their hands in public while trying to avoid accountability for Kamala Harris' [preventable loss](https://substack.com/redirect/91cedefd-1fc4-4faf-916c-3f297287d64d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to Donald Trump.
Meanwhile, journalists [continue to play into the ruse](https://substack.com/redirect/3de2e5ed-67b6-48c1-897b-e5160a8e63c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of partisan warfare, conveniently ignoring how Democrats repeatedly enabled Trump and effectively put him in the White House--twice.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform and educate your friends by sharing this post._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=151908877&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUxOTA4ODc3LCJpYXQiOjE3MzIxNTEyNzksImV4cCI6MTczNDc0MzI3OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.3UhimhNPpHPLck4b_yyopEySdhZVKD9C0AV4FO0QBRs)
### What was all that about, anyway?
Election observers often attempt to read tea leaves in order to discern whatever mandate might emerge from any given election. That effort is particularly difficult this year, because relentless [disinformation](https://substack.com/redirect/ab801afd-2bd0-4f9a-adcc-28e7dcdb42be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) supporting the GOP, and [theatrical rhetoric](https://substack.com/redirect/7bc1cb19-fbaf-4631-9d45-9c121d1d340d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from Democrats lacking any substance, left voters choosing between choices differentiated more by style than policy.
What did voters want? The question is vitally important to answer in order to enable course correction, but has invited an array of seemingly incompatible responses ranging from [economic fairness](https://substack.com/redirect/e5167d4d-171a-44d5-8dac-8d68146b1f07?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and accountability for [military industrial corruption](https://substack.com/redirect/6c370d72-0651-4646-8a1e-64c0b191fc09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), to [racism](https://substack.com/redirect/3aeb6f08-dbfe-4777-97b0-83a40d346244?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [misogyny](https://substack.com/redirect/db633b95-f9db-4d77-85a8-8a758ef4970f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
While each of these factors likely played a role for some voters, examining the ascent of Trump over time reveals a series of moments when Democrats crucially enabled him. Could Trump have ever become President if Democrats had not repeatedly cut off their noses to spite their proverbial faces?
### Voters have wanted to throw the bums out for 30 years
Setting aside the increasingly compelling case for supporting [candidates from minor parties](https://substack.com/redirect/34102d3a-4428-440c-adea-092b45a2b0c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and presuming elections to be contests between only the nominees from the corporate political parties, voters can offer only binary signals: they can embrace continuity, or they can instead force change.
Plenty of voices have observed the [failure](https://substack.com/redirect/7bc1cb19-fbaf-4631-9d45-9c121d1d340d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of Kamala Harris' presidential campaign to differentiate her candidacy from the Biden administration. Running on what amounted to a [continuity platform](https://substack.com/redirect/d830b40c-fd78-4b91-af7b-cfd725ef467d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), in the midst of mounting social crises including an ongoing genocide and economic collapse driving low-wage workers into preventable poverty, more or less determined the election's results. After all, in every presidential election since 1992, voters have sent perceived outsiders to the White House--probably because the 32 years since then have witnessed an unabated upward transfer of wealth leaving working families struggling to survive.
* In 1992, Bill Clinton beat former CIA Director and President George H. W. Bush. He won re-election in 1996 over career Senator Bob Dole (R-KS) largely because Clinton was presented by the press as an iconoclastic Governor of a conservative southern state willing to sacrifice critical defining goals of the Democratic Party. Clinton was a quintessential outsider, reversing the Democratic Party's previous commitments to labor while emphasizing his small town origins from Hope, AR.
* In 2000, George W. Bush defeated career Senator Al Gore (D-TN) while running on a campaign of "compassionate conservatism" informed by his history as the Governor of Texas, well outside the Beltway. He won re-election in 2004 over another career Senator, John Kerry (D-MA). Bush's working class and southern affect was cultivated specifically in order to depict him as an outsider to Washington despite having grown up in the White House as the son of a president and former CIA Director.
* In 2008, Barack Obama won the White House after serving a single term in the Senate, beating career Senator John McCain (R-AZ) on a platform emphasizing his opposition to the Iraq War that had united both corporate political parties in Washington. He won re-election in 2012 over Mitt Romney, an investment banker who served at the time as the Republican Governor of liberal Massachusetts. While Obama's antiwar stance propelled him to the White House in 2008, by 2012 he had revealed himself to be a creature of Washington but continued to command cultural appeal based largely on political theater and the support he enjoyed from Hollywood celebrities well outside the Beltway.
* In 2016, Donald Trump won the White House as a reality television star and real estate mogul promising to drain the proverbial swamp, while running against a figure who had spent decades in Washington as a Secretary of State, U.S. Senator, and First Lady. Democrats apparently learned nothing from their loss.
* While Joe Biden triumphed in 2020 as a career Senator promising a commitment to bipartisanship (suggesting continuity more than change), he did so while challenging the chaos and radicalism of the first Trump administration. Even as a career Senator forced out of multiple previous presidential primaries, he was ultimately greeted as an agent of change.
* Trump's forthcoming return to the White House was driven by several factors. Ultimately, voters rejecting the stasis, continuity, and vacuousness of a campaign promoting a Vice President and former U.S. Senator with a long history of siding with the establishment. In the same way that Biden was able to cast himself as an agent of change in 2020 despite a long career of complicity in Washington's corruption, Trump was able to do the same despite his history as a divisive former president. But how?

Let us count the ways....
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication supported by readers, rather than advertisers.**Subscriptions are free!** To support my work promoting the bipartisan accountability that professional journalists lack the independence to support, please consider becoming a paid subscriber. I hope to dedicate more time and focus to writing, and as a working class voice silenced by career Democrats, I need your support in order to do so._
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..zXKxSXPhJS2k1qigqqm9qDmihq2nf9EIOAz-_L5-wnw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=151908877)
### The complicity that Democrats can't admit
In over half a dozen ways stretching back decades, Democrats played key roles in putting Trump back in the White House next January.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/02090479-5463-461f-a8a6-bdcc18a302f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
1. **Democrats abandoned working class voters since the 1990s** : The long-standing complicity of Democrats in corporate corruption laid the foundation for the contemporary populist movement. Martin Luther King, Jr.'s visionary [Letter from a Birmingham Jail](https://substack.com/redirect/af43c6a0-4e30-4452-af09-e072ebaa3400?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) offered what amounts to a political prophecy noting the complicity of White moderates and their contemporary successors in impeding change for the sake of preserving their social positions. The dynamic that King decried in 1963 repeated itself _ad nauseum_ over the following decades, and especially in the 30 years since [Bill Clinton shifted the Democratic Party's priority](https://substack.com/redirect/c89c4da9-7de8-4ea5-9d9e-ba080883e5de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from supporting labor to supporting Wall Street, but was never more obvious than in 2016 and in 2024.

2. **Clinton promoted Trump to the press** : In 2016, the Hillary Clinton campaign promoted Trump to news outlets because strategists [foolishly thought](https://substack.com/redirect/d130327c-fca6-452a-812f-2c70863eecce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) he would be easier to beat in the general election than Jeb Bush, who was widely seen as the frontrunner heading into the GOP primaries. _[Politico](https://substack.com/redirect/d130327c-fca6-452a-812f-2c70863eecce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[publicly reported](https://substack.com/redirect/d130327c-fca6-452a-812f-2c70863eecce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on Clinton's tragic complicity in her own electoral defeat, yet few Democrats care to remember or admit it today. Without Clinton's self-defeating support, Trump may never have emerged from the 2016 Republican primary.
3. **Kneecapping Bernie in 2016 and again in 2020** : Bernie Sanders inspired a mass movement and gained unprecedented support from across the country, and the [entire political spectrum](https://substack.com/redirect/9405e3a4-0980-4dbb-b786-83f885c3192f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Despite having served in the Senate for decades, he ran as an outsider even more committed to tearing down the Washington establishment than any previous nominee over the past generation. He offered solutions to problem #1 above, but corporate Democrats, threatened by his promise to refashion the party in the image of FDR, [schemed to deny the 2020 nomination to their populist frontrunner](https://substack.com/redirect/013d7c5c-bb71-4ec5-898b-e08b6ef4bed8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Democrats prompted various centrist candidates to [drop out and consolidate their support](https://substack.com/redirect/5571b2e0-0e4b-49e9-a265-e2e91c833c98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) behind Biden, who had been [forced out of multiple presidential primaries](https://substack.com/redirect/b510f138-4a4d-4cb7-b065-99d2a6d46e33?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the past based on his unfortunate history of public lies and misrepresentations. These machinations to preserve corporate rule in the face of a historic challenge by a Democratic Socialist willing to meet the needs of struggling families paved the path for Donald Trump in both 2016 and again in 2024. As many of us said at the time, Democrats [preferred](https://substack.com/redirect/69ab705a-b26d-4022-96ad-2e08b5fa202d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to lose with a moderate dedicated to Wall Street than win with a Socialist dedicated to Main Street.
4. **Congressional Democrats funded Trump 's programs and enabled his first term agenda**: After Trump gained the White House in 2016, a Democratic majority in the House of Representatives [repeatedly funded](https://substack.com/redirect/6686c4c7-8a82-4873-9ad7-1b947c7ffc61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) his various programs, including his proposed border wall and devastating decision to [send federal shock troops into liberal cities](https://substack.com/redirect/53e10bb1-125d-42b0-83b0-067943490a3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in order to suppress protests demanding basic human rights. This particular pattern is especially frustrating to me, and prompted me to run for Congress starting in 2018, only to watch journalists ignore the public complicity of the Speaker of the House while instead [emphasizing](https://substack.com/redirect/c28cfb57-1693-4bba-a785-75aabc236b8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) her acts of political theater and [disinformation orchestrated by party loyalists](https://substack.com/redirect/f47d79f2-2781-415e-a98c-a9cf4ef35cfd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to insulate her corruption.
5. **Slow walking impeachment** : Many observers forget that Democrats refused to impeach Trump for most of his first administration. Nancy Pelosi [argued](https://substack.com/redirect/8daeaf2a-edbf-4f41-8ef6-d0348302df2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the Clinton impeachment offered a dysfunctional precedent and spent years [ignoring calls for impeachment](https://substack.com/redirect/f6517305-b9fb-4226-9730-71891738ef5c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), allowing Trump's mendacity to continue largely unopposed in Washington while she led Congress and ensured funding for his programs.
6. **Limiting impeachment to exclude Emoluments violations** : When Pelosi finally did show up for impeachment, she did so like a boxer throwing a fight. Both of the impeachment processes targeting Trump left the most compelling charges aside, reducing the grounds for impeachment to partisan offenses that never held any promise of swaying Republican votes in the Senate--unlike the [consistent public graft](https://substack.com/redirect/d3c17c2b-e705-4136-a07f-2f17d7d60f7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that could have mobilized conservative voters to press their Senators. Rep. Jamie Raskin (D-MD), who helped lead the impeachment effort, has publicly said that he "[regrets](https://substack.com/redirect/7babf5b6-3c91-4337-8aec-5828d5ae371c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) not pushing harder on impeachment over the Constitution's Foreign Emoluments Clause," which was blocked at the time by Pelosi, probably because Democrats are no less guilty than Republicans of [monetizing their offices to fill their filthy pockets](https://substack.com/redirect/cc58fe6c-bb88-4978-b8b0-af69a6e6f733?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
7. **Running Kamala on a continuity platform** : After Biden finally dropped out and Kamala Harris became the Democratic Party nominee, her campaign consciously and consistently chose to present her to the public as an agent not of change, but rather [continuity](https://substack.com/redirect/391ed8f1-85e1-4fbe-8518-e4bcf77b76bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). She embraced Biden's record, including [his support for the Israeli genocide in Gaza](https://substack.com/redirect/469ca132-a01a-4aff-9857-265eeed20a41?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). That doomed her efforts from the start, and left her [underperforming](https://substack.com/redirect/a9786847-69b7-447b-9e24-2e1234fb7ec4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) downballot candidates, as well as progressive ballot measures that passed in even conservative states like [Missouri](https://substack.com/redirect/0e86de21-0f66-4e15-a3ea-3462c70b140a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), where I grew up. The theme of change that has driven every election cycle since 1992 has been largely inexorable, but Democrats couldn't be bothered to observe it or act accordingly.

### Will clowns continue commanding the Democratic Party?
Voters have resoundingly rejected the Democratic Party in Washington, handing control of not only the White House, but also the House and Senate, to the GOP.
In a sane world, this might prompt accountability among the officials who have aligned the Party with Wall Street and the Pentagon since the 1990s. But neither today's Democrats nor [the journalists who enable them](https://substack.com/redirect/9c699469-7ba0-4a8f-a0b0-858decd1e81c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) wield the independence or insight to acknowledge the reality staring them in the face.
Given their recurring complicity with a figure they ironically decry, Democrats deserve neither credibility, nor public support to maintain their positions as the supposed opposition. Defecting from the trash fire of the corporate Democratic Party, and supporting alternative voices dedicated to working Americans and the future we all share, has never been more important than it is today.

Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform and educate your friends by sharing this post. What was all that about, anyway? Election observers often attempt to read tea leaves in order to discern whatever mandate might emerge from any given election. That effort is particularly difficult this year, because relentless supporting the GOP, and from Democrats lacking any substance, left voters choosing between choices differentiated more by style than policy. What did voters want? The question is vitally important to answer in order to enable course correction, but has invited an array of seemingly incompatible responses ranging from , and accountability for , to and . While each of these factors likely played a role for some voters, examining the ascent of Trump over time reveals a series of moments when Democrats crucially enabled him. Could Trump have ever become President if Democrats had not repeatedly cut off their noses to spite their proverbial faces? Voters have wanted to throw the bums out for 30 years Setting aside the increasingly compelling case for supporting , and presuming elections to be contests between only the nominees from the corporate political parties, voters can offer only binary signals: they can embrace continuity, or they can instead force change. Plenty of voices have observed the of Kamala Harris' presidential campaign to differentiate her candidacy from the Biden administration. Running on what amounted to a , in the midst of mounting social crises including an ongoing genocide and economic collapse driving low-wage workers into preventable poverty, more or less determined the election's results. After all, in every presidential election since 1992, voters have sent perceived outsiders to the White House--probably because the 32 years since then have witnessed an unabated upward transfer of wealth leaving working families struggling to survive. In 1992, Bill Clinton beat former CIA Director and President George H. W. Bush. He won re-election in 1996 over career Senator Bob Dole (R-KS) largely because Clinton was presented by the press as an iconoclastic Governor of a conservative southern state willing to sacrifice critical defining goals of the Democratic Party. Clinton was a quintessential outsider, reversing the Democratic Party's previous commitments to labor while emphasizing his small town origins from Hope, AR. In 2000, George W. Bush defeated career Senator Al Gore (D-TN) while running on a campaign of "compassionate conservatism" informed by his history as the Governor of Texas, well outside the Beltway. He won re-election in 2004 over another career Senator, John Kerry (D-MA). Bush's working class and southern affect was cultivated specifically in order to depict him as an outsider to Washington despite having grown up in the White House as the son of a president and former CIA Director. In 2008, Barack Obama won the White House after serving a single term in the Senate, beating career Senator John McCain (R-AZ) on a platform emphasizing his opposition to the Iraq War that had united both corporate political parties in Washington. He won re-election in 2012 over Mitt Romney, an investment banker who served at the time as the Republican Governor of liberal Massachusetts. While Obama's antiwar stance propelled him to the White House in 2008, by 2012 he had revealed himself to be a creature of Washington but continued to command cultural appeal based largely on political theater and the support he enjoyed from Hollywood celebrities well outside the Beltway. In 2016, Donald Trump won the White House as a reality television star and real estate mogul promising to drain the proverbial swamp, while running against a figure who had spent decades in Washington as a Secretary of State, U.S. Senator, and First Lady. Democrats apparently learned nothing from their loss. While Joe Biden triumphed in 2020 as a career Senator promising a commitment to bipartisanship (suggesting continuity more than change), he did so while challenging the chaos and radicalism of the first Trump administration. Even as a career Senator forced out of multiple previous presidential primaries, he was ultimately greeted as an agent of change. body:
Complete your Transition of Power survey today to let our GOP leaders know what you prioritize MOST to get done with Republicans in power. | This won’t be a long email, Peter.

**_First_ - thank you for all your help with the campaign to take back the Senate. Without your help, we couldn’t have built this strong Republican majority.**

_Now, we need to ask for your help again, but we’re not asking for money today._

We need your help to let our GOP leaders know what issues matter MOST to the Republican voters who elected them to this new majority.

[**We’re counting on you to complete your official Transition of Power survey today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=59e1dfc9fc5347d780ec95de2ab69411&_e=x5DEmvOBk0vYKMQrBac4O2hCt79RxUNNqwWAB5oK8gP1UdpcQ-eXDzgLXBR6VpeTMtUaphoKS1GeXLJqD5DAtCTn7C3_L5MBTGD8LkoU_BqXnizq66ke6mROO6CTIg4ygHIS0LcCmvuLwuaUZhhNop-pJqiDwAl0avQUaTuZ0K7_NpndjSPUDGAxTGSjvvrhpu7yh_BNC2viRREvzn_XOsxx3kJdqtMek150kBOCmG_c7WgeAgeP3EJ1u6q2ruM3G25GSRaIwsGFMIwyZswqJkpvAC9N1Unu6PY1JuLi68NSrcadseoHLr2OxJl6-K70HBR6QMK63PwZd5WVHG_wPvP4H76IHH9OqPRWoVYht6TWvVsxufsRPdk3nyjOuK2XVcj6ZvDrGJDBU4Nbs7JnN13m3frL6GQYwQM9O8Vr3b5MFEEoWXLDePt6UYakvUZ_KJF16CWquULF4BQnmeA1ZA%3D%3D) _The survey has 14 questions that address the heart of our country's challenges and opportunities._

Thank you,
Senate Republicans

_P.S. We hope to collect at least 5,000 of these SURVEY DOCUMENTS by**midnight tonight** to provide us with a representative sample of GOP voters to report to our GOP Majority what their FIRST PRIORITIES should be._ [**Please complete your Transition of Power survey today to help inform our leaders about their legislative battles with the far-left Democrats. >>>**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=59e1dfc9fc5347d780ec95de2ab69411&_e=x5DEmvOBk0vYKMQrBac4O2hCt79RxUNNqwWAB5oK8gP1UdpcQ-eXDzgLXBR6VpeTMtUaphoKS1GeXLJqD5DAtCTn7C3_L5MBTGD8LkoU_BqXnizq66ke6mROO6CTIg4ygHIS0LcCmvuLwuaUZhhNop-pJqiDwAl0avQUaTuZ0K7_NpndjSPUDGAxTGSjvvrhpu7yh_BNC2viRREvzn_XOsxx3kJdqtMek150kBOCmG_c7WgeAgeP3EJ1u6q2ruM3G25GSRaIwsGFMIwyZswqJkpvAC9N1Unu6PY1JuLi68NSrcadseoHLr2OxJl6-K70jLtsrsGrpjn8aJOwUTh--GKWVyEuDjzzTKLCxNhopkuJ9p8Oq6R13rRB9n7nJBMYdtKkjJYZToLEY85KO3P_ws3O9E7HMW17OUHVg33GeFj0D-8pkVYf5ZmMNNH6DgentUf77RA6qYGJgvkhcHM5zQ%3D%3D)

subject: The New York Times Was Wrong About Israel
body:
The New York Sun told you the truth.
| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e05ca3f72d2445da9a5c5596277bee4a&_e=U4GLP_K24h6Qsi_AwkUYN9BVvZNXbxispWfaxny9CgvaLWrClXWQWdahYXAtoXj-NDp7YCYdP1TSyPRS0bNEqH1KlTN__5wRLV8uTgYsUdLQnf17CjwJYgIdJGAmcC165qGKBFEqkTqGtr74K182FtmtTVg-1VF6NP7--BnK_QNfP8cNiAc6cUYn3Faxby_wNWKKRmDUaw9F2MMr0mUabSpDasnevtoFULaBKnauApC84x_kXiwFSNoaBSeOSpq79cKwXgQBxtXamHBIJnBEgszGoZ0h0Vw3k-4eqAgu27pqIIL9fBJOni5Qf3ivD_mtc9grqFsl5-3cMzHkFGTKYyn1hJ6jENTS3TdIymTWMhg%3D)

---
| | Dear Friend,How bad is the New York Times? Well, how better to illustrate than to contrast the Times with The New York Sun?

**The screenshot on the left, from last month, shows how the Times covered the story of Hezbollah 's strike on a children's soccer game in Israel. The Times would have you focus on Israel's response. There's nothing about the innocent victims and the terror group that's responsible. The Sun, as you can see below, wants you to know the truth. Nothing more. Nothing less. **
---

---
| | The difference couldn't be starker, but you already knew that. What you didn't know, perhaps, is what **you** can do about it. The answer is simple: [Join The New York Sun today](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e05ca3f72d2445da9a5c5596277bee4a&_e=U4GLP_K24h6Qsi_AwkUYN9BVvZNXbxispWfaxny9CgvaLWrClXWQWdahYXAtoXj-NDp7YCYdP1TSyPRS0bNEqH1KlTN__5wRLV8uTgYsUdLQnf17CjwJYgIdJGAmcC165qGKBFEqkTqGtr74K182FtmtTVg-1VF6NP7--BnK_QNfP8cNiAc6cUYn3Faxby_wNWKKRmDUaw9F2MMr0mUabcxZE0eAqtnoCThmia3RG4CDyzDT3b6OLNjRRJqkQNNGLVSWXWiiZXpQt48beHl0hRsKYzWMLYed93uVXT5utG8JRk53EQr3KRp9vaM2LWGMaLc2SRfn_Sr4vMbY5VRRbSq_YyMPN2BEpxsPu7e786c%3D). Like you, we've screamed and shouted about the injustice of the Times claiming to be America's 'Paper of Record.' But now it's time to do something. It's time to join the movement to rebuild a better newspaper. It's time to join The New York Sun. Founded in 1833 - eighteen years before the Times - the Sun has been on the right side of history at every turn. The Sun is truly America's newspaper. It answers only to the American people. We need every patriotic citizen with us. Declare today that the Times is not your paper of record! Don't wait. Join the movement to save American journalism now.

name: Don Huffines
subject: A Big Win for Texas Republicans You Might Not Be Aware Of...
body:
Today, I want to share my op-ed on a very important topic: banning taxpayer-funded lobbying. This issue is much worse than most people realize and is largely the reason we fail to pass our Republican Party of Texas Legislative Priorities.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-v/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-r/) Patriot,Today, I want to share my op-ed on a very important topic: banning taxpayer-funded lobbying. This issue is much worse than most people realize and is largely the reason we fail to pass our Republican Party of Texas Legislative Priorities. Not only that, but taxpayer-funded lobbying helps protect government corruption!Additionally, this email has some big Texas victories you may not have heard about, along with my response to a fake news attempt to smear eliminating school property taxes. **The Financial Waste Fueling Taxpayer-Funded Lobbying** [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-y/) "Taxpayer-funded lobbying is a perversion of our system. It allows local governments to use your hard-earned money to work against your interests. The Texas Legislature must act to restore balance and protect the constitutional right of Texans to have their voices heard without interference from government-funded lobbyists."_[Click here to read my latest commentary on banning taxpayer-funded lobbying in The Dallas Express](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-j/)._ **A Big Win for Texas Republicans You Might Not Be Aware Of...** HUGE WIN FOR TEXAS REPUBLICANS! We flipped the 1st, 4th, 5th, 13th, and 14th Courts of Appeal! Texas will now have 25 new REPUBLICAN Justices sitting on the appellate bench, all serving 6-year terms.Congrats to Texans for Lawsuit Reform (TLR) and Dick Weekly, in particular, for stepping up, raising the millions needed, and putting a stop to the nonsense Democrat leftist rulings.Glad I could help. This is a BIG WIN for the business community and all of Texas to restore the rule of law. **Attorney General Matt Gaetz?** Did you hear the news? President Trump has chosen former Congressman Matt Gaetz to be his Attorney General. Mary Catherine and I are extremely excited for Matt! Drain that swamp. **Big Win for Liberty in SD 24** Texas is getting **more** **RED! **In South Texas (Senate District 27), Adam Hinojosa defeated an incumbent Democrat, gaining Republicans an additional vote in the Texas Senate.Adam Hinojosa is a true patriot and actual Republican who will be a warrior in Austin for real solutions to the problems everyday Texans face. He has the courage to be an independent leader to help his district, Texas, and the USA.**Make this victory count!** **ICYMI --FACT CHECK: Yes, Texas Can Eliminate School Property Taxes** Don't believe the Dallas Morning News Editorial Board's duplicitous lies!The DMN Editorial Board wrote about how conservatives such as myself are fighting for the elimination of school property taxes but used numbers for eliminating all property taxes. Why? Because they know that Texas CAN ELIMINATE the school property tax over ten years with NO new taxes, NO tax increases, and NO changes in school funding.**FACT:** School property taxes provide the biggest line item on the Texas taxpayers' bill**FACT: **The state of Texas already funds about 40% of government school budgets**FACT:** We can make that number 100% and take the school M&O property tax burden off local property owners, homeowners, renters, and businesses**FACT:** The Texas Legislature can return our recurring state surpluses to taxpayers by gradually reducing the school property tax to zero**FACT:** Huffines Liberty Foundation research shows we can do this over ten years with NO new taxes, NO tax increases, and NO changes in school fundingThank you to Lt. Governor Dan Patrick for continuing to explore all possibilities to give taxpayers permanent property tax relief. All Republicans need to unite behind Governor Greg Abbott's call for the state of Texas to eliminate all school property taxes over ten years. May God bless you, your family, and the great state of Texas. Our greatest days are coming. See you on the battlefield for liberty!!For Liberty, Prosperity, and Virtue Always, Don Huffines
_Father, papa, businessman, and former TX Senator_ P.S. Follow me on [Facebook](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-t/), [Instagram](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-i/), and [Twitter](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-h/) for updates. Your family and friends can join this email list by [clicking here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-k/).Want me to speak at your event? Join your podcast? [Click here to fill out my request form.](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-u/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-o/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-b/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-n/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-p/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-x/) | **[ABOUT](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-c/) | [NEWS](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-q/) | [EVENTS](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-a/) | [SPEAKER/MEDIA REQUEST](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-f/) | [DONATE](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-z/)** [Preferences](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.updatemyprofile.com/t-stkdyhk-17329976-yuddtktydi-s) | [Unsubscribe](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-u-stkdyhk-yuddtktydi-g/)
---

Because they know that Texas CAN ELIMINATE the school property tax over ten years with NO new taxes, NO tax increases, and NO changes in school funding.FACT: School property taxes provide the biggest line item on the Texas taxpayers' billFACT: The state of Texas already funds about 40% of government school budgetsFACT: We can make that number 100% and take the school M&O property tax burden off local property owners, homeowners, renters, and businessesFACT: The Texas Legislature can return our recurring state surpluses to taxpayers by gradually reducing the school property tax to zeroFACT: Huffines Liberty Foundation research shows we can do this over ten years with NO new taxes, NO tax increases, and NO changes in school fundingThank you to Lt. Governor Dan Patrick for continuing to explore all possibilities to give taxpayers permanent property tax relief. All Republicans need to unite behind Governor Greg Abbott's call for the state of Texas to eliminate all school property taxes over ten years. May God bless you, your family, and the great state of Texas. Our greatest days are coming. See you on the battlefield for liberty!!For Liberty, Prosperity, and Virtue Always, Don Huffines Father, papa, businessman, and former TX Senator P.S. Follow me on , , and for updates. Your family and friends can join this email list by me to speak at your event? Join your podcast? | | | | | | |

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Extremists won’t stop me from bringing people together to deliver for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Yesterday, a right-wing member of the House Republicans introduced an anti-trans resolution meant to target me simply because of who I am.
#
Yesterday, a right-wing member of the House Republicans introduced an anti-trans resolution meant to target me simply because of who I am.
This is a blatant attempt from far-right extremists to distract from the fact that they have no real solutions to what Americans are facing. We should be focused on bringing down the costs of housing, health care, and child care — not manufacturing culture wars.
**Delawareans sent me to Congress to make the American dream more affordable and accessible. That’s what I’m focused on.**
So, while the professional provocateurs in the House are intent on wasting the American people’s time on personal attacks, I’ve been working hard to ensure we’re ready to hit the ground running once I’m sworn in on January 3rd.
This week, I wrapped up the first days of new member orientation at the U.S. Capitol. I had the opportunity to discuss Delaware’s priorities with congressional leaders and attend sessions to establish our offices in D.C. and at home.
Most importantly, I’ve begun the work to lift up what I’ve heard from Delawareans: the need to build a government that respects all of us by lowering costs facing families and fostering a politics of grace and kindness.
**I remain committed to bringing my results-driven approach to Washington so we can make progress on the most important issues. Extremists won’t stop me from bringing people together to deliver for you.**
Every day, Americans go to work with people who live, look, and vote differently than they do. They may not always agree, but they show respect, collaborate across differences, and get the job done. That’s my job, too — not to work only with those who share my views but to build bridges and find solutions.
Thank you, as always, for your love and support.
Sarah McBride
* * *

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1561%2E21716%2ERFIzHz)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1561%2E21716%2ERFIzHz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1561%2E21716%2ERFIzHz)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

Republican Rep. John Duarte led in the early count, but now as more votes have been counted across the district, Adam Gray is only 348 votes behind. This was one of our target seats to flip red-to-blue, and there is a path for Democrats winning! But we need to make sure we have the resources to count every single eligible vote. = = = = = = = Republicans have won control of the U.S. House, but because we are on track to flip seats here in California, there is a good chance that their margin will be even smaller than in 2022. That gives Democrats leverage to hold Donald Trump accountable and stop his most egregious policies. And with Trump appointing Republican Members of Congress to Administration posts — could even open the door to Democrats retaking the U.S. House simply by winning special elections over the next year. That’s why our focus is on counting every eligible vote in the uncalled U.S. House races across California. But we have gone way over budget helping voters correct ballot errors (aka ballot “curing”) and need your help to keep our operations running. = = Thank you, \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zc5mkdie35ihkndj76uvf4npd7atperjulc9doi0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chgecoj4cth2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkjb164b0ceb303old90cistm464fgri5vsmb8l8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chgecoj4cth2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zhfffob6ikajaffse3ut3flmlgd5h3ib858cos7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chgecoj4cth2bs)
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztcdd99rfa4n0kp5ssble87pjrep3ol9lvq2gg1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chgecoj4cth2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4apvq306bml8ibdb19rdv16smj71jui8gia62m8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chgecoj4cth2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zm4u6ooe99qr3sk2pmnoj2u1fdvi511nin8m4r4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chgecoj4cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5orophau9o40o8bs7kquielrj6e6c86i9cubpq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chgecoj4cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgi86sfadt24q0k0vmq34na0bgj3g1i644sf9lbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chgecoj4cth2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9gd9b55tqp5njaa0b7fmugek8f8rbjarqsv8ud8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chgecoj4cth2bs)**
---

name: Senator-elect Tim Sheehy
subject: Friend, we won because of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is Senator-elect Tim Sheehy, Friend.

I wanted to personally thank you for everything you did to help Republicans take back the Senate. With your support, we won in Montana and across the country.

_We 've ensured that President Trump will have an America First Senate Majority -- and I'm ready to get to work when it comes to passing his agenda._

**[But there's a hitch, Friend. name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlprkerhh0opeafi7u9s5a10oqutk14t1c5m25r8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chgeao34c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm36glgvv25jpo61f06kdsq0qo8b4bpa9hkiu3vg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chgeao34c9h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6t0n84k46lecqi0n5job2irthoh4dkkg21vf41g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chgeao34c9h2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1cr2o9kk46rg30e65d268a0j3769tsodesot7ro_rp22sh2s8i6epj2chgeao34c9h2bs)**

body:

|
---
| | |
**Folks, the American people have sent a clear mandate of change to our nation 's Capital**, and our Conservative House Majority is laser-focused on carrying out the will of the people.

**When I had the honor of serving as President Trump 's CIA Director and Secretary of State, I saw firsthand how putting America First saved this country. It's about to happen again.**

And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. The “The Second World Wars” DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |
