name: Phil Izon
subject: RCV Lobby spent $93 per vote, we spent $0.93 per vote
body:
Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | **Phil Izon’s Newsletter**
---
|
### **We lost 49.90% to 51.10%**
#### **The RCV Lobby Spent $93 per vote in 2024, We spent $0.93 per vote in 2024. Sign Up Below, Going to try again in 2026.**
---
**I need 100 sponsors to submit the new Repeal of RCV, I have changed the language to call the bill “Remove Ranked Choice Voting” “24RRCV will be the Title” most likely.****Please respond to this email if you would like to be one of the sponsors to Repeal RCV.****I will have another petition ready later this year, I will need 100 sponsors on that petition as well.**
---
[_ _**Sign Up Here** _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=673ee0b04fa2bc6122c494ab&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2Ffuture-volunteer%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D673ee00ff26331553731730b%26ss_email_id%3D673ee0b04fa2bc6122c494ab%26ss_campaign_name%3DRCV%2BLobby%2Bspent%2B%252493%2Bper%2Bvote%252C%2Bwe%2Bspent%2B%25240.93%2Bper%2Bvote%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-11-21T07%253A26%253A56Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_673ee00ff26331553731730b&l=en-US&s=q_T65pSE1SD6MoyNYRZSe7ayfUs%3D)
---
**2022-2024
FL - Banned RCV -🏆
TN - Banned RCV- 🏆
KY - Banned RCV -🏆
OK - Banned RCV-🏆
MS - Banned RCV-🏆
AL - Banned RCV-🏆
LA - Banned RCV-🏆

2024 Election
MO Banned RCV - 🏆-$6.83 million****Alaska Almost Repealed RCV - $21 million

SD Rejected RCV - 🏆-$1.6 million
NV Rejected RCV - 🏆-$42.8 million
CO Rejected RCV -🏆- $19 million
MT Rejected RCV -🏆- $5 million
AZ Rejected RCV -🏆-$15.9 million
ID Rejected RCV -🏆- $5.5 million
OR Rejected RCV -🏆- $7.5 million**
---
---
|
---
**“So if the ultimate goal of these changes is to pass ranked-choice voting, it behooves us to know where this revolutionary idea came from and who is behind it. Not surprisingly, the supposedly non-partisan idea is funded by far-left donors like Kathryn Murdoch (wife of one of Rupert Murdoch’s sons) and Alex Soros (son of radical billionaire George Soros).”**
---
**Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.****The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**_**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**__**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**__**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_
---
This is who is funding the [#RankedChoiceVoting](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=673ee0b04fa2bc6122c494ab&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_673ee00ff26331553731730b&l=en-US&s=B3OY1jhJDERl8dbbOuWlamWjbQM%3D) group in Alaska 1630 Fund Swiss billionaire whose personal goal is to “(re)interpret the American Constitution in the light of progressive politics” has donated hundreds of millions of dollars to a left-wing group that is dumping millions into state ballot initiatives, a new report from Americans for Public Trust (APT) revealed. Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,”
---
Swiss billionaire Hansjörg Wyss has been channeling substantial funds into American state ballot initiatives through the 1630 Fund aka Sixteen Thirty Fund, a progressive advocacy group.As reported by Americans for Public Trust, Wyss’s donations, which total around $243 million to the group, have been instrumental in influencing policies across various states, with a significant focus on Michigan. Since 2017, nearly $34 million has been funneled into Michigan to, among other goals, "rewrite the state’s election laws." This massive infusion of cash aims at bolstering liberal causes from immigration to abortion and enhancing Democratic voter turnout. Such activities have sparked controversy and legislative responses aimed at curbing foreign influence in American electoral processes.https://thefederalist.com/2024/04/18/dark-money-group-backed-by-foreign-billionaire-has-dumped-100-million-into-state-ballot-initiatives/1630 Fund is currently funding multiple ballot initiatives in Alaska, including Alaskans For Better Elections AKBE who brought Ranked Choice Voting to Alaska. Also including the recent push for a higher minimum wage. At some point, one must question when the regulators and government officials, elected to safeguard citizens, become tools manipulated by these malicious actors to act against the citizens they are meant to protect.(e.g. we have been attacked 4 times so far 3 times using state offices, we have been spied on, harassed, and our reputations damaged nationwide all because we were trying to address an election system we didn't feel was a good fit for Alaska)I hope you take this threat to your State Seriously, they are incredibly well funded and they are hell bent on making changes to the State of Alaska. This is one of those cases of too big to fail, where you will attack Alaskans and regular people, but applying these rules to a Swiss Billionaire is outside your job and expectations. As a citizen it saddens me to learn that millionaires and billionaires have more influence on a state and the way the state operates than the people who live here.Phil IzonPer State Statutes:**Sec. 15.13.068. Expenditures and contributions by foreign-influenced corporations and foreign nationals.
** (a) A foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national may not, directly or indirectly, in connection with an election under this chapter, make a contribution or expenditure or make an express or implied promise to make a contribution or expenditure.

(b) The provisions of this section prohibit a foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national from making a contribution or expenditure in connection with a state election only to the
---
|
---

#### **We have 400 Volunteers Signed Up Already**
---
**I need 100 sponsors to submit the new Repeal of RCV, I have changed the language to call the bill “Remove Ranked Choice Voting” “24RRCV will be the Title” most likely.****Please respond to this email if you would like to be one of the sponsors to Repeal RCV.****I will have another petition ready later this year, I will need 100 sponsors on that petition as well.**
---
[_ _**Sign Up Here** _ _](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=673ee362f2633155373186f8&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2Ffuture-volunteer%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D673ee2a4f2633155373173d8%26ss_email_id%3D673ee362f2633155373186f8%26ss_campaign_name%3DWe%2Bhave%2B400%2Bvolunteers%252C%2BSend%2Bthis%2Bemail%2Bto%2Byour%2Bfriends%2Band%2Bfamily%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-11-21T07%253A38%253A16Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_673ee2a4f2633155373173d8&l=en-US&s=u4yDPBBI4CoiVXnJPkr95F-sNBI%3D)

2024 Election

OR Rejected RCV -🏆- $7.5 million**

---
|
---
**“So if the ultimate goal of these changes is to pass ranked-choice voting, it behooves us to know where this revolutionary idea came from and who is behind it. Not surprisingly, the supposedly non-partisan idea is funded by far-left donors like Kathryn Murdoch (wife of one of Rupert Murdoch’s sons) and Alex Soros (son of radical billionaire George Soros).”**
---
**Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.****The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**_**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**__**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**__**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_
---
This is who is funding the [#RankedChoiceVoting](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=673ee362f2633155373186f8&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_673ee2a4f2633155373173d8&l=en-US&s=N0Lp_ygD62ogrp7qEoe_g-1leJg%3D) group in Alaska 1630 Fund Swiss billionaire whose personal goal is to “(re)interpret the American Constitution in the light of progressive politics” has donated hundreds of millions of dollars to a left-wing group that is dumping millions into state ballot initiatives, a new report from Americans for Public Trust (APT) revealed. Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,”
---
Swiss billionaire Hansjörg Wyss has been channeling substantial funds into American state ballot initiatives through the 1630 Fund aka Sixteen Thirty Fund, a progressive advocacy group.As reported by Americans for Public Trust, Wyss’s donations, which total around $243 million to the group, have been instrumental in influencing policies across various states, with a significant focus on Michigan. Since 2017, nearly $34 million has been funneled into Michigan to, among other goals, "rewrite the state’s election laws." This massive infusion of cash aims at bolstering liberal causes from immigration to abortion and enhancing Democratic voter turnout. Such activities have sparked controversy and legislative responses aimed at curbing foreign influence in American electoral processes.https://thefederalist.com/2024/04/18/dark-money-group-backed-by-foreign-billionaire-has-dumped-100-million-into-state-ballot-initiatives/1630 Fund is currently funding multiple ballot initiatives in Alaska, including Alaskans For Better Elections AKBE who brought Ranked Choice Voting to Alaska. Also including the recent push for a higher minimum wage. At some point, one must question when the regulators and government officials, elected to safeguard citizens, become tools manipulated by these malicious actors to act against the citizens they are meant to protect.(e.g. we have been attacked 4 times so far 3 times using state offices, we have been spied on, harassed, and our reputations damaged nationwide all because we were trying to address an election system we didn't feel was a good fit for Alaska)I hope you take this threat to your State Seriously, they are incredibly well funded and they are hell bent on making changes to the State of Alaska. This is one of those cases of too big to fail, where you will attack Alaskans and regular people, but applying these rules to a Swiss Billionaire is outside your job and expectations. As a citizen it saddens me to learn that millionaires and billionaires have more influence on a state and the way the state operates than the people who live here.Phil IzonPer State Statutes:**Sec. 15.13.068. Expenditures and contributions by foreign-influenced corporations and foreign nationals.
** (a) A foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national may not, directly or indirectly, in connection with an election under this chapter, make a contribution or expenditure or make an express or implied promise to make a contribution or expenditure.

(b) The provisions of this section prohibit a foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national from making a contribution or expenditure in connection with a state election only to the

Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,” Swiss billionaire Hansjörg Wyss has been channeling substantial funds into American state ballot initiatives through the 1630 Fund aka Sixteen Thirty Fund, a progressive advocacy group.As reported by Americans for Public Trust, Wyss’s donations, which total around $243 million to the group, have been instrumental in influencing policies across various states, with a significant focus on Michigan. Since 2017, nearly $34 million has been funneled into Michigan to, among other goals, "rewrite the state’s election laws." This massive infusion of cash aims at bolstering liberal causes from immigration to abortion and enhancing Democratic voter turnout. Such activities have sparked controversy and legislative responses aimed at curbing foreign influence in American electoral processes. Fund is currently funding multiple ballot initiatives in Alaska, including Alaskans For Better Elections AKBE who brought Ranked Choice Voting to Alaska. Also including the recent push for a higher minimum wage. At some point, one must question when the regulators and government officials, elected to safeguard citizens, become tools manipulated by these malicious actors to act against the citizens they are meant to protect.(e.g. we have been attacked 4 times so far 3 times using state offices, we have been spied on, harassed, and our reputations damaged nationwide all because we were trying to address an election system we didn't feel was a good fit for Alaska)I hope you take this threat to your State Seriously, they are incredibly well funded and they are hell bent on making changes to the State of Alaska. This is one of those cases of too big to fail, where you will attack Alaskans and regular people, but applying these rules to a Swiss Billionaire is outside your job and expectations. As a citizen it saddens me to learn that millionaires and billionaires have more influence on a state and the way the state operates than the people who live here.Phil IzonPer State Statutes:Sec. 15.13.068. Expenditures and contributions by foreign-influenced corporations and foreign nationals. (a) A foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national may not, directly or indirectly, in connection with an election under this chapter, make a contribution or expenditure or make an express or implied promise to make a contribution or expenditure. (b) The provisions of this section prohibit a foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national from making a contribution or expenditure in connection with a state election only to the | Please Share with Friends, Family, and Co-Workers! tel:+19078028116 | | Follow Me On X | | | Phil Izon 4201 Dimond Way Wasilla United States

clean_body: Litigating with forensic evidence scares wrongdoers—and United Sovereign Americans (USA) is doing just that. | | | Dear Peter, Litigating with forensic evidence scares wrongdoers—and United Sovereign Americans (USA) is doing just that. Our strategy using forensic evidence to file nine federal lawsuits appears to have stopped 18 million fake votes in the 2024 general election. We will not rest until all election officials comply with the law. | | | | Citizen reports provide some of the evidence that fuels our lawsuits. If you experienced voting issues complete our complaint form or share it with others. **Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DVBRabM2srvjQZ6PksoGNQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIZoIP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPUNCLTIwMjQxMTIxVwNzcGNCCmc7sAI_Z-4_O8xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DVBRabM2srvjQZ6PksoGNQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIZoIP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPUNCLTIwMjQxMTIxVwNzcGNCCmc7sAI_Z-4_O8xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DVBRabM2srvjQZ6PksoGNQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIZoIP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPUNCLTIwMjQxMTIxVwNzcGNCCmc7sAI_Z-4_O8xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
[ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DVBRabM2srvjQZ6PksoGNQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIZoIP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPUNCLTIwMjQxMTIxVwNzcGNCCmc7sAI_Z-4_O8xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
What makes [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DVBRabM2srvjQZ6PksoGNQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIZoIP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPUNCLTIwMjQxMTIxVwNzcGNCCmc7sAI_Z-4_O8xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DVBRabM2srvjQZ6PksoGNQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIZoIP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPUNCLTIwMjQxMTIxVwNzcGNCCmc7sAI_Z-4_O8xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DVBRabM2srvjQZ6PksoGNQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpIZoIP0TqaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_YWN0PUFDVDAwMDAwNjAxNjBBQ1QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ieWQmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1hZmZpbGlhdGUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXVzX2VuX2FsX2hlYV9hZmZpbGlhdGVfYnlkX2hlYS1saWdodGJ1bGItZG91YmxlX3BvcGFjdGFfQUNUMDAwMDA2MDE2MEFDVCZ1dG1fcHVibGlzaGVyX2lkPVBvcEFjdGEmc3ViX2lkPUNCLTIwMjQxMTIxVwNzcGNCCmc7sAI_Z-4_O8xSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Before they're gone
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rIEJtiAkJju8IyBEO_vupA~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rIEJtiAkJju8IyBEO_vupA~~/AARclAA~~~) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rIEJtiAkJju8IyBEO_vupA~~/AARclAA~~~)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/rIEJtiAkJju8IyBEO_vupA~~/AARclAA~~~)**

**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44463501818d4f0ba14e35123eed307c&_e=P2nqEtYqTjabtsw4y0YNDWPTRzdcmKRCh4rYa7_AQcRIU9R5WpeSr4zpb1VFSGs2J-SHYhJ6tfxV9P84FGG4mLHcolKUdIgjNteLuTrKG_HR67PLA3VYUmMAdnz310T80D69qlRF7Zr_Ie7Gx0qnETJj5x-MLkYB70h-4J1B7PplhJPL2BgpbAYEULafH1nTNsNa3PSs9bAJbxXtE5mfs7m4q7K0_whW8PHydi1M-LLL9DG7lLUoHuWqxCYa56mYWImS76b-zwugMP83df9ONp3Ff5JUi-7f6W5aQemUVY6EOWZqo6IR6CzRCPQtBNMadTIfQPQRxVaA_AqOW3ddY_PYW7aaXimhN6DAvKf6NuAEH4D2C43MULpHYRiGntfCrg73JneaTB6aa9W6udvmUNAswDIWAeR3P7gue8Hf65WTj3-6lDZPTNRHhUt_ZIyl9TSLGEiVnYlpkRR1kiqcE7CfDZYEHGgLe-_yxwBKig4%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44463501818d4f0ba14e35123eed307c&_e=P2nqEtYqTjabtsw4y0YNDWPTRzdcmKRCh4rYa7_AQcRIU9R5WpeSr4zpb1VFSGs2J-SHYhJ6tfxV9P84FGG4mLHcolKUdIgjNteLuTrKG_HR67PLA3VYUmMAdnz310T80D69qlRF7Zr_Ie7Gx0qnETJj5x-MLkYB70h-4J1B7PplhJPL2BgpbAYEULafH1nTNsNa3PSs9bAJbxXtE5mfs7m4q7K0_whW8PHydi1M-LLL9DG7lLUoHuWqxCYa56mYWImS76b-zwugMP83df9ONp3Ff5JUi-7f6W5aQemUVY6EOWZqo6IR6CzRCPQtBNMadTIfQPQRxVaA_AqOW3ddYy9_FPoQLuanDwLnmKo74Yfcl7t24W6DRd8WBcwyfPg_HQW4ofMtSJDrGXObxoDYYN4S4t-piOrce5FXjeKHPPQ6ONfus7K1yfgeZwRQU1vJQCWtyoPpPX2DPY0NW-HSImjNQzYIp_96Z7hI3y71uIw%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44463501818d4f0ba14e35123eed307c&_e=P2nqEtYqTjabtsw4y0YNDWPTRzdcmKRCh4rYa7_AQcRIU9R5WpeSr4zpb1VFSGs2J-SHYhJ6tfxV9P84FGG4mLHcolKUdIgjNteLuTrKG_HR67PLA3VYUmMAdnz310T80D69qlRF7Zr_Ie7Gx0qnETJj5x-MLkYB70h-4J1B7PplhJPL2BgpbAYEULafH1nTNsNa3PSs9bAJbxXtE5mfs7m4q7K0_whW8PHydi1M-LLL9DG7lLUoHuWqxCYa56mYWImS76b-zwugMP83df9ONp3Ff5JUi-7f6W5aQemUVY6EOWZqo6IR6CzRCPQtBNMadTIfQPQRxVaA_AqOW3ddY9O64K-q77LTFXN_xRxJL4-s-HtPadrG8CJvfk1CISzKI90mSHCT_2hX-wnYQupRsRQaAgfxFdPDXdIfoY6WJ7WCgHLmBYdezyoRxQF5cUh87fOCks767eQIwv1Dv6_xkncw__0ZkNOqwKmT_C7qpAE%3D)
[ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44463501818d4f0ba14e35123eed307c&_e=P2nqEtYqTjabtsw4y0YNDWPTRzdcmKRCh4rYa7_AQcRIU9R5WpeSr4zpb1VFSGs2J-SHYhJ6tfxV9P84FGG4mLHcolKUdIgjNteLuTrKG_HR67PLA3VYUmMAdnz310T80D69qlRF7Zr_Ie7Gx0qnETJj5x-MLkYB70h-4J1B7PplhJPL2BgpbAYEULafH1nTNsNa3PSs9bAJbxXtE5mfs7m4q7K0_whW8PHydi1M-LLL9DG7lLUoHuWqxCYa56mYWImS76b-zwugMP83df9ONp3Ff5JUi-7f6W5aQemUVY6EOWZqo6IR6CzRCPQtBNMadTIfQPQRxVaA_AqOW3ddY_2EVYDpEdn3HcBBw2Uo_r5a31VyHFRYaQ_Cp1Le4QZPzW7mee5hZMTTiVHI7_mbx9d7z2YANYmbMsi7XKKKKrIxLRJuUjfDiHOzLA3X9m9swxNmHUfXzljElyN8I2LcIX6BM8AaLZ8yWOCkFNUj5n4%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44463501818d4f0ba14e35123eed307c&_e=P2nqEtYqTjabtsw4y0YNDWPTRzdcmKRCh4rYa7_AQcRIU9R5WpeSr4zpb1VFSGs2J-SHYhJ6tfxV9P84FGG4mLHcolKUdIgjNteLuTrKG_HR67PLA3VYUmMAdnz310T80D69qlRF7Zr_Ie7Gx0qnETJj5x-MLkYB70h-4J1B7PplhJPL2BgpbAYEULafH1nTNsNa3PSs9bAJbxXtE5mfs7m4q7K0_whW8PHydi1M-LLL9DG7lLUoHuWqxCYa56mYWImS76b-zwugMP83df9ONp3Ff5JUi-7f6W5aQemUVY6EOWZqo6IR6CzRCPQtBNMadTIfQPQRxVaA_AqOW3ddY6t-38SNE86h_yspViF_EBnKezwhv3YSC8IVhNHqumxDeiM6Yox2082Gl9amEFpQX9_VmpTNyiQNCJwG1PI3d1yzTzHqPxP3w5p5dKPyRgk72yUYiMSna4hXVlZOwKiyFfdQ-qPJCabFkYHZZyNdWhc%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! Limited no-risk trials now available Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. Get started today. Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Condemns Mayor Wu’s Approach to ICE Cooperation and Public Safety
body:
| | | | |
---
| [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011VngM5DL9pNFMR6TfNXp9XmE7YwkCp8DfvzEoDTqqZx5buu6K-hkbiiVOc5HMQ0Ur4zj1Sv6frDN-69qJli0VLcK8b_yvcy5g56FrEhXSt9dxqOEddGJUlVH449uJpICAMRYLestFmqcM5T57_Rfkg==&c=hWcmBs4klsGzxE0K-okSA9RtyhpWAhPCBDKJgrGiHFoszYeCHUGTMA==&ch=PF5-kLSiRqM6vHWyhZyIy7OnZdJZ3_1JY6FVANbQ1QinWhH1x_GgXw==)
---
| MassGOP Condemns Mayor Wu's Approach to ICE Cooperation and Public Safety
---
---
| Boston, MA-The Massachusetts Republican Party strongly opposes Mayor Wu's recent declaration that she will refuse to cooperate with federal authorities in deportation efforts involving criminal illegal immigrants. While Mayor Wu claims her top priority is the safety of residents, her decision to ignore federal ICE detainers for illegal immigrants with criminal records--whether in their country of origin or in the United States--endangers Boston residents. This policy not only jeopardizes public safety but also sends a dangerous message that Boston is a sanctuary for those seeking to evade federal law enforcement.
MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale responded to Michelle Wu's recent statements, declaring: "If the FBI, DEA, ATF, or any other federal agency requested Boston's assistance in identifying and arresting a criminal responsible for crimes, the city would cooperate. Yet, Boston and Massachusetts as a whole are actively preventing local authorities from working with ICE to apprehend known criminals simply because they are here illegally. Democrats' preference towards pandering to their most extreme base is putting residents at risk. This policy is out of control and completely nonsensical."
###
---
---

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Hillsdale College via Inside Scoop Politics
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Inside Scoop Politics is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkUFv3CAQhX8NvmHBgI198CGSs1KlJo20hx4RgYkXCQMCnP37ldtszznOzNP7Zub9ftEvxgcft1ez4-Jr1aXqaPTNh0AhOnq_01w1MJCUcwpc884tA_DpY-pw4UoAnxlMrLsto5vQDjMYZwclxTxazqRRs3LvTszj1Pnl9OEcOGdyErJXVs2WKzuAekfxwYlkR3amYe9j9Q6rTSnnFHzztvapbF1Ybq3lSsQTgQuBS0V7FHT9uW91JmCP7iBw-V-fmiPnVBptN6QVbTqvSiU4ejelEnGploiVMTnOrwwk_OTD-mt9fr4SGI-265qOYpGINZdUM9rm4_Y12tH5Yydixd348NW0Zs_Gb5GI9R_tL-xkaffpHqIUG8ZGxPp21W9P9Mf1Sh_P6cri8t2H4OuoiGTbad7btHftmwl9LvAnAAD__x2amSs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkUFv3CAQhX8NvmHBgI198CGSs1KlJo20hx4RgYkXCQMCnP37ldtszznOzNP7Zub9ftEvxgcft1ez4-Jr1aXqaPTNh0AhOnq_01w1MJCUcwpc884tA_DpY-pw4UoAnxlMrLsto5vQDjMYZwclxTxazqRRs3LvTszj1Pnl9OEcOGdyErJXVs2WKzuAekfxwYlkR3amYe9j9Q6rTSnnFHzztvapbF1Ybq3lSsQTgQuBS0V7FHT9uW91JmCP7iBw-V-fmiPnVBptN6QVbTqvSiU4ejelEnGploiVMTnOrwwk_OTD-mt9fr4SGI-265qOYpGINZdUM9rm4_Y12tH5Yydixd348NW0Zs_Gb5GI9R_tL-xkaffpHqIUG8ZGxPp21W9P9Mf1Sh_P6cri8t2H4OuoiGTbad7btHftmwl9LvAnAAD__x2amSs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkUFv3CAQhX8NvmHBgI198CGSs1KlJo20hx4RgYkXCQMCnP37ldtszznOzNP7Zub9ftEvxgcft1ez4-Jr1aXqaPTNh0AhOnq_01w1MJCUcwpc884tA_DpY-pw4UoAnxlMrLsto5vQDjMYZwclxTxazqRRs3LvTszj1Pnl9OEcOGdyErJXVs2WKzuAekfxwYlkR3amYe9j9Q6rTSnnFHzztvapbF1Ybq3lSsQTgQuBS0V7FHT9uW91JmCP7iBw-V-fmiPnVBptN6QVbTqvSiU4ejelEnGploiVMTnOrwwk_OTD-mt9fr4SGI-265qOYpGINZdUM9rm4_Y12tH5Yydixd348NW0Zs_Gb5GI9R_tL-xkaffpHqIUG8ZGxPp21W9P9Mf1Sh_P6cri8t2H4OuoiGTbad7btHftmwl9LvAnAAD__x2amSs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyMkUFv3CAQhX8NvmHBgI198CGSs1KlJo20hx4RgYkXCQMCnP37ldtszznOzNP7Zub9ftEvxgcft1ez4-Jr1aXqaPTNh0AhOnq_01w1MJCUcwpc884tA_DpY-pw4UoAnxlMrLsto5vQDjMYZwclxTxazqRRs3LvTszj1Pnl9OEcOGdyErJXVs2WKzuAekfxwYlkR3amYe9j9Q6rTSnnFHzztvapbF1Ybq3lSsQTgQuBS0V7FHT9uW91JmCP7iBw-V-fmiPnVBptN6QVbTqvSiU4ejelEnGploiVMTnOrwwk_OTD-mt9fr4SGI-265qOYpGINZdUM9rm4_Y12tH5Yydixd348NW0Zs_Gb5GI9R_tL-xkaffpHqIUG8ZGxPp21W9P9Mf1Sh_P6cri8t2H4OuoiGTbad7btHftmwl9LvAnAAD__x2amSs)**

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Inside Scoop Politics is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College P.S. The “The Second World Wars” DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. Inside Scoop Politics PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d66694ca1f5046c786337e02ca488d18&_e=Z7ctq4mjcvfvbnS2xKhwyAlXZLwdt2bIZokZ28a0ocZAlSs0RVqZ2J_Xd0n4890x4-II70sDOn0VpNPeRLs8mMH6S5YaWh6I9cL0oVs7ulG5-Dk8vM7fZpd7rTUilR0W9Gtfa-YhzgYo3sPosa3FtV80kJSs7Dfa9iK2QTANsezdx309BjOYElUdENc053h7CIkQUSt40W0ark1A3awmv6eMHBdZP_JMwPA_exzOsww6SyHXiyuTc2Y3x7sPSvPkMBA6wPuk2WclKdJ-z1bhq9lZa5Yr-3BFPw-wVZSkwFBKRaBIAA_ym55r_udBSP6xPPOwY0Ytr7HxZk-UGaZRJVJlusrdXzftWcxLuyplwPdWBgnQBZORTvW0Ttd_kQzubRWLn9S_R4ehbFbQY40kODN4tBJ9bkUZlwngHpdB3yBRDTziDlcAykxXF9J_hACh1T0jlK78L95erPuhHw_2zwqKp9eq4XXfaHEK_DT7nkg%3D) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d66694ca1f5046c786337e02ca488d18&_e=Z7ctq4mjcvfvbnS2xKhwyAlXZLwdt2bIZokZ28a0ocZAlSs0RVqZ2J_Xd0n4890x4-II70sDOn0VpNPeRLs8mMH6S5YaWh6I9cL0oVs7ulG5-Dk8vM7fZpd7rTUilR0W9Gtfa-YhzgYo3sPosa3FtV80kJSs7Dfa9iK2QTANsezdx309BjOYElUdENc053h7CIkQUSt40W0ark1A3awmv6eMHBdZP_JMwPA_exzOsww6SyHXiyuTc2Y3x7sPSvPkMBA6wPuk2WclKdJ-z1bhq9lZa5Yr-3BFPw-wVZSkwFBKRaBIAA_ym55r_udBSP6xPPOwY0Ytr7HxZk-UGaZRJRGQBE-BBJe4NIDCn_z1V9i1u4i2uPo6wdDGqS2XNPsrHXFRjTVEHe8Ws4C_rDICG5ibV6keRy0WcOF1XOWRb9Gx1kGlqa_yjW5D54WTe7ear5Sxj17AbK2Mlrre7YoCAq-P7XddegcibdnPZTYO66o%3D) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.

[ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d66694ca1f5046c786337e02ca488d18&_e=Z7ctq4mjcvfvbnS2xKhwyAlXZLwdt2bIZokZ28a0ocZAlSs0RVqZ2J_Xd0n4890x4-II70sDOn0VpNPeRLs8mMH6S5YaWh6I9cL0oVs7ulG5-Dk8vM7fZpd7rTUilR0W9Gtfa-YhzgYo3sPosa3FtV80kJSs7Dfa9iK2QTANsezdx309BjOYElUdENc053h7CIkQUSt40W0ark1A3awmv6eMHBdZP_JMwPA_exzOsww6SyHXiyuTc2Y3x7sPSvPkMBA6wPuk2WclKdJ-z1bhq9lZa5Yr-3BFPw-wVZSkwFBKRaBIAA_ym55r_udBSP6xPPOwY0Ytr7HxZk-UGaZRJTzcMGF2sACWz-z5wjBAqK2foL8USC8ciPujt7n_m8L00a3KXQwvdd1RLVfG3eUz1XUbuU_wSu0JSVOaFzcLo3-Il8gVeH97E2PJlm3kwgYxVbjdaxZjEo1U2PGj8eo9Z8DgLQ8FoQfjF8bMzlNL6TU%3D)
What makes [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d66694ca1f5046c786337e02ca488d18&_e=Z7ctq4mjcvfvbnS2xKhwyAlXZLwdt2bIZokZ28a0ocZAlSs0RVqZ2J_Xd0n4890x4-II70sDOn0VpNPeRLs8mMH6S5YaWh6I9cL0oVs7ulG5-Dk8vM7fZpd7rTUilR0W9Gtfa-YhzgYo3sPosa3FtV80kJSs7Dfa9iK2QTANsezdx309BjOYElUdENc053h7CIkQUSt40W0ark1A3awmv6eMHBdZP_JMwPA_exzOsww6SyHXiyuTc2Y3x7sPSvPkMBA6wPuk2WclKdJ-z1bhq9lZa5Yr-3BFPw-wVZSkwFBKRaBIAA_ym55r_udBSP6xPPOwY0Ytr7HxZk-UGaZRJQasMCV5ozTCdiatv4ZZiOoAb26_BJn7X3iiTmCbx9-l1ekKWI8ylMolxuq952NyqZcQmbKuHx-7hCElA4INXmQa4UcXqrMJJIiqYY-LIrZYKp619mg0LsRWMU6qMLvcXkEJFToujwvjWHCTwAMOpLc%3D) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d66694ca1f5046c786337e02ca488d18&_e=Z7ctq4mjcvfvbnS2xKhwyAlXZLwdt2bIZokZ28a0ocZAlSs0RVqZ2J_Xd0n4890x4-II70sDOn0VpNPeRLs8mMH6S5YaWh6I9cL0oVs7ulG5-Dk8vM7fZpd7rTUilR0W9Gtfa-YhzgYo3sPosa3FtV80kJSs7Dfa9iK2QTANsezdx309BjOYElUdENc053h7CIkQUSt40W0ark1A3awmv6eMHBdZP_JMwPA_exzOsww6SyHXiyuTc2Y3x7sPSvPkMBA6wPuk2WclKdJ-z1bhq9lZa5Yr-3BFPw-wVZSkwFBKRaBIAA_ym55r_udBSP6xPPOwY0Ytr7HxZk-UGaZRJcEhgzRKxXgjVs8VtGmrPukQwRyoTLrRkn_5G0Ma5OPb2mQpfO2-sFHlqG10e1jBBsobYpgB72r3INuHzuODu3MWCKMCSkEH1CL5MQkswykMaFLJdTFwnK7SskSJV6VkAeGDPukR449fyNUm7__gIx4%3D) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d66694ca1f5046c786337e02ca488d18&_e=Z7ctq4mjcvfvbnS2xKhwyAlXZLwdt2bIZokZ28a0ocZAlSs0RVqZ2J_Xd0n4890x4-II70sDOn0VpNPeRLs8mMH6S5YaWh6I9cL0oVs7ulG5-Dk8vM7fZpd7rTUilR0W9Gtfa-YhzgYo3sPosa3FtV80kJSs7Dfa9iK2QTANsezdx309BjOYElUdENc053h7CIkQUSt40W0ark1A3awmv6eMHBdZP_JMwPA_exzOsww6SyHXiyuTc2Y3x7sPSvPkMBA6wPuk2WclKdJ-z1bhq9lZa5Yr-3BFPw-wVZSkwFBKRaBIAA_ym55r_udBSP6xPPOwY0Ytr7HxZk-UGaZRJelVeoPKCGQTmLXqWjec1IqzEyTcSq2cqriF_8zl1U9qhohv3mLFJ5DpfgxVa9OeGeLMhrdVoiPTfTNVeS8cypblt-gLExQXyGg10Pz7xcU7Z3se89QxaxmKBQTCXb7SpT4Ir9akB_bG9d83uQ-AJ5M%3D) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

clean_body: But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice. But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice. | Dear Friend, Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card, and your checking account. Imagine all of your money being seized. That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me. I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH... As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State — especially since my own law licenses have been taken away from me! But there’s one thing I want to make clear... ...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal Defense Trust. That’s a LIE. The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust, I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of course the media and the Democrats will never report that. And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to contribute, please don’t. End of story. But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my freedom – and not just my own freedom, but the freedom, justice, and rights of every U.S. citizen. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d4659d5ed0f4cd6b6c778230d12f29b&_e=SWb3l185giVqJ9uKhQjpm0auGuFCDK6lpV7LgyAWfvgsdsim3wM5J9ASMbYuiTW-4xMPf0w9SYgtsqBDnDifYBzic8cclEeO-lTc1pyJp05Z4r9wurqEi8pVLCEEU1M8_OmWSTpgyAoiBPpDSXcBVY95WssaFdbKE30LGkZpHkWjx2AqI5T7_0fxKywDnm5KMeu6s9RBcRXhoPDKbC7mQ7G5akwo0Dq8ajU4krBZhqWlXLLHChAiSLcDHE7vu1DTbWLJi0UBLV15MZcV9FAXW31dba2hEdfg5mnyhuYf3BLU28PdounnGqTiBZwIa6QjOZzRvBGNbXsdRJ3Omnzm0rjq5p_tk7TmQBI9szjZUZpY10AIMUDSa5r4kwrrzN7-CqnoplopviShVXNJqDrhRM10z_eYzdP18LROBsLsvDTndqiKUzX3pt2shhw4hITt) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d4659d5ed0f4cd6b6c778230d12f29b&_e=SWb3l185giVqJ9uKhQjpm0auGuFCDK6lpV7LgyAWfvgsdsim3wM5J9ASMbYuiTW-4xMPf0w9SYgtsqBDnDifYBzic8cclEeO-lTc1pyJp05Z4r9wurqEi8pVLCEEU1M8_OmWSTpgyAoiBPpDSXcBVY95WssaFdbKE30LGkZpHkWjx2AqI5T7_0fxKywDnm5KMeu6s9RBcRXhoPDKbC7mQ7G5akwo0Dq8ajU4krBZhqWlXLLHChAiSLcDHE7vu1DTbWLJi0UBLV15MZcV9FAXW2ZdRGF6pQ6HSU-pe4n_cW7M7vtZipb3N2p1Vw956EujRgs95itZiOwB4ZDAgUrf0LGGClU-VcbBSUOmr8k-rYbZdq4shlR9TlfyGQnpxVbpKhZKBGEbX2n2bO7X0ORo3XlO2wTUx6h0X-zTuhVE3Z37CAeTXLLq34o2uaO_agGz) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d4659d5ed0f4cd6b6c778230d12f29b&_e=SWb3l185giVqJ9uKhQjpm0auGuFCDK6lpV7LgyAWfvgsdsim3wM5J9ASMbYuiTW-4xMPf0w9SYgtsqBDnDifYBzic8cclEeO-lTc1pyJp05Z4r9wurqEi8pVLCEEU1M8_OmWSTpgyAoiBPpDSXcBVY95WssaFdbKE30LGkZpHkWjx2AqI5T7_0fxKywDnm5KMeu6s9RBcRXhoPDKbC7mQ7G5akwo0Dq8ajU4krBZhqWlXLLHChAiSLcDHE7vu1DTbWLJi0UBLV15MZcV9FAXW_aDc_hP-WN9YcxONtYdTYpE9SnOxoKVqCmQPEcTcCObXpSt0u6CeS_7Sn2hhuzkmRUHSTmsda6PVJh_siMYdaH_XREiqI7eQ5H5LVvztjpRIR7RtEclT797DV4QpKCzVqXoXb5E_fPD3gf5n48lVMo7C4aBeLL1H6LKidbI8lJa)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d4659d5ed0f4cd6b6c778230d12f29b&_e=SWb3l185giVqJ9uKhQjpm0auGuFCDK6lpV7LgyAWfvgsdsim3wM5J9ASMbYuiTW-4xMPf0w9SYgtsqBDnDifYBzic8cclEeO-lTc1pyJp05Z4r9wurqEi8pVLCEEU1M8_OmWSTpgyAoiBPpDSXcBVY95WssaFdbKE30LGkZpHkWjx2AqI5T7_0fxKywDnm5KMeu6s9RBcRXhoPDKbC7mQ7G5akwo0Dq8ajU4krBZhqWlXLLHChAiSLcDHE7vu1DTbWLJi0UBLV15MZcV9FAXW_LlqDxUKZEUwEbT9kx96PAm1CkwFbpr510MMAOZlWg-kk1pWLDd89Ukpao8diGltQadAKNuK88Zqk80sirBDlyfUij2zCFBtoXHRZtw0Vua3MtosiffTFETat0G26wjHybbhL_r6N2vQ5hvOp5IhYvxcvLNbZXXa3cCE9_dPpxh)**

# Thursday, November 21, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning**! On this day in 1976, _[Rocky](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7Fu8yAQAOCngS2W7yBgDwyRfnnLP7WqMlmcOWIqHCIbp_LbV-3eF_ik7-M6Xn3K6XH_7xd2NZYRW9QngBPCGHzKx6hlcJEZWUl2YBVC1_W2l7MjIMKWDBkF0Vg8R7Dd5M_Yke8xdDK5Hw0AAUAZMM15IiJjjZ6mnjS2QrccUi1r81nSo84c81FevDZTWWR2c63PTaiLwEHgcJS97g2xwGG83ZZ4xbf4fhFqiOzrvrJQ_7bZrxzk6sLzK-WcNmOFbu-LT_mXrH8VXw6_AwAA__8ublJB)_ , starring Sylvester Stallone as the underdog prizefighter Rocky Balboa, debuted in New York City. The film was a massive box-office hit. Did you know that Sylvester Stallone was inspired to write the screenplay for _Rocky_ after witnessing unknown boxer [Chuck Wepner](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0jz1vwyAUAH8N3rB4zwTigaGLt3TtaPHxCDQkWITG8r-v0r376U73dVkvNpf8uH7aO5ke64oCJQfgCGuwuRyrHIKJREjTQAb0hHA-z3oekok6WgFT8CePQeLJqTCDAD0LbeNZxSGbtw0AAWBSoMaTd84praT3s5MomBQUcq9t_K750RPFctQXtdHX-1BM6n17sumD4cJw2fd9dLlem93S8SYYLranQp2eDBeffvyN77Q9qPFGtvBW_e3gzhZX7dBM2PZcSn4qzaS43m0uf5n-3_bL4G8AAAD__6SsWvk) knock Muhammad Ali down in the ninth round of their 1975 fight? ## U.S. Shuts Ukraine Embassy on War's 1,001st Day
The [U.S. Embassy in Kyiv closed Wednesday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j72OqzAQRp_GdEbM4BgoXNyGLrfdEo1_SGZjIGKcoLz9iu23-6RPOkfn6zpdiTOvt_-0JFfmbcIGjQbQCFMkzp_JVNHNKWFqq-SgaxH6fuiG6u5iM0QI5E3saegjXayfCY1FBDIx9hW7kwaAANBasPUleO9tZ00IgzfYKNOkyGXb6--N13JPc_5s77TXYVuq7O6lPEW1_xSOCsfjOOrgZU2HnL_C8ZwKx_0lwqRfj514TfolmgqFRfTCIpyTaL9_aJWHwrHaXXwenDOL7ZRpbgtx_tWVv_LfDn8CAAD__w3gXlw) after warnings of potential Russian air attacks on the Ukrainian capital. The precautionary closure followed Tuesday's events, when Ukraine fired [eight U.S.-supplied long-range missiles](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOpDAQBNCvgcwINz6DAweXkM2lF6K2aYbeMWZkm0H8_YrNNyvpSaVS_X9MD-TA8fkPN7Jl2SdoQQkpBchpRg7XpOrZLkRAXU1W9h3IYTC9qVdrwNDgoQfdk1JGO-MXg46cM0tLrarZ3m1SgpSy01I3f7xzTvdaeW-cgrZSLc1c9tR87RzLSku49g-lxu9bHexayjtX3d8KxgrG8zyb6HykM99ewXjHG_YU5grGI4u8HiWL18UfQZvDnC-R-Rl5YY-xCOQksBT0L1HWRFhEOnJmFMcrIUcSJyaRfEQ5tKYb6mTn98khcNZ9pdrnhhx-tpXfvvpY-A4AAP__PrFuVQ) into Russian territory, a move that prompted Putin to lower his threshold for nuclear weapon use. The United States also announced it will provide Ukraine with [antipersonnel land mines](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D9vwyAUBPBPY29EPP4zMHTJlq4drQd-TmixHQFJlG9fuXvHn046ne7rMl0wl7xdP3Gl0Jd9ElwoBsAETDPm8p7UOIeFSJAcKYCVApzz1o-3MFOyEXnUDhX3cnFaUnTEvUyoQdkxh6MNQACANGBOOsUYjTUqJR-V4IPiNOe-19P3nrd-o6W89yfVU9rXsYRb7_c2yI9BnAdxxvtGr3ZEB2rPqdAgzvXRWkb2-KmYN2IvrOzRGK0RW3sf3PJ2ZdJ6JxYtPGq5uBkNaQ1RARhnvVZ-rGG-v3IpuRk7KH5dMZe_Gf2_W55B_AYAAP__NXtjBg) as part of a new $275 million military aid package, with Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin saying the mines will counter Russia's infantry-led advances. Russia has bolstered its forces with [11,000 North Korean soldiers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1ugzAUhZ_GbEbca8LP4CELW7J06IhsfIFbHDsyTlDevkrVpUOnc85y9On7vIwXw57DcjU30nmOI1ZYSwCJMDrD_jXWhdMzEZIqSEOrELqub_ti1cqqCTs3V7PrJwDrLDSmNxbgVENXqYL1-w0AAUA10JSnyVrbtE09Tb2tsRJ1RY5zTOVX5JBXmv0rPimVU7wVXq8533ehzgIHgcNxHKWjmcJO5RKfAocrHftvyI8cE9N7nlPmydOfpvqmQ1UJHEJMeZVbTGSCzCnG-y4pZEpye6R9k8dKieRjS4YDm7BLk0jOvKyZwyJwKJJ294O9571pRV0tN8P-hzf_5--p8TsAAP__BXxzkg), according to U.S., Ukrainian, and South Korean officials. Officials say both sides are maneuvering for position ahead of President-elect Donald Trump taking office.
## Gaetz Report to Remain Sealed
The controversial [report on former Rep. Matt Gaetz](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j71u7CAQRp8GOiwzsLYpKG7jbm-b0uJnvCaCxTKTtTZPHzl9uk_6pHN0Pu7L3aWcno__rqCltS7QgxZSCpBLdCm_F82jXREBFUcrRwVymsxo-GZvRkWnPYA3AZ0Ze6-UC5OZ4i3ENSJP9qJJCVJKNcihuwXv_TAOOgTjNfRM9xgT1aP7rOlJG675XV94dKEWnu1GtDem_jGYGczneXbBtyee7foZzNdkMG_1q6FA2lJoItRSEhGiKI5IPBzStzhwrwcxmPlh436mnFMbRqb7R3Ep_9ror_qXhZ8AAAD__9CYXik) will remain sealed after the House Ethics Committee failed to reach an agreement on its release during Wednesday's meeting. The 10-member panel, [evenly split between parties](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O4yAURp_G7oi4gMEUFNuky7ZbWvzc67DCxsIk2ezTjzL9lJ8-6ejo_LktN59L3tfffkPXqS6CC8UAmIAl-VzeixqTI0SBckQHRgqYZ2vseHdkZICIKPkUQRFx44lwlsQNpqjTmN2HBiAAQGrQlymGELTRKkYblOCD4phyr-3yt-a935HKuz6xXWLdxuLuvR_nIH8N4jqIqz92fJ2f6zNaz7HgIK6rx_6f9fbYDuZ7r23HN1txx-YLO_Hfwxe25TPWPT1iZxPZqGcVgrZTIlAyIFGgmeykA7dxbC4dr1xKPrUZFF83n8u3T_-pz9OJrwAAAP__SIZpGQ), considered the issue in a lengthy closed-door meeting, but no details were released on how members voted. The committee agreed to reconsider the decision on Dec. 5. Democratic Rep. Sean Casten [responded to the committee’s decision](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOqzAQheGnsTtHnsEYKFzchi633RLZZohnZTACJ1H26VdJv92RjvQV_9d1unrOvN3--5VcXcqEGo0CUAjT7Dm_JiNntxAhNZIcdA1C3w_dIJMbDPTeL402i46BiEIg0_ZgPTW2tSDZvTUABIDGgr20MYRgO2tiHIJBLYymmWs5Lt-Ft5poya_yoOMSyyqzS7Xup2j-CRwFjjVR4pzfn8AxlZU2ep6feT9J4NhqrQetVfRnpU3dPNUfRTVxPNVBezmq2u8hcxQ4ysPN-5Nz5tN2wujb6vlDy_pXhofD3wAAAP__Rf1fQg) by announcing plans to introduce a motion to force a full House vote on releasing the report.
## Calls Grow for Biden to Resign
Calls for President Joe Biden to resign have grown [amid increasing concerns](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO6yAQQNGvgY4IBoztguI17vLaLS1sxmFWGCJAjvL3q2y_9ZVOcb_u691Tovz47090_SgrSDBCKQFqDZ7SezU8uAMRUHN0atSgpmkeZx7dpK1BOfkBTPDHoeUhR2-Mn3UIo4WZk_toSoFSSltlb8O-bZsdrdn3eTMgmZEYqJd6-y6Ue8QjvcuF9baXkycXe382pv8xWBgsPWKklD6NwRLLiRlfjcFyYiDPYBmklIOcxEYBs6jY6JF9p5LFs6TUOlaRfUfRKF1YGSy8uvB8UUrU7MiMfJyefn3e_3pxOfgJAAD__8HGYL8) about his age, mental fitness, and competency in the final two months of his administration. Well-known pollster [Nate Silver called for Biden's](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPozAQhX-N6QbhwZikcJGGLnfllcjgIcytsZHthM2_X7Hadqv3pE96evr-3ce7Zc_h8cduZMoSR2xQgZSAcnSW_XtUlTMLEVJbkZF9i_JyufbXajXaqqbRvXZ92ylrL5PWKFuH2LW6o0VXbM41KVFK2Wqp626epkn3Ws3zdVLYCNWQ4xJT_T9yKCst_h1flOo5bpU3ayl7Fu1N4CBwOI6j3nI4mcCBAjyzwCHQccYePReef6rPhRIEWwgy-xclmK33GZaYYGJHAUqERJkfAXjbyLEt5N-w2Q-C1abEGfaTOwpF4GAT3G7ymf8-P6tk3H6w95x1L1Tz2Cz777_lN38vg18BAAD___-adI0) resignation in a Wednesday social media post, questioning whether Vice President Kamala Harris would be better suited to handle the high-stakes war in Ukraine. Jamal Simmons, a former Harris communications director, suggested Biden could [salvage his legacy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOnDAQhJ_GdHuyF5_hCoqLIro_TYoo1cnYC2xkbGSbQ_f2EelTzUgjfdJ8v75eX5YDx-WH3Wioc3qhRA1KAaqXtxw-L934YSZCahsaVNei6vtH92jWQd4Jeznj9Ji8dJ3pFRp_l0Y6YzUp3fBw0ZRCpVRrlLnd3TRNpjPaucekUQotyXNN-fYncawrzeGT3pRvLm1NGNZa9yLap8BR4Hie520r8doEjhThKALHSOcVewpc2V11Yk8RzpUrwZqOQlAq2a3ARYZyLAuVyinCSuBh4bnCanPmAjbCEcnmSB72TOUCuY_A0WZ4PlX93eletGNy7EX7_duljc7yk_Le5MHvJ4fAxXRCy2WzHP69qP-z-h7wbwAAAP__hSh7gQ) by resigning and allowing Harris to serve as the nation's first female president. The White House [pushed back against the idea](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuhDAQBb_GdEZ44QwULtLQXdqUaLEXvImxT9g5cn8fXVKlSDsaPT3N23W-IgeO2yvuZMqaZmigk0pJULNDDo-5q5xZiYDaiozqW1DDMPZj5Q255oI4gh60xXF1lxUHtzSDdivoRdmKzXNNKVBKtVrp-mKXZdG97qwdlw4a0TXkuKSjfk8ci6c1PNKdjtqmvQrGl3LLon0RMAmYzvOsT8ye41ZSpC_cOf6qAqZIZ346ngtJnz4zCZhaAD2O8JfLXAj3LC2GIBd2FOVBmbcod_wg6fE4OMvbkzmKRcBUHcbdTg6Bs-5F12w7cvi5WP5LdjfwHQAA__97zXCG) that Biden might resign and questioned whether Americans would accept Harris taking over for the final 10 weeks of his term.

➤ **Denver Nuggets** point guard Russell Westbrook became the first player in NBA history to record 200 triple-doubles, a single-game basketball feat where a player reaches a double-digit number in three different statistical categories. On this day in 1976, , starring Sylvester Stallone as the underdog prizefighter Rocky Balboa, debuted in New York City. The film was a massive box-office hit. Did you know that Sylvester Stallone was inspired to write the screenplay for Rocky after witnessing unknown boxer knock Muhammad Ali down in the ninth round of their 1975 fight? Today, we're sponsored by , offering financial advice to protect your retirement savings. | U.S. Shuts Ukraine Embassy on War's 1,001st Day The after warnings of potential Russian air attacks on the Ukrainian capital. The precautionary closure followed Tuesday's events, when Ukraine fired into Russian territory, a move that prompted Putin to lower his threshold for nuclear weapon use. The United States also announced it will provide Ukraine with as part of a new $275 million military aid package, with Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin saying the mines will counter Russia's infantry-led advances. Russia has bolstered its forces with , according to U.S., Ukrainian, and South Korean officials. Officials say both sides are maneuvering for position ahead of President-elect Donald Trump taking office. Gaetz Report to Remain Sealed The controversial will remain sealed after the House Ethics Committee failed to reach an agreement on its release during Wednesday's meeting. The 10-member panel, , considered the issue in a lengthy closed-door meeting, but no details were released on how members voted. The committee agreed to reconsider the decision on Dec. 5. Democratic Rep. Sean Casten by announcing plans to introduce a motion to force a full House vote on releasing the report. Calls Grow for Biden to Resign Calls for President Joe Biden to resign have grown about his age, mental fitness, and competency in the final two months of his administration. Well-known pollster resignation in a Wednesday social media post, questioning whether Vice President Kamala Harris would be better suited to handle the high-stakes war in Ukraine. Jamal Simmons, a former Harris communications director, suggested Biden could by resigning and allowing Harris to serve as the nation's first female president. The White House that Biden might resign and questioned whether Americans would accept Harris taking over for the final 10 weeks of his term. | ➤ Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu offered $5 million to any Gaza resident who returns a hostage, while the U.S. vetoed a U.N. resolution calling for an immediate cease-fire, citing its lack of connection to hostages' release. () ➤ Speaker Mike Johnson announced a new U.S. Capitol bathroom policy Wednesday, reserving single-sex bathrooms for people of that biological sex. The move comes amid controversy over Rep.-elect Sarah McBride, a biological male who identifies as a woman. Johnson noted private restrooms are available for members, and unisex facilities exist. name: History Facts
subject: “Sense and Sensibility” wasn’t originally credited to Jane Austen
body:
Even though Sense and Sensibility now ranks as one of the most beloved novels in English literature — and Jane Austen as one of the most famous writers of all time — the book’s first edition, released as three volumes in 1811, was originally published without the author’s name. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68bfz94wkc5r25dvwb7844oowfn8earq7bz3y04lwc1l49luunwgfbedpi9j3mnngyajpdvzh403i3pdez7yzy38xd8kk0ji7l4mxikoq1mrnei9qr8oevybliglkc7i170jmit0z9y589wp7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snava1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [“Sense and Sensibility” was originally credited as being written “By a Lady.”](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snava1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snava1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snava1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| E ven though _Sense and Sensibility_ now ranks as one of the most beloved novels in English literature — and Jane Austen as one of the most famous writers of all time — the book’s first edition, released as three volumes in 1811, was originally published without the author’s name. During the time Austen lived and wrote, it was common for women to use pseudonyms or publish anonymously,__ and _Sense and Sensibility_ [was credited](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snava1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) as being written simply “By a Lady” on the title page.
---
Growing up in the village of Steventon in Hampshire, England, Austen took measures to hide her beloved writing hobby from society, even though her family encouraged her from a young age. Her father believed in her talent and, early on, tried — but failed — to secure a publisher for the manuscript that eventually became _Pride and Prejudice_. When Austen was about 19 years old, she began working on _Elinor and Marianne_ , a novel about the lives and romantic pursuits of the Dashwood sisters. Austen eventually renamed the completed manuscript _Sense and Sensibility_ , and in 1810, Thomas Egerton of London’s Military Library publishing house agreed to publish it.
The book was a big success, selling out its first print run in less than two years. Yet Austen’s next novel, _Pride and Prejudice_ , was also published without her name: It was credited as “By the author of _Sense and Sensibility._ ” Although by that point her identity had already become an open secret among those in the know, Jane Austen’s name didn’t appear on any of her books until after her death.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snava1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snava1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
Thank you for supporting our advertisers!
---
| [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1wbmisw9fj44hb32l98j1oa7aq85x7bg10lu39fbh5wzvt5hbfpllud2lhf8dg1uvpyeqll2y5oq0r7sqen6urct5mm6ktii1dw0ybukq06c3qdq1v3j2qkt8sksni5ii5rxn36rbljc8pl660tq8d6pg2mjdu90cc4pl9xfz1zxdju4pcg0o60wtitokayqpdr47p5bmsc6nk2tg1wv0skjr4234y2vguazo1yianftis8olh4icdg5t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snava1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---

| Book reviews Jane Austen received in her lifetime

| | Percentage of British novels published anonymously between 1770 and 1820
---
75%

---

| Academy Awards won by the 1995 film _Sense and Sensibility_(Best Adapted Screenplay)

| | | Did you know?
---|---|---
## Jane Austen’s first novel was almost published eight years before “Sense and Sensibility.”
_Northanger Abbey_ was one of two Jane Austen novels published five months after the author’s death, but it was supposed to come out 14 years earlier — eight years before Austen’s debut novel, _Sense and Sensibility_. Austen completed the manuscript, originally titled _Susan_ , between [1798 and 1799](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snava1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), when she was in her early 20s. In 1803, her brother Henry helped negotiate the £10 sale of the manuscript to London publisher Crosby and Co.; an advertisement announcing _Susan_ ’s release appeared soon after, but the book never did. In 1816, the publisher sold the manuscript back to Henry for its original price, and Austen went about making revisions to the novel, including changing the working title to _Catherine_. It was ultimately renamed _Northanger Abbey_ and released in a four-volume set with the novel _Persuasion_ shortly after Austen’s death in 1817.
Thank you for supporting our advertisers!
---
| [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1wbmisw9fj44hb32l98j1oa7aq85x7bg11ptxj7lw7h8l1607rqrdhvr8ied56q8hx95z7zss3dpf1fbm4dtb579af5w9ltk155fyg5o7ik6wm78qg1kq1ahwmugcale34leud2oar0ntu152lawhn9cattjh4ex3wcgoaoo5q18u1qosx6t7zod50rvsi90fv616caszf3biqx97y34mznr53qp0he3sbm92zc2494ico5ha2x5tggxu&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snava1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---

clean_body: Even though Sense and Sensibility now ranks as one of the most beloved novels in English literature — and Jane Austen as one of the most famous writers of all time — the book’s first edition, released as three volumes in 1811, was originally published without the author’s name. | E ven though Sense and Sensibility now ranks as one of the most beloved novels in English literature — and Jane Austen as one of the most famous writers of all time — the book’s first edition, released as three volumes in 1811, was originally published without the author’s name. During the time Austen lived and wrote, it was common for women to use pseudonyms or publish anonymously, and Sense and Sensibility as being written simply “By a Lady” on the title page. Growing up in the village of Steventon in Hampshire, England, Austen took measures to hide her beloved writing hobby from society, even though her family encouraged her from a young age. Her father believed in her talent and, early on, tried — but failed — to secure a publisher for the manuscript that eventually became Pride and Prejudice. When Austen was about 19 years old, she began working on Elinor and Marianne , a novel about the lives and romantic pursuits of the Dashwood sisters. Austen eventually renamed the completed manuscript Sense and Sensibility , and in 1810, Thomas Egerton of London’s Military Library publishing house agreed to publish it. The book was a big success, selling out its first print run in less than two years. Yet Austen’s next novel, Pride and Prejudice , was also published without her name: It was credited as “By the author of Sense and Sensibility. ” Although by that point her identity had already become an open secret among those in the know, Jane Austen’s name didn’t appear on any of her books until after her death. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Completed novels written by Jane Austen 6 | | Book reviews Jane Austen received in her lifetime 12 | Book reviews Jane Austen received in her lifetime 12 | | Percentage of British novels published anonymously between 1770 and 1820 75% | | Academy Awards won by the 1995 film Sense and Sensibility(Best Adapted Screenplay) 1 | Academy Awards won by the 1995 film Sense and Sensibility(Best Adapted Screenplay) 1 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Jane Austen’s first novel was almost published eight years before “Sense and Sensibility.” Northanger Abbey was one of two Jane Austen novels published five months after the author’s death, but it was supposed to come out 14 years earlier — eight years before Austen’s debut novel, Sense and Sensibility. Austen completed the manuscript, originally titled Susan , between , when she was in her early 20s. In 1803, her brother Henry helped negotiate the £10 sale of the manuscript to London publisher Crosby and Co.; an advertisement announcing Susan ’s release appeared soon after, but the book never did. In 1816, the publisher sold the manuscript back to Henry for its original price, and Austen went about making revisions to the novel, including changing the working title to Catherine. It was ultimately renamed Northanger Abbey and released in a four-volume set with the novel Persuasion shortly after Austen’s death in 1817. The Tippah County Republican Executive Committee fully supports the Mississippi Republican Party Platform. We believe that the ideals and policies it outlines are the best path forward for all Mississippians. The objectives listed below represent critical issues that must be addressed by the Mississippi legislature and our local governments to ensure a brighter future for our community and state.
* **School Choice** - The Tippah County Republican Executive Committee firmly believes that parents are best equipped to decide how to educate their children. By advocating for and passing legislation that empowers parents to choose the best schools for their children, we can ensure that every child in Mississippi has access to the highest quality education possible.
* **Stop Medicaid Expansion** - As a rural community, the citizens of Tippah County are all too familiar with the challenges of accessing healthcare for themselves and their families. We recognize that expanding Medicaid will not solve the problems facing rural hospitals or improve rural healthcare. Extending taxpayer-funded insurance to able-bodied adults only diverts critical resources away from those who truly need them. Instead, we believe that repealing Certificate of Need (CON) laws will more effectively address the healthcare challenges in our community, offering better options and improving care for our citizens.
* **Civil Asset Forfeiture Reform** \- Civil asset forfeiture is an unconstitutional practice that allows law enforcement to seize property or assets from individuals merely **suspected** of criminal activity, even without charges or a conviction. This blatant violation of constitutional rights must end. We must ensure that the rights of our citizens are fully protected, and no one's property is taken without due process.
* **Lower Taxes** - We believe that individuals, not the government, are best equipped to decide how to spend their own money. When people keep more of their hard-earned income, the free market thrives, leading to job creation and economic growth. We fully support the continued elimination of state income taxes without raising other fees or taxes, and this principle should also guide local governments and school boards. In this time of runaway inflation, when families are facing unprecedented financial hardship, any tax increase by a government entity only adds to the burden, making it harder to live, work, and raise a family in our community.
* **Illegal Immigration** - We believe our county is the best in the world, offering unmatched opportunities for success. We strongly support **legal immigration** because hardworking individuals from around the globe enrich our community and contribute to our shared prosperity. However, we firmly oppose **illegal immigration** and any effort by local or state officials to use public funds to shelter, support, or encourage it. Across the nation, we've seen the harmful impacts caused by officials who have allowed this in their communities, and we will not stand for similar actions in our county.
* **Voter Integrity** - Fair elections are crucial to our nation and must be protected. Prioritizing legislation that requires proof of citizenship and residency for voter registration is essential. We believe local election commissioners should collaborate with the Secretary of State to ensure that our elections are fair and accurate.

**Read all of Dana 's post and stay informed about politics in Mississippi**
[Pledge your support](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFuYWNyaXN3ZWxsLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.EtdiJtg81uqChETFLnM9Pw0os06LzRNrIU1PhbRUm4w?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151970885)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 11/21/2024
body:
Are Colorado Democrats justified in fearing a Trump comeback, or is a reality check needed?
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Good morning, readers!
A second Trump presidency has sparked significant concerns among some Colorado Democrats, citing fears over federal overreach, social policy rollbacks and economic instability. Left-leaning Colorado news media and Democrat politicians are sparing no time and revving up the fear-mongering engine. Are Colorado Democrats justified in fearing a Trump comeback, or is a [reality check needed](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)?
**Here in Colorado:** Discover why Colorado is paying $1.5 million in the [same-sex wedding websites case](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and explore how voters are navigating civic engagement amid [left-wing media narratives](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Also, Colorado continues to shape national policy, with Chris Wright's appointment as [Secretary of Energy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) solidifying the state's influence in Washington.

**On the national stage:** Updates on the sentencing in the [tragic Laken Riley case](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and Trump’s efforts to [restore governmental priorities]() in his new term. House Speaker Mike Johnson has mandated that [only women may access women’s bathrooms](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) on Capitol Hill, following a similar proposal by Rep. Nancy Mace. And lastly, read about how voters nationwide [pushed past biased coverage](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) during the 2024 elections.

**In the recent Trump draft:** Former Acting Attorney General Matt Whitaker will represent the U.S. as [NATO ambassador](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), and Linda McMahon is tapped to lead (or rather, take down) the [Department of Education](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).

Let’s dive in and stay informed! This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, November 21, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Schumann: Are Colorado Democrats justified in fearing a Trump comeback, or is a reality check needed?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
A second Trump presidency has sparked significant concerns among some Colorado Democrats. They cite fears over federal overreach, social policy rollbacks and economic instability.
Left-leaning Colorado news media and Democrat politicians are sparing no time and revving up the fear-mongering engine.
Last week, Gov. Polis and his co-chair received national attention for launching “Governors Safeguarding Democracy” to fight against President Trump’s policies.
Polis stated, “We want to make sure that the American people can be certain that the elections are safe, that the separation of the courts and powers is safe, and that governors exert the powers that we have as states to make sure that we can protect freedoms and make sure that no federal government can get in the way of our constitutional rights.”
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Colorado to pay $1.5 million in same-sex wedding websites case](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado has agreed to pay $1.5 million in attorneys’ fees following the Supreme Court's ruling in favor of Lorie Smith, a graphic designer who opposed creating wedding websites for same-sex couples, citing violations of her First Amendment rights.
* The Supreme Court decision concluded that the Colorado Anti-Discrimination Act (CADA) unlawfully compelled speech, protecting Smith's right to refuse work based on her beliefs, while critics argue this ruling threatens public marketplace equality.
* The case highlights ongoing debates over the balance between anti-discrimination laws and free speech rights, as Colorado continues to enforce its long-standing commitment to equal access in public accommodations.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Jose Ibarra found guilty of killing Georgia nursing student Laken Riley](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE DAILY WIRE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Jose Ibarra was found guilty on all counts, including murder and kidnapping, for the brutal killing of Georgia nursing student Laken Riley. The trial concluded with a bench verdict delivered by Judge Patrick Haggard.
* Key evidence included Ibarra’s DNA under Riley’s fingernails, his fingerprints on her phone, and surveillance footage showing him disposing of a bloody jacket. Prosecutor Sheila Ross emphasized the compelling nature of this evidence.
* Testimony linked Ibarra to a violent Venezuelan gang, Tren de Aragua, and his brother identified him as the suspect in surveillance footage. Ibarra now faces life in prison for his crimes.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[House Speaker bans men from women’s bathrooms on Capitol Hill](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE POST MILLENNIAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* House Speaker Mike Johnson has mandated that women-only spaces, including restrooms and locker rooms, on Capitol Hill are reserved exclusively for biological women, emphasizing the importance of maintaining single-sex facilities.
* South Carolina Representative Nancy Mace initiated the push for this regulation after expressing concerns about privacy and safety in light of a trans representative's election.
* The ruling sparked significant backlash, with some activists accusing the policy of discrimination, while supporters argue it safeguards women’s rights to private spaces.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Gaines: Colorado newsrooms promote left-wing ‘civic engagement’](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY CORY GAINES, [COMPLETE COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_Wanting to support your community and get civically engaged? Do you also like warm cookies? I suppose the Venn Diagram for these two things would likely show a lot of overlap. I’m right there in the middle anyway._
_In what is surely a startling coincidence–how could it be otherwise?–two articles appeared within 5 days of each other in Colorado Public Radio and the Colorado Sun. The former ostensibly telling people how to get involved in their communities, and the latter a glowing profile of a nonprofit focused on civic engagement. Both, of course, have at their center the group Warm Cookies of the Revolution. Friendly and homey name, no?_
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Baldauf: Voters ignored biased perspective of broadcast and print news in ’24 election](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY MICHAEL BALDAUF, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_Have you ever found yourself in a group where you discovered the leader was corrupt? Maybe it was a church, where the pastor was not living the message, or a volunteer organization, where the leaders were taking advantage of their positions._
_I would guess if you could not do anything to correct the situation you probably got away._
_People ask me why I don’t watch national newscasts on broadcast television anymore. The answer is the same. For about 40 years they have demonstrated that they are not interested in being a source for unbiased reporting. The latest Gallop Poll found that almost 70 percent of the public said they do not trust the media._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Dickenson: From the Rockies to the Beltway, Colorado’s influence in Washington](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY TIFFANY DICKENSON, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_Colorado has long punched above its weight in shaping national policy, and this administration is no different. With the appointment of Chris Wright as Secretary of Energy, our state once again finds itself in a key position of influence in Washington, D.C._
_Our state has a proud history of representation at the highest levels of government. Through the years, several Coloradans have taken the lead on national issues, leaving a legacy of strong, values-driven leadership._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
