A second Trump presidency has sparked significant concerns among some Colorado Democrats, citing fears over federal overreach, social policy rollbacks and economic instability. Left-leaning Colorado news media and Democrat politicians are sparing no time and revving up the fear-mongering engine. Are Colorado Democrats justified in fearing a Trump comeback, or is a ? Here in Colorado: Discover why Colorado is paying $1.5 million in the and explore how voters are navigating civic engagement amid . Also, Colorado continues to shape national policy, with Chris Wright's appointment as solidifying the state's influence in Washington. On the national stage: Updates on the sentencing in the and Trump’s efforts to [restore governmental priorities]() in his new term. House Speaker Mike Johnson has mandated that on Capitol Hill, following a similar proposal by Rep. Nancy Mace. And lastly, read about how voters nationwide during the 2024 elections. In the recent Trump draft: Former Acting Attorney General Matt Whitaker will represent the U.S. as , and Linda McMahon is tapped to lead (or rather, take down) the . Let’s dive in and stay informed! This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, November 21, 2024. – Heidi Ganahl | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY JEN SCHUMANN, A second Trump presidency has sparked significant concerns among some Colorado Democrats. They cite fears over federal overreach, social policy rollbacks and economic instability. Left-leaning Colorado news media and Democrat politicians are sparing no time and revving up the fear-mongering engine. Last week, Gov. Polis and his co-chair received national attention for launching “Governors Safeguarding Democracy” to fight against President Trump’s policies. Polis stated, “We want to make sure that the American people can be certain that the elections are safe, that the separation of the courts and powers is safe, and that governors exert the powers that we have as states to make sure that we can protect freedoms and make sure that no federal government can get in the way of our constitutional rights.” | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | Colorado has agreed to pay $1.5 million in attorneys’ fees following the Supreme Court's ruling in favor of Lorie Smith, a graphic designer who opposed creating wedding websites for same-sex couples, citing violations of her First Amendment rights. The Supreme Court decision concluded that the Colorado Anti-Discrimination Act (CADA) unlawfully compelled speech, protecting Smith's right to refuse work based on her beliefs, while critics argue this ruling threatens public marketplace equality. The case highlights ongoing debates over the balance between anti-discrimination laws and free speech rights, as Colorado continues to enforce its long-standing commitment to equal access in public accommodations. | Jose Ibarra was found guilty on all counts, including murder and kidnapping, for the brutal killing of Georgia nursing student Laken Riley. The trial concluded with a bench verdict delivered by Judge Patrick Haggard. Key evidence included Ibarra’s DNA under Riley’s fingernails, his fingerprints on her phone, and surveillance footage showing him disposing of a bloody jacket. Prosecutor Sheila Ross emphasized the compelling nature of this evidence. Testimony linked Ibarra to a violent Venezuelan gang, Tren de Aragua, and his brother identified him as the suspect in surveillance footage. Ibarra now faces life in prison for his crimes. | House Speaker Mike Johnson has mandated that women-only spaces, including restrooms and locker rooms, on Capitol Hill are reserved exclusively for biological women, emphasizing the importance of maintaining single-sex facilities. South Carolina Representative Nancy Mace initiated the push for this regulation after expressing concerns about privacy and safety in light of a trans representative's election. Both, of course, have at their center the group Warm Cookies of the Revolution. name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Slams Healey and Wu for Prioritizing Politics Over Public Safety Amid Arrests of Criminal Illegal Immigrants
body:
| | | | |
---
| [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sTIE5qkmHfYlVTMEVe_iAfbqiNx8yA0I5oD8dobjwMk3YTcDNVJAUhmbj9SrVzLfyROZdJHO2OBwOELzztHn9dLjD2AlpcToMCOTqXx1Aa1ibFWYFup9rsiNZ3ivbCqdrfp8O2HUPS92vPFvrYyokw==&c=riuVlzebbaaX2nrlyfB41J-hGvQz_iK5q5I1azXDQ26b7xE-rTn5mw==&ch=JZTTYsA7T5BrvcTg0S8UYHN6IkrE-BrSpmqUm8br1G9SuJnP32VVLA==)
---
| MassGOP Slams Healey and Wu for Prioritizing Politics Over Public Safety Amid Arrests of Criminal Illegal Immigrants
---
---
| Boston, MA-Yesterday, ERO Boston announced the arrest of three illegal immigrants who have been charged with child rape in Massachusetts. This development comes just days after Governor Maura Healey and Mayor Michelle Wu doubled down on their refusal to work with ICE and federal authorities to deport criminal illegal immigrants. Both leaders have cited "public safety" as their rationale for refusing to cooperate with ICE, a stance that leaves these dangerous individuals in our communities.
MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale issued a sharp rebuke of these extreme positions, stating:
"It's appalling and disgusting that the Governor of Massachusetts and the Mayor of Boston, the largest city in our state, are prioritizing appeasing the most radical elements of their political base over the safety of Massachusetts residents. Parents across the Commonwealth are horrified that individuals charged with such serious crimes are allowed to roam free because local authorities refuse to work with ICE to remove these criminals from our streets."
Carnevale continued:
"Massachusetts residents have had enough. These harrowing incidents are becoming far too frequent. When our state's top leaders go on television to proclaim that Massachusetts will protect illegal immigrants and refuse to cooperate with ICE, they send a dangerous message that invites more of this behavior into our communities. By doing so, they are complicit in the chaos that follows. It's time for Democrats to put politics aside and work with federal authorities to end this alarming pattern in Massachusetts."
Massachusetts families deserve better. It's time for real leadership that prioritizes public safety over political posturing.
###
---
---

name: Amanda Chase
subject: Details for the Republican Senate District 10 Special Election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
| | | |
SPECIAL ELECTION TO BE HELD (tentative as of 11/19/24)
WHEN? THURS, DEC 12, 2024
WHERE? to be determined
---
---
| As of today, there will be a Republican Special Election to fill the state senate seat to be vacated by John McGuire. This Republican nomination will most likely take place on the evening of Thursday, December 12. Registration will begin at 5:30pm and you must be in line before 6:30pm sharp to vote. The location will be determined next week but will be in one location. So please mark your calendar. This will be a process similar to the convention you participated in almost a year ago.
As it stands, if you would like to vote for me, you:
1. Must live in Senate District 10
2. Be a registered voter
3. Be willing to drive to the voting location to be determined on November 26, by the Senate committee, which is hopefully centrally located in Senate District 10.
4. Know that after you vote the first time, we really need you to stick around if you can through the last round of voting.
5. Just bring your driver's license to vote.

If you do live in the district and plan to vote for me, would you please kindly reply to this email with your name, county, cell and email address? We want to keep an accurate count of who is supporting me.
Many of you have expressed concerns about this Special Election being held on a weeknight. That is not a decision that I supported, but one made by the Senate District 10 Committee. I've included their contact email for those to express their concerns.
So please save the date for the evening of Thursday, December 12. We will have the location next week.
Will you please commit to voting for me no matter what obstacle comes our way?
Your commitment on this one day will determine who represents you in the Virginia Senate for the next 3 years.
The Senate District 10 committee is scheduled to have a 2nd meeting on Tuesday, November 26 at 6pm at the Goochland County Administration Building. We will know the location at that time.
I truly hope Republican leadership intervenes before we have hundreds of people try to participate in the process and instead are turned away. We need to avoid that at all cost. We want to grow the Republican Party.
This is exactly why I voted to make these confusing party processes that limit voter participation and frustrate voters illegal. I was successful. Effective this past July, these practices were made illegal with the exception of Special Elections.
The Senate District 10 Committee chose a Republican Mass Meeting. This should be a quicker process than the Republican Convention 2 years ago.
The first candidate running who receives 50% plus one percent of the votes is declared the winner. So there could potentially be multiple rounds of voting to declare victory.
My hope is that enough of my supporters come out to vote so that we win on the first round of voting.
Please share the word about the Special Election with all of you conservative neighbors and friends who live in Senate District 10, so the process goes more quickly.
Senate District 10 includes Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Hanover, Powhatan and the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico County.
As many of you know, I've always supported primaries, because they allow voters to quickly cast their vote and then be on their way. However, that option is not available with Special Elections.
---
|
---
We the People made a difference in November and now we have an opportunity to make a difference in December. Be determined to vote no matter what.
Most importantly, please stay tuned. My experience with party processes is that the information changes continually. So from now through our Republican Special Election, please be vigilant about checking your emails so you will have the most recent information.

---
|
# SENATE DISTRICT 10 COMMITTEE
---
| Many of you have asked who is on the committee that makes the decision to the chose the details of this Republican Special Election.

clean_body: | | | | SPECIAL ELECTION TO BE HELD (tentative as of 11/19/24) WHEN? THURS, DEC 12, 2024 WHERE? to be determined | As of today, there will be a Republican Special Election to fill the state senate seat to be vacated by John McGuire. This Republican nomination will most likely take place on the evening of Thursday, December 12. Registration will begin at 5:30pm and you must be in line before 6:30pm sharp to vote. The location will be determined next week but will be in one location. So please mark your calendar. This will be a process similar to the convention you participated in almost a year ago. As it stands, if you would like to vote for me, you: 1. Must live in Senate District 10 2. Be a registered voter 3. Be willing to drive to the voting location to be determined on November 26, by the Senate committee, which is hopefully centrally located in Senate District 10. 4. Know that after you vote the first time, we really need you to stick around if you can through the last round of voting. 5. Just bring your driver's license to vote. If you do live in the district and plan to vote for me, would you please kindly reply to this email with your name, county, cell and email address? We want to keep an accurate count of who is supporting me. Many of you have expressed concerns about this Special Election being held on a weeknight. That is not a decision that I supported, but one made by the Senate District 10 Committee. I've included their contact email for those to express their concerns. So please save the date for the evening of Thursday, December 12. We will have the location next week. Will you please commit to voting for me no matter what obstacle comes our way? Your commitment on this one day will determine who represents you in the Virginia Senate for the next 3 years. The Senate District 10 committee is scheduled to have a 2nd meeting on Tuesday, November 26 at 6pm at the Goochland County Administration Building. We will know the location at that time. I truly hope Republican leadership intervenes before we have hundreds of people try to participate in the process and instead are turned away. We need to avoid that at all cost. We want to grow the Republican Party. This is exactly why I voted to make these confusing party processes that limit voter participation and frustrate voters illegal. I was successful. Effective this past July, these practices were made illegal with the exception of Special Elections. The Senate District 10 Committee chose a Republican Mass Meeting. This should be a quicker process than the Republican Convention 2 years ago. The first candidate running who receives 50% plus one percent of the votes is declared the winner. So there could potentially be multiple rounds of voting to declare victory. My hope is that enough of my supporters come out to vote so that we win on the first round of voting. Please share the word about the Special Election with all of you conservative neighbors and friends who live in Senate District 10, so the process goes more quickly. Senate District 10 includes Amelia, Appomattox, Buckingham, Cumberland, Prince Edward, Fluvanna, Goochland, Louisa, Hanover, Powhatan and the Shady Grove precinct in Henrico County. As many of you know, I've always supported primaries, because they allow voters to quickly cast their vote and then be on their way. However, that option is not available with Special Elections. | We the People made a difference in November and now we have an opportunity to make a difference in December. Be determined to vote no matter what. Most importantly, please stay tuned. My experience with party processes is that the information changes continually. So from now through our Republican Special Election, please be vigilant about checking your emails so you will have the most recent information. | SENATE DISTRICT 10 COMMITTEE | Many of you have asked who is on the committee that makes the decision to the chose the details of this Republican Special Election. | | mailto:reatwilliams@gmail.com | | mailto:phillipamiss@gmail.com | mailto:robin.wolfskill@protonmail.com | | mailto:ramonachristian862@gmail.com | mailto:gopccrc@gmail.com | mailto:dianacshores@gmail.com | mailto:dbyers203@gmail.com | mailto:buddy.bishop@1791.com | mailto:newsletter@hanovergop.com | mailto:unitchairman@henrico.gop | mailto:louisacountygop@gmail.com | mailto:Robinsonadavid@gmail.com | MORE INFORMATION HERE: | == | | == | | | | | | | | | == | | == | Authorized and Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811 | Midlothian, VA 23112 US | | | | | |

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: The coordinated political ambush against Pete Hegseth…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
It’s a disgrace. The SECOND President Trump picked Pete Hegseth as his Secretary of Defense, the Liberal Mob immediately unleashed a coordinated political ambush against him.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrplm4hpk0hqgorac7g1v4bfrdrpam5028a6k48o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs "Majority Leader Steve Scalise")
---

The SECOND President Trump picked Pete Hegseth as his Secretary of Defense, the Liberal Mob immediately unleashed a coordinated political ambush against him.

They had the nerve to say the two-time Bronze Star recipient is unqualified. They minimized his service to our country. They attacked his Christian beliefs. And they even tried claiming his cross tattoo was a symbol of white supremacy.

_AP even fired off a long Fake News hit piece immediately after President Trump nominated him. _

What a disgrace.

We knew that the Democrats and their allies in the Liberal Media would do ANYTHING to derail President Trump's Cabinet confirmations... but this is beyond the pale. That's why I'm rushing to you with an urgent request:

_**[I'm respectfully asking every Strong American Patriot to stand with Pete Hegseth, President Trump, and his allies in the House at this key moment. It'll take ALL OF US to defeat the Liberal Mob once and for all.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zndptgp66fim6h7g9ll74kub5t9c28tojfi2mjrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs "I’m respectfully asking every Strong American Patriot to stand with Pete Hegseth, President Trump, and his allies in the House at this key moment. It’ll take ALL OF US to defeat the Liberal Mob once and for all. ")**_
| | [STAND WITH US](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb0899upsvadkgsj6a5go8bvnogggm27c072993o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs "STAND WITH US")
---

As a Conservative - _and as a man of Faith_ - the political hatchet job against Pete Hegseth infuriates me.

But here's the truth of the matter:

The Democrats are grasping at straws after their humiliating election defeat. Now they're CHARGING AHEAD to sabotage President Trump's second term - starting with his Cabinet appointments.

**That 's why I'm sending this email to every strong American I can reach.** If ONE MILLION Strong Patriotic Americans step up right now, we'll have the power to fight back against the Liberal Mob, the Fake News Media, and their anti-Christian attacks.

_**[I'm personally asking you to step up and join me in this critical fight.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0vls5bkc860fdt5ddh07q173oho6et2aeleoeg8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs "I’m personally asking you to step up and join me in this critical fight.")**_
| [STAND WITH PETE HEGSETH](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1ahkg07v4qq74r432o7lhsvcgevbdp3lae7806g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs "STAND WITH PETE HEGSETH")
---

Thank you. God bless you.
_- Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcnahoec4b35n2j32mr3hjls1pmhv2legir354q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkkn56lh0dcm96dfp9mvsmi9u9ea58aoj3ti9v80_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

name: James =?UTF-8?Q?O=E2=80=99Keefe?=
subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

|
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhjgseekkuss68cm4eotft1eus6lsm272bblreeo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven’t heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I’ve never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to “cancel” me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I’ve ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization’s top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. **[Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z3jbv5g2fbco4s19vutds8s71q79dsagne64o728_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs)**
[Donate](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd0t6dua4311c70d2vsqnk994fskfoc2dv4g8jd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I’ve EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That’s where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand’s _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand’s role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That’s where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for “ _skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_.” **Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos — every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The “Draw My Life” videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand’s shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like “Morals & Markets.”

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand’s philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt’s Gulch Summit, where I spoke!). Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zri6mvudbq7gkebq56ra7chcgqsbrqqog1uifo6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs)
[Donate $35](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1iv7fkh0qgs1bj2bbd2p87cn891f871cpeib9lg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs)
[Donate $50](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl47qkb6vqgnq0ehgnalcu054u8mmcubnik24070_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs)
[Donate $100 ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbpndkh0jt00u7rngi8afvq3gh26qjh3b83dubh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs)
[Donate $250](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl4etgupp9qjgivasm3qc9bjljn2brc82ftg4hko_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs)
[Donate $500](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmfknsi0qftims9mnvq27h0rgsqialdvhc8ngve8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs)
[Donate $1,000](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztha4dcjpno7r0b9ssaepb7asgrj8us2eqbertfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs)
[Donate Any Amount](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjqmcndh1mtp35a7c6uto2m228dgtp4ps5fqkjdo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs) Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr6p7kt9m71aof6au770f1c9f381bgi5f3qr2kt8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs)

Thank you for everything,

James O’Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society’s top student leaders.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn9ctt70sp4j3nk8u28qha0ctg7qi6882oogd7fg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9oopel9tt6ios9nkve7u9072ed9hdp39r2g2bj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i6co72chh2bs)

Thank you,

James

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That’s where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand’s _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand’s role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That’s where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for “ _skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_.” **Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos — every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The “Draw My Life” videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand’s shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like “Morals & Markets.”

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand’s philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt’s Gulch Summit, where I spoke!). Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zfn03c6d9j7pb74s5jfr4879ueftjqcojdvk48u8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr2cdh2bs)
[Donate $35](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zl4t4hlkqbkgqo4pf19k04msu6m2eu0nmfkso380_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr2cdh2bs)
[Donate $50](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zlkkoa1bf5mi7v4p0fp9ibgd4lkre88l21hl0ol0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr2cdh2bs)
[Donate $100 ](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z5orfgv2uilufr9j4pjoid3ida2up13rl08ckeq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr2cdh2bs)
[Donate $250](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zj05ku0dc1531pq02o352c56rlppa1pdb29947o8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr2cdh2bs)
[Donate $500](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z06g4h3b25nsv15ti256k07n6mun1180h6bdm5r0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr2cdh2bs)
[Donate $1,000](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zgqrhn8rt4hhthee5ll401trrvb5ng8vpapscao8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr2cdh2bs)
[Donate Any Amount](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zu1o6gqdj7qgdij5tfpdog4g792afqhkojq7lsug_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr2cdh2bs) Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zinguesd4sv7mp7acvk76p86vbtjovu6riqckjkg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr2cdh2bs)

Thank you for everything,

James O’Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society’s top student leaders.
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zmorq7la696trhnm08srjasi2uskjpjv7iaphpso_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr2cdh2bs) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zoamnqr6rpkruha49jbh69ehf5vneaubk3jeevh0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr2cdh2bs)

Thank you,

James

name: Majority Leader Steve Scalise
subject: The coordinated political ambush against Pete Hegseth…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
It’s a disgrace. The SECOND President Trump picked Pete Hegseth as his Secretary of Defense, the Liberal Mob immediately unleashed a coordinated political ambush against him.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za2eloqshmgbrgi954qoc1r8uk5c2nda0malh6oo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr6c5h2bs "Majority Leader Steve Scalise")
---

The SECOND President Trump picked Pete Hegseth as his Secretary of Defense, the Liberal Mob immediately unleashed a coordinated political ambush against him.

They had the nerve to say the two-time Bronze Star recipient is unqualified. They minimized his service to our country. They attacked his Christian beliefs. And they even tried claiming his cross tattoo was a symbol of white supremacy.

_AP even fired off a long Fake News hit piece immediately after President Trump nominated him. _

What a disgrace.

We knew that the Democrats and their allies in the Liberal Media would do ANYTHING to derail President Trump's Cabinet confirmations... but this is beyond the pale. That's why I'm rushing to you with an urgent request:

_**[I'm respectfully asking every Strong American Patriot to stand with Pete Hegseth, President Trump, and his allies in the House at this key moment. It'll take ALL OF US to defeat the Liberal Mob once and for all.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z77crv5abrcmomvrio46pigscnmiudj7f04ieqto_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr6c5h2bs "I’m respectfully asking every Strong American Patriot to stand with Pete Hegseth, President Trump, and his allies in the House at this key moment. It’ll take ALL OF US to defeat the Liberal Mob once and for all. ")**_
| | [STAND WITH US](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhlgk4jfrtngdnals5uc44i8vpqlkhkill483r90_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr6c5h2bs "STAND WITH US")
---

As a Conservative - _and as a man of Faith_ - the political hatchet job against Pete Hegseth infuriates me.

But here's the truth of the matter:

The Democrats are grasping at straws after their humiliating election defeat. Now they're CHARGING AHEAD to sabotage President Trump's second term - starting with his Cabinet appointments.

**That 's why I'm sending this email to every strong American I can reach.** If ONE MILLION Strong Patriotic Americans step up right now, we'll have the power to fight back against the Liberal Mob, the Fake News Media, and their anti-Christian attacks.

_**[I'm personally asking you to step up and join me in this critical fight.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z73n2v4bhe6ron7paio9ep9hfi4q6cbgm0lbnnlg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr6c5h2bs "I’m personally asking you to step up and join me in this critical fight.")**_
| [STAND WITH PETE HEGSETH](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6gv3tfnpql919gnhkm5begufagfth9lob16k6c0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr6c5h2bs "STAND WITH PETE HEGSETH")
---

Thank you. God bless you.
_- Steve_

**STEVE SCALISE**
House Majority Leader

| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpmt252o9mi24phg6qg0i9qvtqhufhc0ekgm8gr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr6c5h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpp12eh71hdal56hunakvoe9gjk49lsp9oeh09u8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2c9i62pr6c5h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---

name: USO Match Team
subject: Time is running out to MATCH your gift and help provide Thanksgiving meals to service members
body:
Please don't miss your chance to 2X-MATCH your gift for service members ahead of Thanksgiving.
[](https://www.uso.org)
[MATCH YOUR GIFT*](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/_K68Qe_23_hr/ZVpQZzFEUTJBeHR2YlF4UEVCRUd4bEVxVnVpcEQxZ0ttUnppMi9KWUxVbjZ6SmhZRnBEWTVJWVBkWk5Eays0dHo4VnBRRERyRzFCS28rcUsxZkVjVFBrTkp2UDRaS3A0cEJ4TGp5dVAyWm89S0/SEVQaU1VdVhkOGdQMTFiR0p1L1Y4Sm54dWlIb2R2REZhcWNaNVRBaFM3cnpqK3BuQ0xUVG8yYUhhN1dGWmhLZC9na2JhQ0E3cmRPc2RCS2ZTcXE4YUtFNFB3d2pOclNRS0)
---
[The holidays are a lonely time for
service members -- ](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/7P90hV0Z~0Jd/ZVpQZzFEUTJBeHR2YlF4UEVCRUd4bEVxVnVpcEQxZ0ttUnppMi9KWUxVbjZ6SmhZRnBEWTVJWVBkWk5Eays0dHo4VnBRRERyRzFCS28rcUsxZkVjVFBrTkp2UDRaS3A0cEJ4TGp5dVAyWm89S0/SEVQaU1VdVhkOGdQMTFiR0p1L1Y4Sm54dWlIb2R2REZhcWNaNVRBaFM3cnpqK3BuQ0xUVG8yYUhhN1dGWmhLZC9na2JhQ0E3cmRPc2RCS2ZTcXE4YUtFNFB3d2pOclNRS0)
[but your MATCHED support can help them
enjoy a hearty Thanksgiving meal!](https://links.e.uso.)**

[$37.50 MATCHED can help provide a Thanksgiving meal!](https://links.e.uso.)
---
USO Supporter,
With Thanksgiving just a week away, we wanted to ask you: Can you imagine celebrating this holiday _without_ your family, friends or a Thanksgiving meal?
**_Many folks back home don 't realize this, but the holiday season is often the toughest time of year for service members and their families._**
Without the USO and your support, thousands of service members will spend Thanksgiving alone, without anything special to mark the day. For many of them, it's their first time being so far from home; others will miss their child's first Thanksgiving. They _all_ deserve our deepest support during this difficult time of year.
That's why, as we get ready to celebrate Thanksgiving, we're so grateful to the NFL for MATCHING all gifts to provide Thanksgiving meals and other support year-round to our service members at military bases and USO Centers around the world.
**But right now, we 're falling short of our goal, and we need YOU to help us reach it by midnight tonight. [Please give $37.50, $75 or whatever you can to help provide Thanksgiving meals and other critical support to service members around the world throughout the year.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/2dpGh-YrAYSp/ZVpQZzFEUTJBeHR2YlF4UEVCRUd4bEVxVnVpcEQxZ0ttUnppMi9KWUxVbjZ6SmhZRnBEWTVJWVBkWk5Eays0dHo4VnBRRERyRzFCS28rcUsxZkVjVFBrTkp2UDRaS3A0cEJ4TGp5dVAyWm89S0/SEVQaU1VdVhkOGdQMTFiR0p1L1Y4Sm54dWlIb2R2REZhcWNaNVRBaFM3cnpqK3BuQ0xUVG8yYUhhN1dGWmhLZC9na2JhQ0E3cmRPc2RCS2ZTcXE4YUtFNFB3d2pOclNRS0)**
[$37.50 CAN HELP FUND
A WARM MEAL](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[$75 CAN HELP FUND
~~ONE~~ TWO WARM MEALS](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/-Z39JWkNKkSE/ZVpQZzFEUTJBeHR2YlF4UEVCRUd4bEVxVnVpcEQxZ0ttUnppMi9KWUxVbjZ6SmhZRnBEWTVJWVBkWk5Eays0dHo4VnBRRERyRzFCS28rcUsxZkVjVFBrTkp2UDRaS3A0cEJ4TGp5dVAyWm89S0/SEVQaU1VdVhkOGdQMTFiR0p1L1Y4Sm54dWlIb2R2REZhcWNaNVRBaFM3cnpqK3BuQ0xUVG8yYUhhN1dGWmhLZC9na2JhQ0E3cmRPc2RCS2ZTcXE4YUtFNFB3d2pOclNRS0)
---
[$150 CAN HELP FUND
~~TWO~~ FOUR WARM MEALS](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[MATCH ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Being far away from their loved ones during the holidays is just one of the many sacrifices our heroes in uniform make in service of our country. Though we may never be able to fully understand the challenges they and their families go through, we can make sure they enjoy a home-cooked meal this Thanksgiving.
**[So please, will you rush $37.50 or more right now to DOUBLE the value of your support for our service members ahead of Thanksgiving?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/2dpGh-YrAYSp/ZVpQZzFEUTJBeHR2YlF4UEVCRUd4bEVxVnVpcEQxZ0ttUnppMi9KWUxVbjZ6SmhZRnBEWTVJWVBkWk5Eays0dHo4VnBRRERyRzFCS28rcUsxZkVjVFBrTkp2UDRaS3A0cEJ4TGp5dVAyWm89S0/SEVQaU1VdVhkOGdQMTFiR0p1L1Y4Sm54dWlIb2R2REZhcWNaNVRBaFM3cnpqK3BuQ0xUVG8yYUhhN1dGWmhLZC9na2JhQ0E3cmRPc2RCS2ZTcXE4YUtFNFB3d2pOclNRS0)**
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Thank you for supporting our service members when they need it the most.
--The USO
*The NFL is matching all gifts to the USO through a USO mail, email and text message campaign, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000, through December 15, 2024.
**Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families.

clean_body: Please don't miss your chance to 2X-MATCH your gift for service members ahead of Thanksgiving. USO Supporter, With Thanksgiving just a week away, we wanted to ask you: Can you imagine celebrating this holiday without your family, friends or a Thanksgiving meal? Many folks back home don 't realize this, but the holiday season is often the toughest time of year for service members and their families. Without the USO and your support, thousands of service members will spend Thanksgiving alone, without anything special to mark the day. For many of them, it's their first time being so far from home; others will miss their child's first Thanksgiving. They all deserve our deepest support during this difficult time of year. That's why, as we get ready to celebrate Thanksgiving, we're so grateful to the NFL for MATCHING all gifts to provide Thanksgiving meals and other support year-round to our service members at military bases and USO Centers around the world. But right now, we 're falling short of our goal, and we need YOU to help us reach it by midnight tonight. Being far away from their loved ones during the holidays is just one of the many sacrifices our heroes in uniform make in service of our country. Though we may never be able to fully understand the challenges they and their families go through, we can make sure they enjoy a home-cooked meal this Thanksgiving. Thank you for supporting our service members when they need it the most. --The USO The NFL is matching all gifts to the USO through a USO mail, email and text message campaign, dollar for dollar, up to a total of $50,000, through December 15, 2024. **Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families. United Service Organizations, Inc. (USO) is a nonprofit 501(ς)(3) organization (EIN/Tax ID: 13-1610451) and not part of the Department of Defense (DOD). The appearance of DOD visual information does not imply or constitute DOD endorsement. Photo by the U.S. Army. (C)2024 USO, Inc. Hi Peter,

This week, the Wisconsin Supreme Court heard oral arguments over whether a 175-year-old abortion ban that went into effect following the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ is enforceable.

We wanted to share this video clip from the hearing with you because it perfectly illustrates why Her Bold Move must exist – and why women MUST be in the rooms where policy is made.

---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97424259/513378737/928813567?refcode=EM_F_241121Bump_N_HBM_90DO_6_NG_N_P2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1Y2VhZGYxLTEwYTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Hh_ckNitPQwIjbvxShMvnrmCBu48s6hiqDv9v7B56bM=)
---
The hearing featured the women court Justices asking probing and important questions of the male prosecutor’s attorney who was defending the state’s abortion ban. As they asked hypothetical but realistic questions, for example, about a 12-year-old girl becoming pregnant after being raped by a family member (a scenario that would NOT qualify for an abortion under this law), the attorney often shrugged his shoulders.

It was infuriating to watch the juxtaposition of so much merited emotion coming from the female justices compared to the nonchalance of a male attorney (and a male court Justice) working to remove bodily autonomy from millions of women and girls.

**This is why it’s so important that we have women in the rooms where decisions about _our_ bodies are being made. As Justice Rebecca Dallet pointed out, the only people who had rights in 1849 – when the original abortion law was signed into law – were white, property-owning men. We have made unimaginable progress since that law was implemented, and we must keep up the fight.**

This law was written **before women could vote** and even **before gynecology** was established as a surgical specialty. We are sick and tired of men working to take our nation backward, and we are sure you are, too.

[**Thanks to the women on the Wisconsin Supreme Court, this law will likely be rendered unenforceable. THAT is EXACTLY why what we do at Her Bold Move is so important. | | **Dear Peter,

** Something big is happening in America. Across the country, our values — freedom, responsibility, patriotism — are making a comeback. **We’re seeing a shift, but we’re just getting started.

** Here’s the reality: **PragerU has become a movement.** In 2024 alone, PragerU videos have been viewed **by almost 60 million people.** On YouTube, more than 60% of our video views are from young Americans under 35. And these videos are not just being watched; **they’re changing minds**. In fact, in our recent survey, 70% of our viewers reported changing their stance on an important issue after watching.

Look at our recent reach in some of the most critical states in the nation:
* **Texas:** 40M views
* **California:** 20.6M views
* **Arizona:** 18.3M views
* **New York:** 10.1M views
* **Florida:** 10M views
* **Georgia:** 5.2M views
* **Pennsylvania** : 5M views
* **North Carolina:** 4.8M views
* And so many more...

We’re igniting a passion for truth and empowering the next generation to stand strong in their beliefs. But ****now is not the time to sit back****. Now is the time to push harder, reach further, and make a deeper impact. **This is where YOU come in.** [**Your support today is what fuels us tomorrow.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=76f38b704dda42b8a1d4b8e031a2fcfd&_e=H18B_xt6DUnwldj7iPm2VVK5-qr0FZ-FNmh2uBj6i_4zY-s-DQdZ8s5HBuVCZqH8AJ24msvmbZbs922PF73jw9SamLsKBrX4YCbFnCvOiOC5RfKfVg5uHb4LTBE71QYddTo9UzcQoa_5niDASFfuWIrnneWWpLO6Lq3qivirIYm-XkRn8oxg7UViRHUGCuYvkjuNUgN5tfqBEPSeDrMju788QuexnywXH4nNeStOZhfgxKw-_yWaQawU0OCUq7mwR1JHJdi6d9RX2mEpHnYnsQ%3D%3D) Every dollar you give goes directly toward:
* **Reaching millions more** through social media, schools, and communities.
* **Creating powerful new content** that cuts through the noise and stands up for America.
* **Empowering** college students to stand up for truth and defend Western Civilization.
* **Equipping parents and teachers** with resources to champion your values.

**This moment is critical.** We’re making strides, but **to keep this momentum going, we need every supporter to dig deep**. We can’t take our foot off the gas. We now have the chance we have been praying for. name: Blue Amp Action HQ
subject: The House Majority comes down to CA-13
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
The path for the Democratic House Majority runs through this California race
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec4100e3-092e-4e47-8765-7f1ea01ebef4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| CA-13:
Adam Gray (D) vs. John Duarte (R)
TOO CLOSE TO CALL
---
| Peter, Right now, one of the most competitive House races in the country is still too close to call. Former California Assemblymember and Democratic nominee in California's 13th District, Adam Gray, and his extremist opponent remain locked in a dead-heat in a race that could determine the House Majority. With Donald Trump in the White House and extreme Republicans controlling the Senate, a Democratic House Majority would be our last line of defense against the extremist agenda. [Flipping CA-13 and the House Majority blue has never been more important. Will you split a $10 donation between Blue Amp Action and the Adam Gray for Congress recount fund today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T01e3b5e4-8542-4833-9eb8-06fea6463cf6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) In 2022, this district came down to only 564 votes. That’s right, just 564. We know this race is on track to be even closer this time around – and with the House Majority hanging in the balance, we can’t afford to fall short. [Will you split a donation between our team and Adam Gray’s recount fund to ensure we can count every vote in CA-13 and stay on our path to victory in the House?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T763e45d8-8b1a-41ce-94ae-8bd8da345f54/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T85dfd6e2-9702-4d9b-ab3d-0c901571554d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20241121_close_b2_f1_s1_c1_90op_rs-t1_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tad08f34f-ee36-4243-a905-9736ba11e62b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Terry Schilling, American Principles Project
subject: We went to the Senate to stop the Transgender Agenda
body:
Our work continues
| | |
---
| [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Zx-BUwbcXxumXcJ-Ue7xWz0WsydDuZxxmC4FoYNQ06ERp2RzcsI196TxY_T9qZ2EUBxG0wdi_e9qOBwXq1Mnhmk7Lb1agNNRA-jGPgkEW-_m0RaNRDDud8uJRMtsvldiZQFazsqJ67gw4i2EAKh65wtV7VZd-tsxDAHpcUvQQHRN0_IE_vL8mm1OM7Z3gdZdOn01ND-k4254w4ngt20ialQit_hCWWac7zpE83PpFAU=&c=WMAoYrK4pXJwRSqtYdI_cK9PmjfzP3DCbKWuK1bXpZkXOIp5m8zuVw==&ch=RgRyYy4AS5If6fQbRPZNdRlqxzNDXLXUncAR8KHdgVW3N5Cfk0Kp7A==)
---
| Friends,
I had the privilege yesterday of joining Senator Marshall's panel at the U.S. Capitol that was focused on finding ways to protect our children from "gender-affirming" care.
---
| [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Zx-BUwbcXxumXcJ-Ue7xWz0WsydDuZxxmC4FoYNQ06ERp2RzcsI1923oCyfTQYhvhyWsOsCKyow2Ymw5oDFOfUa27IlwH1kWrE3VAgKFMRBM0daqj9kX37-AMef01oZ2BJgYBtPdwc8mF_uMDEEG2Okt0fbAfGbuBAE3csQHr-9zOEY4Tw6V2Q==&c=WMAoYrK4pXJwRSqtYdI_cK9PmjfzP3DCbKWuK1bXpZkXOIp5m8zuVw==&ch=RgRyYy4AS5If6fQbRPZNdRlqxzNDXLXUncAR8KHdgVW3N5Cfk0Kp7A==)
---
| [Watch the Full Video](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Zx-BUwbcXxumXcJ-Ue7xWz0WsydDuZxxmC4FoYNQ06ERp2RzcsI1923oCyfTQYhvhyWsOsCKyow2Ymw5oDFOfUa27IlwH1kWrE3VAgKFMRBM0daqj9kX37-AMef01oZ2BJgYBtPdwc8mF_uMDEEG2Okt0fbAfGbuBAE3csQHr-9zOEY4Tw6V2Q==&c=WMAoYrK4pXJwRSqtYdI_cK9PmjfzP3DCbKWuK1bXpZkXOIp5m8zuVw==&ch=RgRyYy4AS5If6fQbRPZNdRlqxzNDXLXUncAR8KHdgVW3N5Cfk0Kp7A==)
---
Paula Scanlan joined me in this important conversation along with Senator Tuberville and Representative Mary Miller focusing on how the House of Representatives and the Senate can work together to put an end to the multi-billion dollar transgender medical pipeline that has been built to castrate our children.
---
| We are on offense here at APP and we are going to work with anyone in the House or Senate who will finally put an end to tax-payer funded transition surgeries.
---
|
---

This is all thanks to you, you helped us fund these studies EARLY, before this all became such a pivotal issue, so that we could have them when the moment was right.

clean_body: Our work continues | | | | == | Friends, I had the privilege yesterday of joining Senator Marshall's panel at the U.S. Capitol that was focused on finding ways to protect our children from "gender-affirming" care. | == | == Paula Scanlan joined me in this important conversation along with Senator Tuberville and Representative Mary Miller focusing on how the House of Representatives and the Senate can work together to put an end to the multi-billion dollar transgender medical pipeline that has been built to castrate our children. | We are on offense here at APP and we are going to work with anyone in the House or Senate who will finally put an end to tax-payer funded transition surgeries. | This is all thanks to you, you helped us fund these studies EARLY, before this all became such a pivotal issue, so that we could have them when the moment was right. Can you partner with us so we can continue to fight for our childrens' futures? | | == | Thank you for your commitment to our cause - American families are grateful! Thank You, | | Terry Schilling President American Principles Project | | == | Thank you for standing with us in the fight for America's families. I’m a veteran, consumer rights advocate, and small business owner, and I’m still in the fight to flip California’s 45th District – an ultra-competitive, Republican-held district in Southern California – from red-to-blue. I wanted to reach out and give you and update you on our race: **_We just took the lead, but only 397 votes separate us and our opponent._** Every ballot drop has brought us closer to taking the lead in this toss-up race, but victory is going to come down to counting _every single vote_. The anti-dollar drive spearheaded by China and Russia is spreading quickly. **Can this "Evil" plan be a threat to your wealth?** [**Learn More**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snb2s0&__onlt=h)

* * *
**[Reality Check: Are You Prepared for What's Next?](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=28e8lipfth0lgi047bw7x07vm2q63yjxmag84tlmwb0rc4g5s1o59h3z9u12jadqw0bj4sovg5by36ccmfi1vw5951oyhsqmsq2mjyig66rpwuyr6n6ej7mu160el4nttnxwr4mijkacx8q2vki8dtsooaotgctc9wvxmtbe12qum5aerw34dfbiazvz1y4i5vfxdf9qitdao9d52yakkjxkdgh3gzj2q2twhokbrm91sj0sxqq6mnpopmubel5cyfklalusbq3162cgalu4ag9w1qd5hlizkxh8fy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snb2s0&__onlt=h)** With everything going on today, it’s natural to feel a growing sense of unease about the future. Rising costs of everyday essentials, inflation eating into the value of our hard-earned dollars, and news of escalating national debt are impacting people across the board. The middle class feels the pinch acutely, with many left wondering how long they can maintain their standard of living without making sacrifices. Global shifts, like the alliance of BRICS nations pushing for economic independence from the U.S. dollar, and ongoing market volatility add layers of unpredictability that complicate even the best-laid financial plans. It’s easy to find yourself asking: **[What happens if the world doesn’t return to “normal”?](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=28e8lipfth0lgi047bw7x07vm2q63yjxmakajixv9n8lm66fddakc7urnusdtesa2zqasocfu977fe80ee39s04157gymofgj2r6fcrcgghc581w78g5q1vl4bfkladqt2bllzzoahtkrhyf6ku27jnukzj9bi06nygg847vdggzepmu1q92ecqaa66kbwitqqeyvbet711nhrvhwsy3uem80zro1llwq6tpbm239pq2rdb3d7sjvhd6w2pqkipo9h8d77ts9grbife3zrvozdie2iy593oyncwj9i&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snb2s0&__onlt=h)** One pressing concern that keeps emerging is the U.S. dollar’s diminishing purchasing power. According to recent data from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics and the World Bank, the dollar has lost over 20% of its purchasing power since 2020. In practical terms, this devaluation means that a dollar today buys far less than it did just four years ago, impacting everyday expenses, savings, and the value of long-term assets. **[For the average middle-class American, each percentage point lost further erodes financial security, forcing them to either cut back or explore alternative ways to protect and grow their savings.](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=28e8lipfth0lgi047bw7x07vm2q63yjxmb35dn7djjtug7vu3u1e6vj7puis1i5jxm3re9536oafwpbnmcmtos2f5qoxb99rpce2bfkzvvo2bjsb86ttghfs89z5097nsfgrw6leren6muhvfk3hap6bwzu1x1uypb635cbnuzmfmwi7z8r0fz3szagmpva2z9dznynvtwmlqxoy2mv82ykt9rlw9o22qmt6v75t3sv3qypcj0vafs50cg844fwjiiuubrsrgmeqzwfoxhwwybw04qt4y6ewahmxb5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snb2s0&__onlt=h)** [](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=28e8lipfth0lgi047bw7x07vm2q63yjxmb7ywbg0yvc2q8i6r8qxyinlrvo4xlh73ie745vogs6rml6xeatb8i1x5wgx45algr4kxjtw87ermyhg944gnc2jnfsn0fz8swkh4co86b4q564msjbb4f1i6z2fs712rdto3p739rckeetj92wkgve8z7ty1urzi4ca3ugxe3wyjd5ow4soytycu8vesa4wqqslp48gjva4pt2q2fys30ugjy2fmcevvjem7zrrqd53qngxwnxexz785io3lm8v200m50&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snb2s0&__onlt=h) For many, day-to-day routines, busy schedules, and opinions from advisors, family, and friends often pull attention away from the bigger picture. When it comes to finances, it’s tempting to put off critical decisions, assume the status quo will hold, or rely on others’ advice without evaluating what’s truly best for long-term security. **[But in times like these, with so many factors shifting all at once, taking proactive steps has never been more important.](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=28e8lipfth0lgi047bw7x07vm2q63yjxmbo3q4s9n5kxkm8gckdr38cdtvdf63wsyvsks1jyuva11wzimyaj5o0p5dowv24wn3tgu10sii8dhomlm1e6ewoqrp9t1q35so3mb9azjxjxlfp13jnux8j2eyzxnovutfex0lah0874n03ygicihst0yc4jbt794lbahrpa2ygmsik31kpt6omld140a072quse71o8dyf5ond18yb7owib4pjusa056l21bhqql7te52hgudz0wwgs7q73opatr4bkxf&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snb2s0&__onlt=h)** The question is no longer whether to take action but what kind of action to take. How can we prepare for an economic environment that feels as unpredictable as it is challenging? How can we maintain our lifestyles, protect our families, and still plan for the future, regardless of what uncertainties arise? **[Diversification—spreading out assets to manage risk—has long been a cornerstone of financial planning in uncertain times.](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=28e8lipfth0lgi047bw7x07vm2q63yjxmbsw7v2tle75unxv2b48vx5vvw7tc79c565bdkni6z5ye656ewi51dl55jgvjkw4ddgcq4vpxwb4s1c4mlrv9qxhuj2z1kv2s37c9f13aucfgsxdcijo1ae9qy8p6u1kvi3fky6yd0z9f7boscigip5ey8e9prkgpgabznicp63k02cfvemxc6l8lfa8ho9wqysx0kryxbk6n6raqrdky5mvn5e7yx7cg0nf83pqvzgshfj3t7a8vuta8i22bt4re9rz1r&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snb2s0&__onlt=h)** Throughout history, people have turned to various methods to safeguard their wealth with assets that retain value even when the market fluctuates. In today’s world, including options in your portfolio that offer stability, and long-term resilience can bring peace of mind and create a more secure future. **Why Gold and Silver?** These assets are not tied to any single economy, currency, or policy, giving them a unique role in a diversified portfolio. Unlike assets solely tied to market performance, gold and silver possess intrinsic value that has historically held up through market and economic shifts. They’re valued not because of fleeting trends but because of their enduring role as stores of value across civilizations, providing an extra layer of security when times feel uncertain. **[This is precisely why central banks and governments are steadily increasing their reserves of gold and silver.](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=28e8lipfth0lgi047bw7x07vm2q63yjxmbx10jacaqrb2ok7qrt1ljwnxwz6mmklzegt3gc5gcz8udytmv3ok7jj64ovoglb8s7ym82mm95t0d59nj2hc8hoyshf2uklrgo5gopvrrw1b3gupiv5u4zs0xf51zwqxkr2i8aqtf3rnrn22x2ej9gwxdrx1qcrybzcr8rezbpxv8vw1y7cm1zu8y8t2ao2qcspghv0rf37m14nw8gbhbaptjyieurot1xwcnoq4475ywkorzbsus4impj22wwq5q5nt8&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snb2s0&__onlt=h)** We understand that taking action can seem complex, especially with so much information and influence pulling us in different directions. However, the biggest risk isn’t taking action—it’s staying fully exposed to a financial system already showing signs of cracks. The question isn’t whether assets like gold and silver value have—central banks and governments worldwide have already answered that for us. The real question is: How comfortable are you leaving your wealth fully exposed to a system under strain? Having clarity about your financial direction matters. Discover steps you can take toward a more diversified, secure future aligned with your goals. That is why we are giving you the[**free Wealth Education Guide**](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=28e8lipfth0lgi047bw7x07vm2q63yjxmbbtgomlp0a8yqmhc5fhs9l3zx2ggqa96rv8rd4rug4g9p3detmwgzib6mguddr9b4wu6nx6kjxfxswqogc8734fc0al33qirxsxqhbl6op9vd390i4kkwuyyxpiif2ga0cnfh668xvwfyidar8ck6voxm2ibpu0hwyd74kgk8z92qomvs4gfindtqebm0qwqgs6aeyq9i888hekc1jt5m27abtxkryk42ho8vnpawvgpnlxq3catpe4nhe1ra0ouuglji&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snb2s0&__onlt=h), in addition to **FREE $250** worth of silver with any qualified purchase above $10,000.

This guide is a valuable resource that shows you how to navigate these turbulent times and make informed decisions about your financial future. **[Request Your Free Learning Kit Today!](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=28e8lipfth0lgi047bw7x07vm2q63yjxmbfkzcj81yie6rzw1i6aiyphbxuvqupub27ldzub6jyrlkx2mrted3ht6tou6zgg5ejq2r43zy2665lvpepwzjqmfwu53zgfrox0lr2qj96tqqnlzhcer0pf8wkadkxmc31wdtzjlplcngutm9qal384wec8po9y4rxdl1tj8diixw511m1lpd00c7ojtot2qkrlubbe3lp97ctxhh08qgs1hton4ogvd453cdmp90iv430govdisnroppz0edsmhzwapt&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snb2s0&__onlt=h)** [](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=28e8lipfth0lgi047bw7x07vm2q63yjxmbkrt5vsc95nct08pyvuokezdxk7ky2e7aid3vikh141cw2oepb0zvg96zgtxwmqytm9kuz0omuuchqaqc0j4dzdj4nn48mcr3bsvkqga5lb91wcmhoxhs8lgwvsz43ce5ofb45bc6rhg246i3wylliiwnpw1n17pmweck0lvn6w4bjdv3l3jxa9klj5aavwr2reoyf5k2um6x691a2laqfi2970mm25q5qh8l9oft97gg23mlf4r92wqhu05gi98emof1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snb2s0&__onlt=h)

[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=28e8lipfth0lgi047bw7x07vm2q63yjxmc2imw5bqhphmuoiboinfn7rfypiube1cnxursn8v4xzt5vzmni8vlf16got0sbl35z5gy5j0kkhnwffrza9xxj90a4t4eczqgfi4tdmr2ej3afsjgkrni46sw48u9y6g7a2ycztski1o9bitjcx0ixavg0hb9eey5vfugw1fgs7zhcu0ji8tsov7etpi0y2r6rx6vive5zn5rgi7t5cjl7c911bs79d16ayd78opjxixx3o9rgoq6bespoluko7xj0196&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snb2s0&__onlt=h)

### Rather than blocking this bill, 50+ House Dems trying to make it law--here's how we can work to stop them
| | [Qasim Rashid](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Nov 21
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)

This week Thursday the House will vote on HR 9495, again. This bill is a perfect example of why I constantly implore everyone to never be blinded by partisan politics, and always be ready to speak up for justice, even against your own party.
Last week, 50 House Democrats voted in favor of HR 9495, a dangerous bill that threatens the very foundation of nonprofit advocacy and free speech in this country. While the bill failed to pass under fast-tracked procedures requiring a two-thirds majority, Republicans are determined to bring it back for a simple majority vote. This time, they might succeed unless we act now. Why is HR 9495 so dangerous and what can we do to prevent its passage? **Let 's Address This**.
**Quick Note!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I welcome your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..A7cz72FZBQW90M_SvM7lPR6SHCM4p3e5pocVgSMoOX0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=151947811)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5ae59b02-dd74-427a-bc23-27885d072da8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
VIEWpress/Corbis via Getty Images
### What Is HR 9495?
HR 9495 allows the government (in this case Donald Trump and his allies) to arbitrarily accuse nonprofits of "supporting terrorism" and strip them of their tax-exempt status based on vague and broad allegations--without meaningful oversight or due process. This opens the door to silencing organizations critical of government policies, from foreign policy to environmental justice, criminal justice reform, immigration, and beyond.
### A Chilling Effect on Advocacy
Trump has spoken extensively about his desire to "protect free speech from leftist suppression." Given the fact that every MAGA accusation is a confession, it is no surprise that HR 9495 is the antithesis of free speech. For example, imagine a racial justice org shut down because a potential AG Matt Gaetz thinks Black Lives Matter is a domestic terrorist organization? This isn't far fetched, given that Gaetz has previously [compared BLM to the Confederacy](https://substack.com/redirect/84f2ae04-e77a-4c1b-a664-07a786d8e479?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Or imagine a racist Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee who believes "[Palestinians don't exist,](https://substack.com/redirect/7fc12702-7962-49c9-a1cf-86989018c986?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" and therefore any non-profit working to fund medical care for Palestinians suffering genocide, must be a terrorist organization and therefore abolished? This is again not far fetched, given that literally, Huckabee does not believe Palestinians exist, and given the right wing's already successful efforts to ban UNRWA funding.
Let's say a voting rights group exists to expand voter access. Donald Trump and his Republican minions decide, "that's terrorism," and shut down the voting rights org. Similar groups see this consequence and reduce their advocacy, avoid controversial topics, or scale back operations to avoid risking their own status. And without formal accusations, the mere threat of being targeted could lead to widespread self-censorship. Suddenly, non-profits are neutered in their ability to effectuate change.
Now imagine the only non-profits _allowed_ to function are those with whom a MAGA administration agrees? Right wing religious organizations, anti-choice organizations, openly white supremacist orgs -- all functioning with executive protection.
But sadly, even that isn't where the damage stops. HR 9495 will become a tool for authoritarian abuse that goes beyond censoring nonprofits. Once the authority to label organizations as "terrorist supporters" is granted, there's nothing stopping future administrations--whether Trump, Vance, or others--from weaponizing it against ideological opponents. Imagine a world where dissenting voices--journalists, faith-based groups, or activists--are silenced or marginalized by a simple accusation, all without due process. That's the path HR 9495 opens, that's why it's a direct threat to democracy, and that's why we must implore Democrats to stand united against this fascist overreach.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..A7cz72FZBQW90M_SvM7lPR6SHCM4p3e5pocVgSMoOX0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151947811)
### Why We Must Act Now
The reality is that this is not hypothetical--it is exactly what we would expect out of a would be 'Dictator on Day 1.' That is why it is so much more devastating to see more than 50 Democrats vote in favor of HR 9495 ([You can see who they are here](https://substack.com/redirect/54e43860-69a6-4d7c-a35f-7ad2285c7845?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). While the GOP is leading this charge, the complicity of dozens of Democrats cannot be ignored. The GOP is bringing HR 9495 back for a vote, confident it can pass under regular procedures requiring only a simple majority. We must activate and organize to prevent its passage.
### What You Can Do
We cannot afford to be silent. Here's how you can help stop HR 9495:
1. Raise Awareness

Share this article with your networks. Talk to your friends, family, and colleagues about the dangers of HR 9495. Use your platforms--social media, community groups, or local organizations--to spread the word about this attack on civil rights and free speech.
2. Contact Your Representative

Call, email, or write to your U.S. Representative and tell them to vote NO on HR 9495. [You can find your representative and their contact info here](https://substack.com/redirect/bf511604-bf5c-4a39-bc51-9cec3f968b8f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). If your representative is a Democrat who supported this bill, demand accountability. Remind them that supporting HR 9495 goes against the principles of democracy and justice they claim to uphold. Share with them the [Civil Society letter sent to Speaker Johnson and Leader Jeffries imploring them to kill HR 9495](https://substack.com/redirect/e9d6079d-f0d6-4309-86db-644abf2d0f8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Use the House Clerk's roll call [to see how your representative voted](https://substack.com/redirect/54e43860-69a6-4d7c-a35f-7ad2285c7845?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). If they voted yes, let them know you're watching and will hold them accountable if they vote yes again.
3. Peacefully Protest

Organize or join peaceful protests to ensure our rights are protected. Public demonstrations have always been a powerful tool for holding elected officials accountable and showing that the people will not tolerate attacks on their freedoms.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..A7cz72FZBQW90M_SvM7lPR6SHCM4p3e5pocVgSMoOX0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=151947811)
### The Fight for Justice Requires Action
HR 9495 is more than a bill--it's a blueprint for authoritarian overreach. As the non-profit non-partisan [Interfaith Alliance warns](https://substack.com/redirect/e8a039ba-f57e-4b1f-af5c-338968b0e0f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> The bill paves the way for future abuses of power. Once this authority is granted, there's nothing stopping future administrations from expanding its use, potentially targeting organizations that don't align with their political views or ideological agenda. The ability to label an organization as a "terrorist supporter" without due process opens up a dangerous path where any dissenting voice could be silenced or marginalized. This legislation is not just a minor legal change--it's a dangerous attack on civil society and democratic values. H.R. 9495 shows a blatant disregard for free speech, due process, and the fundamental rights that allow us to live in a democracy.
Let's stop HR 9495 before it's too late. Together, we can protect the freedoms that underpin our society. Call your representatives. Share this article. Protest peacefully. And above all, refuse to remain silent in the face of injustice.

subject: These questions are at the core of what it means to be human
body:

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWPnfhtWND

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Every Hillsdale College student is required to take a class on
the Western heritage in order to graduate. And every academic
year, I'm reminded of the joy it is to pursue the answers to
questions like "Does God exist? Can we know God?" with my
students.

These questions are at the core of what it means to be human -
both in our relationship with each other and with God.

Today, I want to offer you that same experience by sending you
a limited-edition DVD box set of Hillsdale's popular online
course, "Western Heritage - From the Book of Genesis to John
Locke," as a token of our thanks for a generous contribution in
support of Hillsdale's efforts to educate America.

I invite you to study the history of the "big questions" with
my colleagues and me.

Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link:
https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-western-heritage-dvd

More than 2,000 people have already requested theirs, so make
sure to get your set before they are all gone.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

| Peter, The Left is having to do some soul searching after the shellacking they took on November 5th. Many of them are doing a lot more blaming and crying than actually trying to understand how their out-of-touch and radical policy positions alienated America. But what will New Jersey’s Democratic gubernatorial candidates learn – if anything? So far, the folks who have announced look pretty radical. And if they try to tell you otherwise in the aftermath of our state’s swing to the right, I’d urge you to look at their records. They tell a pretty brutal story.
---
| | [Save NJ in 2025 – JOIN the Common Sense Majority](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/5457d18c33d488f271a29d284c6a4479/eJyNkMsKglAQht9l1pJ4I3AnIiKai6h1eBnqkOfCcYxMfPeOFbUpCGY18803_DMBoagEZS2EcKWb63pggcaGKYaCYimoah5TN_Adz7GgY-KcajkoCKevy29gaXtO4FtAo0KD7LZRnGdleiiyMjekqrS58adn_fEkmygrYJ5_ipEzSi7G3UNIesAlUctMKtrrzvAnItWHtt1IzqXo0VTTDfVK6qPNkdeo-xNTtjFVSqFoX2_IcXz65jutY2Zi)
