| | [I’m already a member, but I’d like to chip into take on this craziness!](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/e4b492df16e305ae56008cdeedf6552c/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnDVRk8BbiIRYHqLOsa0DLensso7SB_73tg88FXSded5neOcOjCSIixpSuPAtimLwwKJURiFxpomFfG2jZB7GoQeNovPK6t5Aev8anoDnOA6TyAO-GnTIbrvMyqJaHdZFVTrSCOtu_OlZzCdPvlkWaxjHn2JsFeeDc3eQsu3x2ahWrhXvbeP4E7Pp0iCQum01-R1Sh75s-uPM4jDMpA5qTYLRqYQxSPXnDyVe38LxAf1lZlU=)
---
| **Rep. Josh Gottheimer** finally announced his campaign on Friday after much speculation that he was about to jump in. You may remember him as [_this_](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/2855f4e15756a38f962733aa024d2d85/eJyNkM2qwjAQRt9l1sWYqY2lOxGRUutCdH0J7YDBmoZ06i99d6NeXN0LbmfOnI9v7sBkteW8hgwufEOMIQJPlXGGLM9by7p6bTGZyFhG0Bh7WPq2d5Dd_zz-AM9xLBMVAV8dBWS7mc2LfL38WeXrIpBO-5DxpWc6-XgW5SxfwTD8K6aj4cUpuDvI2Pf0bFSb0Ip3vgn8ntl1mRB8NszkR1V7FKWp9tQ0tClVKjrW3HdCpqhUOsUxopRpgkpisGvnyNa_ryno-s4YHl3yac4=) apologist for Kamala Harris’ communist-style price control plan, for which he was called out by none other than CNBC... Then, on Monday morning, his fellow New Jersey **Rep. Mikie Sherrill** launched her campaign as well. Here is a preview of both their votes on key issues. Do these votes seem in step with New Jersey’s rising Common Sense Majority? I think not. ❌ Gottheimer and Sherrill **__voted against__** requiring proof of citizenship to vote
❌ Gottheimer and Sherrill **__voted to send billions__** more to Ukraine
❌ Gottheimer and Sherrill **__voted against__** the Secure the Border Act
❌ Gottheimer and Sherrill **__voted to allow biological men__** to compete in women’s sports Yikes! Extreme much? Then, there’s New Jersey’s uber-Leftist Jersey City Mayor, **Steve Fulop**. This man hasn’t met an extreme position he won’t jam down the throats of residents, regardless of how it may hurt them. ❌ [Crime rose](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/252c5f1e545807f5a7b41547e83c5ff4/eJyNkEFLw0AQhf_LnLOGJC1KbqWUElJ7KHqWZTPS0WR32MyWxpL_7lSlJwWvb977Hm8uIOitl6aDGs7yUZYVZBDRERN6WQcv1n1dy-WiqIoMevLv2xgSQ335NXwzXOWqWD5kIBOjWp4Oq3Xb7Lcvu2bfqpNt1I5_cu4XN87mcdXsYJ7_BONAsjkpe4RaYsLroo50lTzHXv1HER7rPH9zJJPQgOOdC0N-otBryLiokqHRJDbJdxjNYKcQzWvqA-fKt8zou5_ntDh9t8yf1jRudQ==) with Fulop as Mayor - and he [tried to hide it](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/2c6b9da97c01f3579e4bb465f307112a/eJyNkEFvgkAQhf_LnNkiYGvCjRhjCNZDU89ms4yyCrubZWxLDf_dQRpONfH65nvv5c0VCI00lJeQwg_9xnECAXhU2mk0tLSGpLpf49d5lEQB1Nqc195eHKTXf80TMMhJ9DYLgDqHjHx-ZMsi3673m3xbMOmk544ncxbzKWf1nuUb6PuHwdhoWn1xdgsp-QsOi0rNq2jna-YrItemYXhSmjrSDbYvyjZhZb8FVSga2VkvDtbWWI4Cu6WwRijPsJBHqU3IPdI5NOXfkwrsxrb-BjtTcOg=) with misleading data. But it’s not passing the smell test when you look at the real data - or talk to residents who have experienced the rising crime first hand.
❌ Fulop made Jersey City a “Sanctuary City” for illegals.
❌ Fulop fired an aide for supporting his sister’s MAGA campaign.
❌ Fulop supported radical transgender policies, driven by his [LGBTQ+ Task Force](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/abde435a2e24f9f7941263faf20db8a8/eJyNkM0KwjAQhN9lz8XS1h_oTUSkVD2IniW2q0ZjEpOtNUrf3VTFk4K3YffbGWbvQCiZpKyEFK50i-MEAjBYcM1R0khJYsVzG_e6URIFILg8ToyqNKT3r8cfoB0nUT8OgJxGjywXw1GezSfraTbPPamZ8Rl_-gy6H5_xbJhNoWl-GuOJ0_jivS2kZCpsG5Xct6KVEZ7fE2mbhmFd150DGouu4OTkobNTl7CVeyZEeGJOmW0llH5JK3YbOhOzx60yBfocpjXK8v2kHN0rrXkAmhxy8A==) and touted his city’s perfect score from radical HRC which advocates for men in women’s sports. Do we want him running the whole state? No thanks, Mayor. Then, our favorite corrupt Trenton power broker and former State Senator, **Steve Sweeney** , who was bested by Ed Durr in 2021, has had his hat in the ring for almost a year now. Let’s not forget the bad ideas he shoved on our state during his reign. ❌ Sweeney pushed bill to give driver’s licenses to illegal immigrants.
❌ Sweeney supported extending Murphy’s emergency powers during COVID to further control and stifle New Jerseyans’ freedoms.
❌ Sweeney has been a repeated enemy of parents’ rights.
❌ Sweeney continues to advocate for disastrous windmills on the Jersey shore. Remember, this is just a sampling of their _really, really bad_ records. There’s more. Common sense is rising up and these Leftist candidates left New Jersey behind long ago. Let’s ignore what will likely be hasty attempts to remake themselves in a new image and remember what they’ve actually done when they had power...when the economy was bad...and the border was in crisis. _The emperor has no clothes!_ JOIN the Common Sense Majority ahead of 2025 _and if you’re already a member shoot this email to a friend or relative and urge them to join you._ We’re not going to let them pull the wool over our eyes this time. We’re getting wise to this garbage, and we’re getting loud. For New Jersey,
---
|
---
| President
Common Sense Club [Share this newsletter on social media!](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/acf4b3bbdef66a344243c9878795eb50/eJyNkE1rwzAMhv-LzvFCPsZKbqWUEtL1MLZz8WyRuEtkYythWcl_r9uNnjYY6CQ9el6kMzCSJK41VPDJX3leQAIelXEGiTeWWKrbNH8ssyJLoDf0sfN2dFCdf12-A9d2kZWrBHh2GJHXl_WmqQ-7474-NJF00seMf3qeyrtn-7yu97Asf4pxMLydojtAxX7E60XaxKv4zfeR75hdqNJU2WGwFDCW6sf3B-vbtJMTCu4woKCT0DiI1k5CSdJGS8YgepSeUAtJM3eG2jQGSueQ9M-3Gpy_Y5cLaCp02A==)
---
| Did you catch our previous email? If not, you can read it here now:
We know (by “we,” I mean common sense New Jerseyans, not Hollywood, coastal elites or the mainstream media) that woke extremism is one major reason the Left lost big last Tuesday night. Taxpayer funding of sex-change surgeries for prison inmates. Pushing a sexual agenda on kindergartners. Biological men beating up women in athletics. It’s this type of woke extremism that so many common sense New Jerseyans rejected on Tuesday when Trump got closer to winning New Jersey than any Republican since 1992. Why? Because common sense is that a criminal’s gender transition (or really anyone’s) shouldn’t be the financial responsibility of the taxpayer. Common sense is that children should be children and that indoctrinating them with sexually explicit materials is abusive behavior. And that women shouldn’t be losing medals and scholarships to biological men – who were usually mediocre athletes at best before deciding to compete against women. That’s the “patriarchy” the Left should be worried about. So as we look to 2025 and saving New Jersey from Left Wing Lunacy in offices from top to bottom, have candidates on the Left learned anything? Will they be moving from wokism towards common sense to, if nothing else, save their political rears? If you look at gubernatorial candidate Sean Spiller, it’s clear they won’t. Sean Spiller, the President of the New Jersey Education Association (NJEA) has been the center of some controversy for funneling NJEA resources (i.e., teacher dues) to his political campaign. But that’s just the beginning. A few days ago, “Drag Queen Entertainment” posted this video of their presence and “Banned Book Story Time” at... the NJEA Convention. This is on top of convention calls for “queering the curriculum.” The convention theme – “Learning. Equity. Justice.” should have told us all we needed to know. The message at this convention for New Jersey educators? Pushing a sexual agenda on children is not only welcomed, but encouraged. This is grooming, plain and simple. And NJ educators shouldn’t have this agenda forced on them either, especially at a time when our students are struggling and they need to be focused on core academic subjects. This is all going on under President Spiller’s lead and it has his fingerprints all over it. He has all but said he’s running to force his NJEA agenda on the entire state of New Jersey. And let’s just call this like it is – crazy, and dangerous. If the commentary from media elites and leftist insiders is any indicator, Spiller won’t be alone in continuing to push a woke agenda. But unfortunately for them, my hunch is that common sense New Jerseyans aren’t going to take it in 2025 either. So what do we do? It’s simple. 1) Identify more members of the Common Sense Majority. 2) Recruit common sense candidates for the ballot at every level. 3) Get the Common Sense Majority out to vote in the Primary and the General. It might be a simple strategy, but it’s not going to be easy. We need all of us working together to grab back that megaphone and save our state. Here at the Common Sense Club, we want you to feel like this is your home. The place where you aren’t alone in saying “that’s nuts!” and the place where you can do something about the lunacy you see around you. clean_body: Peter, The Left is having to do some soul searching after the shellacking they took on November 5th. Many of them are doing a | | Peter, The Left is having to do some soul searching after the shellacking they took on November 5th. Many of them are doing a lot more blaming and crying than actually trying to understand how their out-of-touch and radical policy positions alienated America. But what will New Jersey’s Democratic gubernatorial candidates learn – if anything? So far, the folks who have announced look pretty radical. And if they try to tell you otherwise in the aftermath of our state’s swing to the right, I’d urge you to look at their records. They tell a pretty brutal story. | | | | = | Rep. Josh Gottheimer finally announced his campaign on Friday after much speculation that he was about to jump in. You may remember him as = apologist for Kamala Harris’ communist-style price control plan, for which he was called out by none other than CNBC... Then, on Monday morning, his fellow New Jersey Rep. Mikie Sherrill launched her campaign as well. Here is a preview of both their votes on key issues. Do these votes seem in step with New Jersey’s rising Common Sense Majority? I think not. ❌ Gottheimer and Sherrill voted against requiring proof of citizenship to vote ❌ Gottheimer and Sherrill voted to send billions more to Ukraine ❌ Gottheimer and Sherrill voted against the Secure the Border Act ❌ Gottheimer and Sherrill voted to allow biological men to compete in women’s sports Yikes! Extreme much? Then, there’s New Jersey’s uber-Leftist Jersey City Mayor, Steve Fulop. This man hasn’t met an extreme position he won’t jam down the throats of residents, regardless of how it may hurt them. ❌ == with Fulop as Mayor - and he = with misleading data. But it’s not passing the smell test when you look at the real data - or talk to residents who have experienced the rising crime first hand. ❌ Fulop made Jersey City a “Sanctuary City” for illegals. ❌ Fulop fired an aide for supporting his sister’s MAGA campaign. ❌ Fulop supported radical transgender policies, driven by his == and touted his city’s perfect score from radical HRC which advocates for men in women’s sports. Do we want him running the whole state? No thanks, Mayor. Then, our favorite corrupt Trenton power broker and former State Senator, Steve Sweeney , who was bested by Ed Durr in 2021, has had his hat in the ring for almost a year now. Let’s not forget the bad ideas he shoved on our state during his reign. ❌ Sweeney pushed bill to give driver’s licenses to illegal immigrants. ❌ Sweeney supported extending Murphy’s emergency powers during COVID to further control and stifle New Jerseyans’ freedoms. ❌ Sweeney has been a repeated enemy of parents’ rights. ❌ Sweeney continues to advocate for disastrous windmills on the Jersey shore. Remember, this is just a sampling of their really, really bad records. There’s more. Common sense is rising up and these Leftist candidates left New Jersey behind long ago. Let’s ignore what will likely be hasty attempts to remake themselves in a new image and remember what they’ve actually done when they had power...when the economy was bad...and the border was in crisis. The emperor has no clothes! JOIN the Common Sense Majority ahead of 2025 and if you’re already a member shoot this email to a friend or relative and urge them to join you. We’re not going to let them pull the wool over our eyes this time. We’re getting wise to this garbage, and we’re getting loud. For New Jersey, | | President Common Sense Club == | Did you catch our previous email? If not, you can read it here now: We know (by “we,” I mean common sense New Jerseyans, not Hollywood, coastal elites or the mainstream media) that woke extremism is one major reason the Left lost big last Tuesday night. Taxpayer funding of sex-change surgeries for prison inmates. Pushing a sexual agenda on kindergartners. Biological men beating up women in athletics. It’s this type of woke extremism that so many common sense New Jerseyans rejected on Tuesday when Trump got closer to winning New Jersey than any Republican since 1992. Why? Because common sense is that a criminal’s gender transition (or really anyone’s) shouldn’t be the financial responsibility of the taxpayer. Common sense is that children should be children and that indoctrinating them with sexually explicit materials is abusive behavior. And that women shouldn’t be losing medals and scholarships to biological men – who were usually mediocre athletes at best before deciding to compete against women. That’s the “patriarchy” the Left should be worried about. So as we look to 2025 and saving New Jersey from Left Wing Lunacy in offices from top to bottom, have candidates on the Left learned anything? Will they be moving from wokism towards common sense to, if nothing else, save their political rears? If you look at gubernatorial candidate Sean Spiller, it’s clear they won’t. Sean Spiller, the President of the New Jersey Education Association (NJEA) has been the center of some controversy for funneling NJEA resources (i.e., teacher dues) to his political campaign. But that’s just the beginning. A few days ago, “Drag Queen Entertainment” posted this video of their presence and “Banned Book Story Time” at... the NJEA Convention. This is on top of convention calls for “queering the curriculum.” The convention theme – “Learning. Equity. Justice.” should have told us all we needed to know. The message at this convention for New Jersey educators? Pushing a sexual agenda on children is not only welcomed, but encouraged. This is grooming, plain and simple. And NJ educators shouldn’t have this agenda forced on them either, especially at a time when our students are struggling and they need to be focused on core academic subjects. This is all going on under President Spiller’s lead and it has his fingerprints all over it. He has all but said he’s running to force his NJEA agenda on the entire state of New Jersey. And let’s just call this like it is – crazy, and dangerous. If the commentary from media elites and leftist insiders is any indicator, Spiller won’t be alone in continuing to push a woke agenda. But unfortunately for them, my hunch is that common sense New Jerseyans aren’t going to take it in 2025 either. So what do we do? It’s simple. 1) Identify more members of the Common Sense Majority. 2) Recruit common sense candidates for the ballot at every level. 3) Get the Common Sense Majority out to vote in the Primary and the General. It might be a simple strategy, but it’s not going to be easy. We need all of us working together to grab back that megaphone and save our state. Here at the Common Sense Club, we want you to feel like this is your home. The place where you aren’t alone in saying “that’s nuts!” and the place where you can do something about the lunacy you see around you. So as you celebrate, make plans to get back in the fight with us because 2025 is just around the corner... Let’s go, Common Sense friends! ---
| **Dr. Brian Williams** | November 21, 2024
---|---
|
## **Staying the Course**
---
Dear Peter,This is a difficult time for many of us. We hoped our country would choose a better path, and now we're left feeling disheartened, angry, and exhausted from fighting against ignorance and hate.Like many of you, I've been struggling to find the right words and to determine my next steps. But I want to be clear: I'm not giving up.You have all inspired me with your tireless work as healers, advocates, and volunteers. You've stood by me and by each other, fighting for a country that lives up to its ideals. I'm committed to standing with you.Our fight for justice continues, even if it looks different than we expected. We may need to adjust our approach, but our core purpose remains the same: to serve others and build a more just society. Together, we can create a future our children will be proud of – a future where communities are strong, historical wrongs are addressed, and justice reaches everyone. Onward,
Brian
---

# **Trump Wins! A Victory For America &

President Trump's historic victory on Tuesday night was a testament to the power of our grassroots movement. But our work is far from over. With several crucial House Battleground races still undecided, every single vote counts. We can't afford to let Democrats steal these elections from us. As we've seen in the aftermath of the election, the liberal media is already trying to downplay the significance of President Trump's win. They're saying his mandate isn't as strong as it seems, and that he'll face opposition from Congress. But we know the truth. We know that our movement is stronger than ever, and that we have the power to shape the future of this country. That's why it's crucial that we ensure every legal vote is counted accurately in these undecided races. We can't let Democrats use their usual tricks to try and steal these elections from us. body:
don’t let Trump off
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22556%2E4449941%2Emo9d0B)
---
**WE KNOW:** The corrupt Supreme Court essentially turned presidents into KINGS by giving them immunity for their acts in office.

**AND WE KNOW:** Trump has already been accused of inciting an insurrection, mishandling classified documents and paying hush money – **_what will he do with immunity?!_**

**SO WE KNOW:** We have to fight back against this horrific ruling – _and Chuck Schumer did just that by introducing the _No Kings Act_!_ [**We need a MASSIVE wave of public support for this crucial legislation, team! Add your name to support Chuck Schumer’s effort to revoke Trump’s immunity »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/revoke_pres_immunity/?source=FFR_20241121_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=22556%2E4449941%2Emo9d0B) | [ 25,000 SIGNATURE GOAL: ADD YOUR NAME TO SUPPORT THE _NO KINGS ACT_ »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/revoke_pres_immunity/?source=FFR_20241121_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=22556%2E4449941%2Emo9d0B)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: 169 Lawsuits!
body:
I just reviewed this month’s “Litigation Status Report,” which is an internal, first-of-the-month snapshot of where all our active lawsuits are in the judicial process.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I just reviewed this month's "**Litigation Status Report** ," which is an internal, first-of-the-month snapshot of where all our active lawsuits are in the judicial process.
And it shows that Judicial Watch is currently pursuing a stunning total of **169 active lawsuits** on behalf of the rule of law and the American people's "right to know!"
This represents a **25% increase** over the 135 active lawsuits we were carrying just one year ago!
[**And that’s why I hope I can count on you to support us today with a special contribution.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71191&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71191&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

_Thanks to our members and supporters across America_ , no one in Washington fights as effectively through the legal system and the courts _against_ corrupt politicians in both parties and _in support_ of conservative values as Judicial Watch. Over the past year:

* We exposed the collaboration between Big Tech and government entities to curtail free speech;

* We removed more ineligible names from "dirty" voter rolls, putting us over 4.5 million total ineligible names removed from voter lists around the country;

* We stopped the state of Mississippi from counting votes for 5 days after election day;

* We got to the truth about the COVID scandal;

* We exposed the legal lawfare against President Trump instigated by the Biden-Harris Justice Department;

* And we educated millions of Americans about important corruption issues facing our nation.

But our legal (and all our) work carries _very real costs_ with it...especially since most of our lawsuits are filed _against federal and state government agencies_ , who have deep pockets thanks to being funded by taxpayers!

_And those costs increase every time we file a new lawsuit_ ...which is [**why I hope you will help us today.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71191&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71191&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Your gift now will help us carry forward all 169 of our active lawsuits... _and just as importantly, stay on track with the essential research and investigations that set the stage for each and every lawsuit we file_.

Your support will also help us be able to take on new investigations and lawsuits as new challenges to the rule of law arise... _and based on our 30 years of experience, we know they will_!

**Thank you in advance for helping us fight for you and for the rule of law!**

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71191&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: The mainstream media is imploding
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
And they deserve it.| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=68162328cb9e4d6c8c4496dce1799f99&_e=lzbyQm6NgzOMTh-6MFITqPGKiZAiBsPyJIP9HYwqY2m-U02PK1I_bdrf91a88yVcdYa799KnyitzhDrnw-k3pY9jNm_YfdYlRDxQ3EPIstR8i9P8x2DUtpKKr1zAzivw361XIDzFQO0t-aq-9p0y0ydBO-KfMEeK4u2oVDq_Xa3U0ac1QE18RGBi9jaXmdMzTPpJqD7t3khNYERca2vpUeggtGCuWoPdCCbYFmRBdVn0G7Yu5CDYooDyfTrQzjNgRqDTlukPA7dFLiQf3Mg8wZ0NvgDMePpe5GAEqIloQE4xm81MtDIJ5FQw__wH8WD-sxl2pbQNMYmEVgTzjN39xokmMlH74tOGT0urZPOdhmWIByexUxEXSlLz7ZSuMriQWnHOMyMjZiffF-ZkZP3NPK3HU0TdoHY4rd-pbfD5siCLYxRu8hwM7gWptKbN1kKTzLj52IDSEOiCcQxYngYLHw%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Republican, On October 25, 2023 I was elected to become the Speaker of the House. Immediately after my election came a tidal wave of hatred and vitriol from nearly every mainstream media outlet. They attacked my character. They attacked my family. They even attacked my Christian faith with ruthless determination... Just recently, we even caught them selectively editing my interviews!
And now, they’ve made a mockery of themselves throughout the 2024 Election season. **_[That’s why I’m inviting you to add your name to my letter of CONDEMNATION for the left-wing, mainstream media today!](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=68162328cb9e4d6c8c4496dce1799f99&_e=lzbyQm6NgzOMTh-6MFITqPGKiZAiBsPyJIP9HYwqY2m-U02PK1I_bdrf91a88yVcdYa799KnyitzhDrnw-k3pY9jNm_YfdYlRDxQ3EPIstR8i9P8x2DUtpKKr1zAzivw361XIDzFQO0t-aq-9p0y0ydBO-KfMEeK4u2oVDq_Xa3U0ac1QE18RGBi9jaXmdMzTPpJqD7t3khNYERca2vpUeggtGCuWoPdCCbYFmRBdVn0G7Yu5CDYooDyfTrQzjNgRqDTlukPA7dFLiQf3Mg8wZ0NvgDMePpe5GAEqIloQE4xm81MtDIJ5FQw__wH8WD-BRNMpYujE6MBFMakI9ln14mAplgu8RBqtRIrL0rcVjJWKEmeQi4xpodrzLDPLlVJXxv4p5P_qd49NstT5wbs_tTKguSpHb6Olw5Q660TagX6L8eGEmdiEKDpgO0JiGgUByea-buWLlO66ReWIWFh3A%3D%3D)_**
---
[**_ADD YOUR NAME_**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=68162328cb9e4d6c8c4496dce1799f99&_e=lzbyQm6NgzOMTh-6MFITqPGKiZAiBsPyJIP9HYwqY2m-U02PK1I_bdrf91a88yVcdYa799KnyitzhDrnw-k3pY9jNm_YfdYlRDxQ3EPIstR8i9P8x2DUtpKKr1zAzivw361XIDzFQO0t-aq-9p0y0ydBO-KfMEeK4u2oVDq_Xa3U0ac1QE18RGBi9jaXmdMzTPpJqD7t3khNYERca2vpUeggtGCuWoPdCCbYFmRBdVn0G7Yu5CDYooDyfTrQzjNgRqDTlukPA7dFLiQf3Mg8wZ0NvgDMePpe5GAEqIloQE4xm81MtDIJ5FQw__wH8WD-ubbh6KBDkoJ0cvJ58RTXb9ju5UBDbjSPwvEu_C9TJlKoBYGGFenL42SHweYx9OShUy0JOVfpiuZeph9QrF8t_aNd1-b8BaaYFTVbHAQJVeACc-SKDDDeLjMJm2Fx0KL3RweSL6ifzga0o5rGn41Abg%3D%3D)
---
Today, I can’t help but think that the attitude they took towards reporting my election as Speaker of the House is the very same attitude that is now causing their utter IMPLOSION! _The entire left-wing media complex is reeling from incorrectly predicting the outcome of the Presidential election once again!_ The lies, hatred and vitriol they leveled at me is nothing compared to that which they’ve leveled towards President Trump and his supporters.

The media cannot fathom why anyone would support the GOP and President Trump.

They call us “garbage”, “deplorables”, and probably worse behind closed-doors. **_Fellow Republican, the mainstream media has made clear that if you support President Trump, me, or anyone else who leans Conservative – you are their enemy and they disdain you._** **_And November 5, 2024 was an outright REJECTION of their narratives, their elitism, and their hatred – and the cherry on top is that viewers are leaving in droves because they don’t trust them anymore!_** **_[That’s why I’m reaching out today to ask you to sign my letter of CONDEMNATION to the Mainstream Media.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=68162328cb9e4d6c8c4496dce1799f99&_e=lzbyQm6NgzOMTh-6MFITqPGKiZAiBsPyJIP9HYwqY2m-U02PK1I_bdrf91a88yVcdYa799KnyitzhDrnw-k3pY9jNm_YfdYlRDxQ3EPIstR8i9P8x2DUtpKKr1zAzivw361XIDzFQO0t-aq-9p0y0ydBO-KfMEeK4u2oVDq_Xa3U0ac1QE18RGBi9jaXmdMzTPpJqD7t3khNYERca2vpUeggtGCuWoPdCCbYFmRBdVn0G7Yu5CDYooDyfTrQzjNgRqDTlukPA7dFLiQf3Mg8wZ0NvgDMePpe5GAEqIloQE4xm81MtDIJ5FQw__wH8WD-oP5T7lc2wnXU5Jz8esSLRM-hmQVEtg1Qqt0FYbKdtL3QHiqFNOONIUTHsb8s-Iq3Yh3j6EDUrFnvDos3ik1ljBRw-7-s83B_3G9uBEnsf9klbLpvfuwIX0Bti2YN5ZjzgzhhT-TrArocIuT7PKxsAg%3D%3D)_** The American people are DEMANDING (and DESERVE) a media that reports the TRUTH. And now is the time to DEMAND better and condemn biased, vicious, and radical left-wing reporting. I want to thank you for being one of the amazing patriots who questions the media narrative and fights to seek the truth and make a difference. God Bless you, Speaker Mike Johnson
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
---

name: Tiernan Donohue
subject: A recount is underway in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
body:
I’ll get straight to the point
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4883%2E552475%2EmkFJC3)
Peter,
I’ll get straight to the point. The recount in Pennsylvania’s Senate race is underway across the Commonwealth.
**[Fund our Recount Efforts ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241121-1?refcode=em20241121-1&refcode2=4883_552475_mkFJC3&akid=4883%2E552475%2EmkFJC3)**
Here’s what this means: The margin of this Senate race is so close that an automatic recount was announced by the Pennsylvania Secretary of State and is playing out.
Pennsylvania is where our democratic process began, and we must ensure Pennsylvanians’ voices are heard. All while national Republicans are working to throw out votes in an attempt to disenfranchise Pennsylvania voters.
We’re working to ensure that Pennsylvania voters’ voices are heard and their legal ballots are counted, but we need your help.
**[That’s why we need your support to help fund our legal effort. Whatever you can give will help ensure that this process is fair and impartial — and that Pennsylvanians’ rights are protected.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241121-1?refcode=em20241121-1&refcode2=4883_552475_mkFJC3&akid=4883%2E552475%2EmkFJC3)**
Thank you for being in this fight with us,
Tiernan Donohue
Campaign Manager
Bob Casey for Senate

name: GavinNewsom.com
subject: How are you doing?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
You are not alone

Friends —
I know many of us are still processing the results of the last election and what it means for our country. You are not alone.
But Governor Newsom wanted to reach out to see how you're doing, what you're thinking about when it comes to a second Trump administration, and the steps Democrats need to take in order to claw back some of these losses in the next election and beyond.
It's just a few questions — shouldn't take more than a minute or two of your time — and we'll be reviewing all of the results.
[**Use this link to take Governor Newsom's brief survey about the last election and where we go from here.**](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/survey-nov24/?source=em241121-1&akid=2285%2E4767699%2Eq4oNCb)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/survey-nov24/?source=em241121-1&akid=2285%2E4767699%2Eq4oNCb)
Shortly after the election, Governor Newsom held a Zoom call with more than 50,000 people. This survey and your feedback is an extension of that conversation.
Sound off using [**this link](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/survey-nov24/?source=em241121-1&akid=2285%2E4767699%2Eq4oNCb)**.
Thank you,
Team Newsom

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=2285%2E4767699%2Eq4oNCb).
PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: Peter, will you sign my petition to form the first American Shadow Cabinet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
It’s how we oppose Trump’s outrageous nominees like Matt Gaetz, RFK, and Tulsi Gabbard. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97445298/513442534/-488448398?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_NO_20241121_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGE4YmY5Yi0yNmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OjESvOEohMQ5zOet8sC9pwgyxC8kjg3m_c4euWrulXs=)
---
_An anti-vaccine conspiracy theorist for head of the health department._ _A Fox News talking head for Secretary of Defense._ _An election-denying MAGA fanboy — the subject of multiple ethics inquiries — for Attorney General._ Peter, Donald Trump’s cabinet nominations are even more unqualified and dangerous than we imagined. We need a real plan and fresh thinking to prepare ourselves to push back. We need a better way to explain how our policies help everyday Americans and sound the alarm when Trump policies would hurt them. **That’s why I’m calling for a Shadow Cabinet of highly qualified Democrats to counter the MAGA message with our own.[If you agree we need to organize now against Trump’s extreme agenda, please sign my petition calling for the formation of the first Democratic Shadow Cabinet.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97445300/513442536/-1795141349?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_NO_20241121_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGE4YmY5Yi0yNmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OjESvOEohMQ5zOet8sC9pwgyxC8kjg3m_c4euWrulXs=&emci=e570e7b8-24a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=cda8bf9b-26a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=28008880)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97445302/513442537/-1795141349?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_NO_20241121_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGE4YmY5Yi0yNmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OjESvOEohMQ5zOet8sC9pwgyxC8kjg3m_c4euWrulXs=&emci=e570e7b8-24a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=cda8bf9b-26a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=28008880)
---
With a shadow cabinet, there will be no hiding.
Each decision by the government will face a ready counterpoint — not just from the media and voters but also from political leaders poised to step in. It’s democracy’s insurance policy, and it strengthens the government, too.
Right now, we need qualified messengers to explain to the American people what we stand for; something we didn’t do enough of this cycle.
Imagine Sen. Adam Schiff, as our shadow attorney general, holding Matt Gaetz’s feet to the fire if he tries weaponizing our Justice Department. Or Rep. Rosa DeLauro pushing back on RFK Jr’s attempts to ban vaccines or strip abortion rights.
**This shadow cabinet isn’t just about opposing extreme MAGA attacks on our government. It’s about holding Donald Trump and his dangerous Cabinet accountable by assigning a watchdog to each and every agency.**
[**Peter, please add your name and support my plan for a Democratic Shadow Cabinet to directly oppose Donald Trump and his extreme allies.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97445303/513442538/-1795141349?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_GEN_PET_NO_20241121_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGE4YmY5Yi0yNmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OjESvOEohMQ5zOet8sC9pwgyxC8kjg3m_c4euWrulXs=&emci=e570e7b8-24a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=cda8bf9b-26a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=28008880)

clean_body: It’s how we oppose Trump’s outrageous nominees like Matt Gaetz, RFK, and Tulsi Gabbard. | = An anti-vaccine conspiracy theorist for head of the health department. A Fox News talking head for Secretary of Defense. An election-denying MAGA fanboy — the subject of multiple ethics inquiries — for Attorney General. Peter, Donald Trump’s cabinet nominations are even more unqualified and dangerous than we imagined. We need a real plan and fresh thinking to prepare ourselves to push back. We need a better way to explain how our policies help everyday Americans and sound the alarm when Trump policies would hurt them. That’s why I’m calling for a Shadow Cabinet of highly qualified Democrats to counter the MAGA message with our own. | With a shadow cabinet, there will be no hiding. Each decision by the government will face a ready counterpoint — not just from the media and voters but also from political leaders poised to step in. It’s democracy’s insurance policy, and it strengthens the government, too. Right now, we need qualified messengers to explain to the American people what we stand for; something we didn’t do enough of this cycle. Imagine Sen. Adam Schiff, as our shadow attorney general, holding Matt Gaetz’s feet to the fire if he tries weaponizing our Justice Department. Or Rep. Rosa DeLauro pushing back on RFK Jr’s attempts to ban vaccines or strip abortion rights. This shadow cabinet isn’t just about opposing extreme MAGA attacks on our government. It’s about holding Donald Trump and his dangerous Cabinet accountable by assigning a watchdog to each and every agency. Thanks for standing with me. — Wiley Wiley Nickel for North Carolina PO Box 563 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States | mailto:info@wileynickel.com | Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina

Matt Gaetz, President-elect Donald Trump's nominee for Attorney General, is _unfit_ to lead the Department of Justice. His track record of hostility toward reproductive autonomy and women's rights is alarming.

[**The Center for Reproductive Rights stands firmly against his nomination. If you agree, join us by signing our petition today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97445393/513442730/1519650275?sourceid=1150054&utm_campaign=25emkge-1110aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=petition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjRjYjllNS0yNmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inTT860tMXKe9UfFUUAjPsqsqCmur9g_FuWl-Q5nYQs=&emci=f84bb9e5-26a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=0b4cb9e5-26a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=954237) | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97445394/513442731/1519650275?sourceid=1150054&utm_campaign=25emkge-1110aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=petition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjRjYjllNS0yNmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inTT860tMXKe9UfFUUAjPsqsqCmur9g_FuWl-Q5nYQs=&emci=f84bb9e5-26a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=0b4cb9e5-26a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=954237 "SIGN THE PETITION")
---
**Here's why we must act:**
* **He champions federal abortion bans** —Gaetz has co-sponsored multiple attempts to strip away reproductive rights
* **He stood against justice for victims** —As a Florida legislator, he was one of only two to vote against criminalizing revenge porn
* **He mocked abortion rights advocates** —Following the overturn of _Roe v. Wade,_ Gaetz publicly degraded protesters, making cruel and dehumanizing remarks about their appearances

Matt Gaetz's actions and rhetoric leave no doubt: his extreme views threaten the dignity, safety, and rights of millions. We cannot allow him to serve as the nation’s chief law enforcement officer.

[**Say NO to Matt Gaetz. Add your name to oppose his nomination now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97445395/513442732/1519650275?sourceid=1150054&utm_campaign=25emkge-1110aab-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=petition&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjRjYjllNS0yNmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=inTT860tMXKe9UfFUUAjPsqsqCmur9g_FuWl-Q5nYQs=&emci=f84bb9e5-26a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=0b4cb9e5-26a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=954237)

**Fellow Republican, I’ve opened this up exclusively for TOP PATRIOTS like you!** Guiding our country back on track is absolutely critical for the future of our country and our Party. That’s why we need our Republican Party leaders on the same page. As Speaker, I want to ensure that we’re able to hit the ground running as soon as President Trump puts his hand on the Bible in January and returns to the White House. [**But that can’t happen if we don’t have feedback from our top conservatives. # **[NEW PODCAST EPISODE OUT NOW](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=5ef8c63779&e=5bd167f239)**
---
| [ ](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=d1b9b0805d&e=5bd167f239 "The Path Forward: Rebuilding Latino Support | The Latino Vote Episode 64 - Featuring Carlos Odio")
---
The Path Forward: Rebuilding Latino Support |
The Latino Vote Episode 64 - Featuring Carlos Odio
| Mike Madrid welcomes back the **leading expert in Latino voter data and co-founder of EquisLabs, Carlos Odio**. Together, they separate **fact from fiction of the 2024 election** , and contemplate **a path forward for the Democratic Party** by reconnecting with the Latino working-class.
---
|
---
| | | |
**Today's Headlines:**

[Union organizer and political strategist Chuck Rocha weighs run for DNC chair](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=33d192cc0d&e=5bd167f239) By: Raw Story

[Moorpark College Alumnus Mike Madrid Recognized as a 2024 Distinguished Alumni Honoree](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=13e1e3bfc3&e=5bd167f239) By: CaliforniaCityNews

[Democrats suffered devastating losses in 2024 elections. The race to take over the party has begun.](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=2527191563&e=5bd167f239) By: CBS News

[Democratic strategist hints at running to lead the DNC in order to make 'Democrats fun again'](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=35cb5054a3&e=5bd167f239) By: FOX News

[How to Win Latino Voters](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=2cd5d918ea&e=5bd167f239) By: The New York Times

[Arizona Senator-elect Ruben Gallego Offers Tips For Democrats To Win Back Latino Voters After 2024 Rout](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=95a143c687&e=5bd167f239) By: The Latin Times

clean_body: | = Peter, we need your help. As of now, there’s still thousands of votes to be counted in some of the most competitive House districts across the country. We must ensure each and every one of these ballots are counted so we can elect representatives that believe in protecting reproductive freedoms, democracy, and Medicare. That’s why we are contacting voters to help make sure that rejected ballots are fixed and submitted and sending our staff to these two battleground districts to monitor vote counting. = But, Peter, this work is expensive and we’re running out of time and money.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Fair Shot PAC, Adam Gray, Derek Tran, and Jared Golden will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = — Fair Shot PAC Fair Shot PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | mailto:info@fairshotpac.org | Paid for by Fair Shot PAC

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.
IN THE COMMUNITY
https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424 [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke River Contamination Settlement Reached Roanoke Young Democrats Canvass Tailgate
Without current regulations, the water contamination caused by these companies could have been so much worse. Come out to support Roanoke Valley Democratic candidates!
Read More [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] The Roanoke Young Democrats will be enjoying pizza, coffee, donuts and more before canvassing to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn. Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm!
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!
Read More [https://web.cvent.com/event/19422342-be4f-417d-9fc3-6a6bf883e794/summary]
https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992 [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/ [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] Read More [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RCDC.jpeg] Join the Roanoke City Democrats!
Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.
Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved!
Donate Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samrasoul]
Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.
My very best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-29%20at%203.44.06%20PM%20%281%29.png]
Del. Sam Rasoul

name: Team DASS
subject: NEW: Key Iowa House race officially goes to a RECOUNT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
| **BREAKING: Key Iowa House race officially goes to a RECOUNT** Folks, Right now, the margin in IA-1 between Democrat Christina Bohannan and Republican Mariannette Miller-Meeks is down to just a**few hundred votes. ** _**This race is too close to call and is OFFICIALLY headed to a recount.**_ Every single ballot could determine the outcome, and we need to make sure every voice is heard. But the process isn't over yet, and ensuring every vote is properly counted takes resources. That’s why your support – right now – is so important. We need to ensure we have the resources to protect the integrity of this election and make sure every vote is counted fairly and accurately. [**So please, will you make a donation between DASS and Christina Bohannan’s recount fund today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97447195/513448948/-185112536?refcode=em-11.21.24-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjE5MTAxZi0yYWE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K6CkQv-g4HQlkxtStI780acHXm6Wzy1kt4QZMYbnkL8=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97447196/513448950/-185112536?refcode=em-11.21.24-all-rs&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjE5MTAxZi0yYWE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K6CkQv-g4HQlkxtStI780acHXm6Wzy1kt4QZMYbnkL8=)**

name: MassGOP
subject: Representative DeCoste Blocks Mayor Wu’s Tax Hike, Defends Boston’s Economic Future
body:
| | | | |
---
| [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pBHjBwjq2Ju5OgAcCNgHTA0r4d3cmf8XOVed0QOe25P-oJeDJjsg9zzs_ynP_jaI1vkP0GtfTGKjj9iGIs2sAL1pat5dsc2nPB_c4CjticnM9NSxs_bNCk_4LiJVgq9GdoE_DED0i8ic4bSyckNhNg==&c=aRBJv1uMt5xFxxVHr5bu3Wl8h_3GcpOjBXUc3GO8ECGbDZQK23tVBw==&ch=ziPjXz6IlC8RGTR5xS-zjK-zGDWTP1GTBchRsa8s9liKFzkbWiRaQA==)
---
| Representative DeCoste Blocks Mayor Wu's Tax Hike, Defends Boston's Economic Future
---
---
| Boston, MA-Today, Representative David DeCoste (R-Norwell) blocked a vote to increase commercial real estate tax in Boston. This decisive action comes as Mayor Michelle Wu continues her push to fund an ever-growing, bloated budget that has expanded annually since she took office.
Mayor Wu has taken the alarming step of threatening homeowners with massive tax hikes if she is unable to secure higher taxes on Boston's already struggling commercial real estate sector.
Representative DeCoste warned of the broad implications of Mayor Wu's tax proposal:
"This tax increase would have huge impacts not only on the city of Boston but on the entire Commonwealth. My constituents have a vested interest in Boston thriving as it's a major business hub for the state. Overburdening commercial real estate with tax increases will inevitably lead to foreclosures, and there's no doubt about that. We already have vacancy rates averaging over 40% in properties that are highly leveraged. The majority of the legislature quietly agrees with this concern, even if they won't say it out loud."
As Boston faces a pivotal moment, Representative DeCoste's leadership is a call to action for fiscal responsibility and a rejection of policies that threaten to cripple the city's economic future. The MassGOP stands firmly behind efforts to protect all of the residents and businesses of the Commonwealth from irresponsible governance and a crushing tax burden. ###
---
---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Representative DeCoste Blocks Mayor Wu's Tax Hike, Defends Boston's Economic Future | Boston, MA-Today, Representative David DeCoste (R-Norwell) blocked a vote to increase commercial real estate tax in Boston. This decisive action comes as Mayor Michelle Wu continues her push to fund an ever-growing, bloated budget that has expanded annually since she took office. Mayor Wu has taken the alarming step of threatening homeowners with massive tax hikes if she is unable to secure higher taxes on Boston's already struggling commercial real estate sector. Representative DeCoste warned of the broad implications of Mayor Wu's tax proposal: "This tax increase would have huge impacts not only on the city of Boston but on the entire Commonwealth. My constituents have a vested interest in Boston thriving as it's a major business hub for the state. Overburdening commercial real estate with tax increases will inevitably lead to foreclosures, and there's no doubt about that. We already have vacancy rates averaging over 40% in properties that are highly leveraged. The majority of the legislature quietly agrees with this concern, even if they won't say it out loud." As Boston faces a pivotal moment, Representative DeCoste's leadership is a call to action for fiscal responsibility and a rejection of policies that threaten to cripple the city's economic future. The MassGOP stands firmly behind efforts to protect all of the residents and businesses of the Commonwealth from irresponsible governance and a crushing tax burden. ### | | == | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | |

| Peter, Sarah McBride didn’t run for Congress to fight about bathrooms. She ran to fight for Delawareans. But that didn’t stop the MAGA GOP from announcing an anti-trans bathroom ban at the Capitol in an effort to distract from the real issues facing this country. [Can you split an urgent $15 contribution to stand with Sarah and send a powerful message to the GOP that we support her as she prepares to fight for us in Congress?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ae667ab-89da-427a-b9e7-ea4d73f2ffd5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | We know what this political stunt really is: a blatant attempt from the extreme MAGA right to distract from their chaotic caucus, Donald Trump’s unqualified nominees, and their dangerous Project 2025 agenda. Full stop. Mike Johnson and the right-wing professional provocateurs in the House are hellbent on fighting about bathrooms and manufacturing culture wars. Meanwhile, Sarah is focused on what an overwhelming majority of voters in Delaware elected her to do: build bridges and find solutions to bring down the costs of housing, health care, and child care. That’s how Sarah led the successful effort to pass paid medical and family leave, raise the minimum wage, and expand health care access as State Senator in Delaware. And that’s exactly the results-driven approach she’s bringing to Washington — and she won’t let extremists slow down her efforts. [If you stand with Sarah, split a grassroots contribution of $15 between her campaign and Blue Amp Action → ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f65ecd6-e37b-4c0e-aa54-dd68f796e695/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T04ca50e3-c35e-49c2-a1af-a2ec0216cfa7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Hey team — I’m Grant, Vice President of Data, Research and Polling here at NextGen. Nice to meet you!
I spent a lot of time this year looking at data and studying voter trends. And now that the election’s over, it’s clear that part of the reason MAGA extremists won to such an extent is that core components of our youth vote coalition shifted away from us.
**Particularly young men.**
Just look at the data. _**Young men had the biggest swing toward Trump since 2020 of any age and gender demographic.**_
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97450192/513458872/-1274717681?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTlhODM5OC0yZGE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7kFbJJSLjmw4HCUP7XvOXbGB1zrDrQiRdWHRilXCMKw=&emci=95b62948-b5a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=459a8398-2da8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=6787172)
The progressive movement is at a crossroads. We can either continue letting young men slide toward extremism, _or we can meet them where they are._
NextGen is leading the charge to bring young men back into the fold. We’re centering the issues that matter most to them and giving them the tools to fight for progress. **But we can’t do it without you.**
[Empowering young voters and building a strong youth coalition is what NextGen is all about. clean_body: Here’s how we fix it | Hey team — I’m Grant, Vice President of Data, Research and Polling here at NextGen. Nice to meet you! I spent a lot of time this year looking at data and studying voter trends. And now that the election’s over, it’s clear that part of the reason MAGA extremists won to such an extent is that core components of our youth vote coalition shifted away from us. Particularly young men. Just look at the data. Young men had the biggest swing toward Trump since 2020 of any age and gender demographic. The progressive movement is at a crossroads. We can either continue letting young men slide toward extremism, or we can meet them where they are. NextGen is leading the charge to bring young men back into the fold. We’re centering the issues that matter most to them and giving them the tools to fight for progress. But we can’t do it without you. | | | | | | Let’s do this, Wiles Vice President of Data, Research, & Polling NextGen PAC | Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; ; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | = |

body:
You've been selected to provide your feedback!
| [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=79fcadb1a1fb4c48b1dbc90cd2703e90&_e=DNcPns8tsHMDyIgKRAkzQh7j6Vjo284Eiba29pT6shue5riz-V7xVeFWA59LBWancJ_8L9Fhe-MIPPhX7B4VuSn_nCrpymb92AlZ55_6doXpEzPP5psYfJs0Hqn82gFYmWZGtdT_qyBPVvRv1OR0RUfjyDyA_C4EQOdvMpIN68yMSeCKrrH_OeazS--hkeFEh8ny8Hrco7Zq_Z-tDtvMqNYvCY6kT4EcTXVcr2pIljKtvfqLzI3s00UWpdhERvK-k2epdNjFPxf2sf4PxDRlCiUiXuh-lXJDzTQiFpO8W8XkHxOLY8JHuIpExlwNMtjdAquhLsZopDpIBRL099xV9Q%3D%3D)

Peter,

President Trump has officially nominated Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy to lead a new program, the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), to CUT WASTEFUL SPENDING and make sure our tax dollars are SPENT WISELY!

_**Now, Elon and Vivek are CROWDSOURCING the American People to determine what should be cut first.**_

[**YOU HAVE BEEN SELECTED TO PROVIDE YOUR FEEDBACK!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=79fcadb1a1fb4c48b1dbc90cd2703e90&_e=DNcPns8tsHMDyIgKRAkzQh7j6Vjo284Eiba29pT6shue5riz-V7xVeFWA59LBWancJ_8L9Fhe-MIPPhX7B4VuSn_nCrpymb92AlZ55_6doXpEzPP5psYfJs0Hqn82gFYmWZGtdT_qyBPVvRv1OR0RUfjyDyA_C4EQOdvMpIN68yMSeCKrrH_OeazS--hkeFEJnkJquFXKuLY4Bq25rCk4oQB3PBJXHlDz3MnZm-MZBo7HMCu096dLNewBAr1VVAjkp3GC7OeJuPmIEBAo9o5rEQmx_W82fVzEI6CjLssUz5Sh-AfSiVMOU8x1E-q4SPAxNZ-chzLV3-HJwPMNRNeLw%3D%3D)
[**Use this secure link to share what YOU think should be cut first!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=79fcadb1a1fb4c48b1dbc90cd2703e90&_e=DNcPns8tsHMDyIgKRAkzQh7j6Vjo284Eiba29pT6shue5riz-V7xVeFWA59LBWancJ_8L9Fhe-MIPPhX7B4VuSn_nCrpymb92AlZ55_6doXpEzPP5psYfJs0Hqn82gFYmWZGtdT_qyBPVvRv1OR0RUfjyDyA_C4EQOdvMpIN68yMSeCKrrH_OeazS--hkeFEPiVq2oekplFH-tdcI8bGrxkP8AnSza3XFj2zzZUISLnNBubWsBE74uONCYA9gzmFAshnM1j310Ei_PvWdsXNUWJpLTx-3YONpCl-oDqgKEWoU2P4YEzvyLGSkkXrjcFu9VLvd1xdzCAb6IB0brhzxg%3D%3D)

_**In 2023 alone, the Federal Government WASTED OVER $900 BILLION OF TAX DOLLARS!**_

Elon and Vivek are set to SLASH the most wasteful spending across the Federal Government, but with so much to tackle, they need to know where to start!

_The American People gave President Trump and CLEAR MANDATE to Make America Great Again, and it starts with DEFUNDING the most useless Government Programs._

[**Can you take two minutes to provide your feedback before we have to move onto the next patriot?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=79fcadb1a1fb4c48b1dbc90cd2703e90&_e=DNcPns8tsHMDyIgKRAkzQh7j6Vjo284Eiba29pT6shue5riz-V7xVeFWA59LBWancJ_8L9Fhe-MIPPhX7B4VuSn_nCrpymb92AlZ55_6doXpEzPP5psYfJs0Hqn82gFYmWZGtdT_qyBPVvRv1OR0RUfjyDyA_C4EQOdvMpIN68yMSeCKrrH_OeazS--hkeFE0Xz36GHFVJ69M5bQGR8fV9gMhbYGs1VLjudm6wwgAi5AwvDCktMdfCzO1POWOYZhnW_QyPQzJTT9CQVQMwy3PUDlpHTBAJ_iDXj-R1VpZ6pxYh76-pgrKEA-HDy2RjPJdCmqnMcQtKkP6xXOeTtHqQ%3D%3D)

Thank you,
Kailey, Government Waste Updates

name: The Voter Protection Project
subject: Sarah McBride didn’t run for Congress to fight about bathrooms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Folks,

**Sarah McBride didn’t run for Congress to fight about bathrooms.** She ran to fight for Delawareans. But that didn’t stop the MAGA GOP from announcing an anti-trans bathroom ban at the Capitol in an effort to distract from the real issues facing this country.

[Can you split an urgent $10 contribution to stand with Sarah and send a powerful message to the GOP that we support her as she prepares to fight for us in Congress? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85138?t=6&akid=18083%2E878179%2EnEo8p4) | [**RUSH A DONATION »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85138?t=7&akid=18083%2E878179%2EnEo8p4)
---
We know what this political stunt really is: _a blatant attempt from the extreme MAGA right to distract from their chaotic caucus, Donald Trump’s unqualified nominees, and their dangerous Project 2025 agenda. Full stop._

Mike Johnson and the right-wing professional provocateurs in the House are hellbent on fighting about bathrooms and manufacturing culture wars.

**Meanwhile, Sarah is focused on what an _overwhelming_ majority of voters in Delaware elected her to do:** build bridges and find solutions to bring down the costs of housing, health care, and child care.

That’s how Sarah led the successful effort to pass paid medical and family leave, raise the minimum wage, and expand health care access as State Senator in Delaware. And that’s exactly the results-driven approach she’s bringing to Washington — and she won’t let extremists slow down her efforts.

[If you stand with Sarah, split a grassroots contribution of $10 between her campaign and the Voter Protection Project →](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85138?t=8&akid=18083%2E878179%2EnEo8p4)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sarah McBride and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85139?t=9&akid=18083%2E878179%2EnEo8p4)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85140?t=10&akid=18083%2E878179%2EnEo8p4)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85141?t=11&akid=18083%2E878179%2EnEo8p4)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85142?t=12&akid=18083%2E878179%2EnEo8p4)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/85143?t=13&akid=18083%2E878179%2EnEo8p4)
Thank you,

The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18083%2E878179%2EnEo8p4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18083%2E878179%2EnEo8p4).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18083%2E878179%2EnEo8p4) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=18083%2E878179%2EnEo8p4). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=18083%2E878179%2EnEo8p4)
---

name: COURIER
subject: Matt Gaetz: Accused, unqualified—and propped up by the right-wing media
body:
New documents allege Gaetz is guilty of sexual misconduct. You wouldn’t know from Fox News and the right-wing media.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97452244/513465186/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWNiMjg0ODQtMzFhOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2OudOZZ4VVB8L6OFb5gqagabyqRqhyN5jkRZ5XfV1vc=&emci=a2b28484-31a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=acb28484-31a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
One of Donald Trump’s most alarming cabinet picks, former U.S. Rep. Matt Gaetz, is facing disturbing allegations of sexual misconduct, according to a damning report from _The New York Times_.
Federal investigators uncovered evidence that Gaetz paid for sex with a 17-year-old girl. The investigation was halted only because Gaetz resigned from Congress to accept his nomination as Trump’s Attorney General.
Yet, right-wing media is rushing to defend him.
**Let’s be clear: putting Gaetz in charge of the Justice Department sends a chilling message to survivors of sexual assault. How can victims trust justice will be served when the nation’s top law enforcement official is mired in credible allegations of exploitation and abuse?**
**[Peter, this is why COURIER’s mission to expose the dangerous influence of right-wing propaganda has never been more critical. As _Fox News_ and its allies work to normalize and defend Gaetz, your support helps us fight back with factual, fearless reporting. Can you chip in $25 now to counter their lies and stand up for truth?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97452245/513465187/-593472309?refcode=20241121-EM-GaetzCoverage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWNiMjg0ODQtMzFhOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2OudOZZ4VVB8L6OFb5gqagabyqRqhyN5jkRZ5XfV1vc=)**
Here’s how the right-wing media is spinning the allegations against Gaetz:
* **_Fox_ ’s Jesse Watters:** Compared Gaetz’s confirmation process to the Salem witch trials, claiming Democrats were “weaponizing the DOJ.”
* **Tucker Carlson:** Called federal investigators “secret police” who “slander people through the media.”
* **Sean Hannity:** Likened Gaetz to Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh, portraying him as a victim of partisan attacks.
* **Greg Gutfeld:** Shrugged off the accusations with, “We all have stuff in our past.”

_Fox News_ and Trump’s right-wing media allies are standing by Gaetz, not because he’s qualified, but because their loyalty to Trump outweighs any sense of moral responsibility or responsibility to the rule of law.
**This is where COURIER comes in.** We’re reaching millions of Americans in the same digital spaces where their misinformation spreads, exposing their propaganda and holding them accountable.
But we can’t do this without you. With Trump’s media allies working to normalize Gaetz’s nomination and do Trump’s bidding, the fight for truth is more urgent than ever.
[**Will you chip in $25 now to help us expand our reach and fight back?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97452246/513465188/-593472309?refcode=20241121-EM-GaetzCoverage&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWNiMjg0ODQtMzFhOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2OudOZZ4VVB8L6OFb5gqagabyqRqhyN5jkRZ5XfV1vc=)

clean_body: New documents allege Gaetz is guilty of sexual misconduct. You wouldn’t know from Fox News and the right-wing media. Peter – One of Donald Trump’s most alarming cabinet picks, former U.S. Rep. Matt Gaetz, is facing disturbing allegations of sexual misconduct, according to a damning report from The New York Times. Federal investigators uncovered evidence that Gaetz paid for sex with a 17-year-old girl. The investigation was halted only because Gaetz resigned from Congress to accept his nomination as Trump’s Attorney General. Yet, right-wing media is rushing to defend him. Let’s be clear: putting Gaetz in charge of the Justice Department sends a chilling message to survivors of sexual assault. How can victims trust justice will be served when the nation’s top law enforcement official is mired in credible allegations of exploitation and abuse? = Here’s how the right-wing media is spinning the allegations against Gaetz: Fox ’s Jesse Watters: Compared Gaetz’s confirmation process to the Salem witch trials, claiming Democrats were “weaponizing the DOJ.” Tucker Carlson: Called federal investigators “secret police” who “slander people through the media.” Sean Hannity: Likened Gaetz to Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh, portraying him as a victim of partisan attacks. Greg Gutfeld: Shrugged off the accusations with, “We all have stuff in our past.” Fox News and Trump’s right-wing media allies are standing by Gaetz, not because he’s qualified, but because their loyalty to Trump outweighs any sense of moral responsibility or responsibility to the rule of law. This is where COURIER comes in. We’re reaching millions of Americans in the same digital spaces where their misinformation spreads, exposing their propaganda and holding them accountable. But we can’t do this without you. With Trump’s media allies working to normalize Gaetz’s nomination and do Trump’s bidding, the fight for truth is more urgent than ever. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thank you for standing with us, The COURIER Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: AOC
subject: It’s disgusting.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Nancy Mace and Speaker Johnson don’t have a plan to enforce this and it primes women and girls for assault.
#
_Content warning: This email references sexual assault._
What Nancy Mace and Speaker Mike Johnson are doing is endangering all women and girls. Because if you ask them, “What is your plan to enforce a transgender bathroom ban?” — **they won’t come up with an answer**.
What it inevitably results in are women and girls who are primed for assault because people are going to want to check their private parts in suspecting who is trans, who is cis, and who is doing what.
And so Nancy Mace wants little girls and women to drop trou in front of who, an investigator? Who would _that_ be? Because she wants to point fingers at who she thinks is trans? **It is disgusting**.
Frankly, all it does is allow these Republicans to go around and bully any woman who isn’t wearing a skirt because they think she might not look “woman enough.”
**People have a right to express themselves, to dress how they want, and to be who they are**. And if a woman doesn’t look “woman enough” to a Republican, they want to be able to inspect her genitals to use a bathroom?
It’s disgusting and everybody in Congress — no matter how you feel on this issue — should reject it completely.
In solidarity,
Alexandria

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=1&akid=7620%2E2526796%2E6ee7Gd) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=2&akid=7620%2E2526796%2E6ee7Gd) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=3&akid=7620%2E2526796%2E6ee7Gd)
---|---|---
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=4&akid=7620%2E2526796%2E6ee7Gd)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=7620%2E2526796%2E6ee7Gd). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Need you activated, Peter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Hey Peter— it’s time to get off the sidelines.
Trump’s going to purge any senior flag officers he perceives as “disloyal” when he retakes office. He’s going to use Purity Boards to do it — collections of what will probably be the most extreme true believers you can think of redlining any Three- or Four-Star General or Admiral they want out.
These Purity Boards will exist outside of the Military. They will report directly to Trump. They’ll have no checks on their power. And they will single out any and all senior officers that they believe will be loyal to the Constitution above Trump.
Do you want a direct path to permanently degrading our National Security, doing deep and lasting damage to the office corps? Do you want “Yes Men” and “Yes Women” who will roll over to Trump’s every command — with no consideration for the Constitution, civil rights, or the honor and dignity that serving in the most powerful Military in history demands?
Hell no.
Trump’s going to do everything he can to destroy the Military and remake it in his image. And we’re going to do everything we can to make sure the country knows that his administration is not just politicizing the Military, it’s not just getting rid of our most essential and seasoned officers.
This is the most serious threat environment any of us have seen in our lifetime. And Trump’s purge of the Military will make each and every American less safe.
We need you active, Peter. We need you speaking out about this. And we need you with us.
If every single Veteran, every member of a Military Family, every supporter reading this email signed on we would have hundreds of thousands of people speaking out against Trump and these ridiculous and dangerous plans.
But not everyone will join us. That’s why it’s so important that you do, if you understand how serious this is.
[**Please, Peter. Add your name and join VoteVets and the ranks of Americans speaking out against Trump’s “Purity Boards” and his goal to destroy the Military.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/241113_vv_em_purity_boards/?refcode=em241121-1-30&akid=33987%2E3013755%2EAO4WLI)**
| [ADD YOUR VOICE](https://act.votevets.org/signup/241113_vv_em_purity_boards/?refcode=em241121-1-30&akid=33987%2E3013755%2EAO4WLI)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
