He is going on a hiring spree appointing loyalists who will do his bidding like Matt Gaetz and RFK Jr. **Here’s the good news:** Thousands of people have stepped up since Election Day to power our Fight Fund program to help us win the final races for candidates who will hold Trump accountable these next four years. So what it means is that in order to hit our goals, we either need lots and lots more donations -- or we need people to give a little bit more. We know you’re tired. We are, too.

After the election, it’s been nonstop with bad news coming from Donald Trump — from the ever-worsening list of appointees to his deranged tweets. And it sucks.

We’re so grateful for your support over the last few months. It may feel like it was for nothing. It may sting. But we are not quitting.

It’s time to stand up again. We are not going to let MAGA walk over the fabric of our democracy for the next four years.

We both know what happens and what will happen if the GOP goes unchecked. When we stand together and push back, we win.

When I spoke to the Wall Street Journal Monday, I told them I didn't think Matt Gaetz would make it to the nomination hearings.
I said that online, too. People were skeptical.
I know Florida, y'all.
Gaetz is not the worst possible pick, though. It can (and will) get worse.
Now more than every, we need information we can trust, from people we trust.

body:
Pennsylvania’s Senate race isn’t over.
| | |

I wanted to send you a quick update on what’s happening here on the ground in Pennsylvania’s Senate race:
David McCormick and national Republicans are working to throw out votes in an attempt to disenfranchise Pennsylvania voters and ultimately impact the outcome of this election.

subject: What’s next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97455206/513474013/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTdiMGY4ZC0zNmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oGEYN9P54pw_fvSV0DE4rMwJXOAga_N2vskzYRh52SE=&emci=537b0f8d-36a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=5e7b0f8d-36a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=7731215)

| | After Donald Trump's re-election, many of you have been asking: What's next? It's easy to feel overwhelmed in moments like this, particularly when there's a lot of noise about the election — about what went wrong and what the Democratic Party needs to do differently to reach more people. **Despite all of the chatter, there are real ways big and small we can all start to help move this country forward through the hard times.** Here's what I'm doing in the next few weeks:
1. In the Senate, we're working hard to confirm important Biden judicial and administrative nominees before Trump is inaugurated, despite Republican opposition. We've been voting late into the night and plan to continue as long as it takes.

2. I'm listening to Oregonians. Talking to real people about the issues that matter most to them will help our movement move forward. Everyday Americans aren't relitigating past elections; they're trying to put food on the table, pay their rent or mortgage, and take care of their families and loved ones.

3. From Trump's nominations to key roles to the fine print of Project 2025, I'm taking a serious look at ways in which we can protect the rights of everyday Americans and hold a Trump administration accountable to our country's laws.

**We have faced dark times before.** But out of darkness comes the opportunity to make our country something better than it was before. The values we're fighting for are the right ones, and if we stay engaged, victories will come. We'll go forward together. Onward! _Jeff_ [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97455207/513474014/-2122444374?refcode=2024-11-20-next&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=5e7b0f8d-36a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTdiMGY4ZC0zNmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oGEYN9P54pw_fvSV0DE4rMwJXOAga_N2vskzYRh52SE=) |

name: MassDems
subject: Announcing the MassDems Listening Tour
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Dear MassDems,
As we reflect on the 2024 elections and plan for the future, we are launching a virtual Listening Tour to engage with our community across the state. This initiative is an opportunity for us to review the outcomes of the recent elections, celebrate successes, and identify areas for growth. Your input is vital to shaping our strategy moving forward.
Purpose of the Listening Tour
* Analyze what worked well during the 2024 election cycle.
* Gather constructive feedback on areas where we can improve.
* Foster a collaborative environment where all voices are heard.
We will use available voting data to inform our discussions, ensuring that the conversation is grounded in facts and focused on actionable insights.
Event Format
The Listening Tour will consist of virtual public forums held via Zoom. To ensure everyone has a chance to contribute:
* Participants will have up to 2 minutes to speak . Sign-ups will be available on a first-come, first-served basis.
* Those unable to attend or prefer to provide additional input can submit written feedback through an online form which will be circulated on our social medias and through email as the Listening Tour begins.
This format lets us hear equally from as many people as possible while creating a structured and respectful discussion environment.
How to Participate
* A full schedule of Listening Tour dates and registration details will be shared soon.
* We encourage all members and supporters to participate, whether by speaking during the forum or submitting written feedback.
Your voice matters, and this is your opportunity to help us build on our successes and strengthen our movement for the future. Together, we can ensure the Massachusetts Democratic Party continues to represent and advocate for the values that matter most to our communities.
Thank you for your commitment and dedication. We look forward to hearing from you.
Onward,
Steve Kerrigan
Chair, Massachusetts Democratic Party
Adam Roof
Executive Director, Massachusetts Democratic Party

name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: humbly asking for $15
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:

clean_body: Peter, I wanted you to be the first to know: | | | = Peter, I wanted you to be the first to know: I opened my 2025 Democratic Membership Drive and selected you for EARLY renewal. = = = = = = Peter, the work for the next election starts NOW. MAGA mega-donors are already scheming to spend MILLIONS of dollars in the most critical battleground races to get a head start. If we want to elect Democrats to the House, we must not allow this early fundraising to go unchallenged. = = = = = = = | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: I need your personal endorsement, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Peter, I know I usually ask you for money. But today, I’m asking for something else: [**I need your personal endorsement.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97455893/513475922/79150689?source=20241121_em_pet_b1_raja_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2E1YTRjZi0zN2E4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qFZ-e6_sF1YJ_Vx84_2DHAaQ2iChG_vsH486ZpYvrpw=&emci=758cfc0a-b6a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a3a5a4cf-37a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=21346897) **[_If you already believe in me and my campaign, you can go ahead and sign your name here. If you’re not sure yet, let me explain and fight for your support. >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97455894/513475924/79150689?source=20241121_em_pet_b1_raja_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2E1YTRjZi0zN2E4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qFZ-e6_sF1YJ_Vx84_2DHAaQ2iChG_vsH486ZpYvrpw=&emci=758cfc0a-b6a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a3a5a4cf-37a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=21346897)** Peter, I want you to know my story: When my parents first arrived in the United States, they faced prejudice and economic hardship. They relied on public housing and food assistance when times were tough. They worked hard to achieve the American Dream — and give me the opportunity to become who I am today. But now, MAGA extremists are fighting to destroy the programs that made my story possible. So when I talk about taking back our House Majority, it isn’t just about politics. It’s deeply personal. **[_It’s because of my upbringing that I believe all Americans deserve a fighting chance. That’s why I’m leading the charge to make sure our hardworking Democrats take back the House in this next election — but I need to make sure my supporters have my back as I do. So please, Peter, will you take 30 seconds, add your name now, and become one of the 300 supporters I need to stand with me before midnight? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97455895/513475926/79150689?source=20241121_em_pet_b1_raja_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2E1YTRjZi0zN2E4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qFZ-e6_sF1YJ_Vx84_2DHAaQ2iChG_vsH486ZpYvrpw=&emci=758cfc0a-b6a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a3a5a4cf-37a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=21346897)** | [Endorse Raja!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97455896/513475928/79150689?source=20241121_em_pet_b1_raja_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2E1YTRjZi0zN2E4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qFZ-e6_sF1YJ_Vx84_2DHAaQ2iChG_vsH486ZpYvrpw=&emci=758cfc0a-b6a6-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a3a5a4cf-37a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=21346897)
---
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Raja
| Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97455897/513475930/-1810142050?refcode=footer&source=20241121_em_pet_b1_raja_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2E1YTRjZi0zN2E4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qFZ-e6_sF1YJ_Vx84_2DHAaQ2iChG_vsH486ZpYvrpw=)

clean_body: Peter, I know I usually ask you for money. But today, I’m asking for something else: Peter, I want you to know my story: When my parents first arrived in the United States, they faced prejudice and economic hardship. They relied on public housing and food assistance when times were tough. They worked hard to achieve the American Dream — and give me the opportunity to become who I am today. But now, MAGA extremists are fighting to destroy the programs that made my story possible. So when I talk about taking back our House Majority, it isn’t just about politics. It’s deeply personal. | Thank you from the bottom of my heart, Raja | Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. subject: Our culture has a sick hatred for integrity and achievement
body:
Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

|
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49f3059363074972bfb97791c529eff1&_e=W8rKgtojw_sGuobG94blXUyIbcmJAqnSkVCWfLhwQORX_Dkn7-f1vmpLdfQgDIy6L4pHfkdBwhxmysfGADTbS3h3O1O9INtUVFljaspD2lRAixSguRM-IgzPV9kOx-tWLr4TMYz0y4sihJdQtGrJ_9PmM9VNGITVpE_LiXcjo1owJ3lXCeSet3OPuoLYbl1HadfFS0E-rYojfg_XqtvJ70FBOlwd6GdyK-iCkxQ0jnojdQ7hSJLFV8SJTjwmDWSIY4_bCy55HJEeLFCI9yxaSVyu3HwF7X9iBh5823YFz-c%3D) Friend,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven’t heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I’ve never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to “cancel” me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I’ve ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization’s top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. **[Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49f3059363074972bfb97791c529eff1&_e=W8rKgtojw_sGuobG94blXUyIbcmJAqnSkVCWfLhwQORX_Dkn7-f1vmpLdfQgDIy6L4pHfkdBwhxmysfGADTbS3h3O1O9INtUVFljaspD2lRAixSguRM-IgzPV9kOx-tWLr4TMYz0y4sihJdQtGrJ_0HSVYKP3qFaeCSS1wqdJPy-XtuzvJ_42DYgjBGkiRlwAHVp1paZBVtpKQYN6UzbKVHLGPjUYnrnYYrKZum4N3_7qE5HQ9ktxhn-OfuPpkdKheu9C3uLoY-Zk3MAAFnR2uYnVQr2VpFGxfyykfvZdZM%3D)**
[Donate >>](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=49f3059363074972bfb97791c529eff1&_e=W8rKgtojw_sGuobG94blXUyIbcmJAqnSkVCWfLhwQORX_Dkn7-f1vmpLdfQgDIy6L4pHfkdBwhxmysfGADTbS3h3O1O9INtUVFljaspD2lRAixSguRM-IgzPV9kOx-tWLr4TMYz0y4sihJdQtGrJ__Wif5wRuxP-zv74H7wdwihze9worse9EpqEZ_GKOA0auJ9zZDgFDehOqbD6-7Bm0Q3qcl34sKjZX5GKuOQlr1yN8zue-H_EPVCvvcqGMYm2hzrKZXB0pktl2gK4XJ3bxCjXOS1L-o-3ZyGah4nLG4E%3D)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I’ve EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That’s where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand’s _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand’s role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That’s where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for “ _skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_.” **Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos — every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The “Draw My Life” videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand’s shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like “Morals & Markets.”

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand’s philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt’s Gulch Summit, where I spoke!). Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. body:
Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. | | |

| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=612f31beb5c94c75a15384d18a946ebc&_e=UNEqrXsGZcHKm0vYaAwK8cZTDxXsBzSbQy__qdnt9plofCO829xA97n8b__K6GG90slX9LY1fdgcVEsFVd_cEDi82YciP8v_LAoz9OP20sNbRorxBhdux_wx8Isr6pJ_R2PaaN3rqoaIlyGh7XaTYy_dVJcDZGLuWVMo53S6TQglvFRfASY3Ad0z-bk3oTpYM4ZmiMCz7-b-tMdsT0r5AbPa7HoC2cMJge4mTFDo7qhk4T2rt5203fwDxxV-PNR6tZVDVBEM3Ahkfg6lE1GLQO11NQlsrpRvmT10xwp7xCaTmlgAHkBgPpeICWJ7If95p2lMp2voKyNTsWQVF35HeRMEMSy7CWTsLhTdcqRmVUduemG0-6pPART0HDs9dAKBO0TUnM2rqesHM4gt-IT7ZSyY4wAARJHbEOf60-hkfsc%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=612f31beb5c94c75a15384d18a946ebc&_e=UNEqrXsGZcHKm0vYaAwK8cZTDxXsBzSbQy__qdnt9plofCO829xA97n8b__K6GG90slX9LY1fdgcVEsFVd_cEDi82YciP8v_LAoz9OP20sNbRorxBhdux_wx8Isr6pJ_R2PaaN3rqoaIlyGh7XaTYy_dVJcDZGLuWVMo53S6TQglvFRfASY3Ad0z-bk3oTpYM4ZmiMCz7-b-tMdsT0r5AbPa7HoC2cMJge4mTFDo7qhk4T2rt5203fwDxxV-PNR6tZVDVBEM3Ahkfg6lE1GLQC90XNI8aH8wVL5E0UCLr-DsUJBsHPU-HC6xrSFxQOPLfWcpi8z4MY6dJLdiQ1oD_8uze1_kycfEt47Nj-CnNTt2we4z5IYzZ4_UuuDmzTFY89mMAMOjrY5I6et_ir8Lo4ncLTPZa_lPDtEZaF9KMPs%3D)The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. body:
I’m sure you agree – our open southern border is a huge problem.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | Dear Fellow American,

I'm sure you agree - our open southern border is a huge problem.

Patriots like you should be equipped with the facts and figures on just how much damage illegal immigration does to our country.

**That 's why my team put together this free eBook called _The Real Costs of America 's Border Crisis_.**
---
|
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=f1aedf85d4c548a4adc5a8e0324d539c&_e=tx6-NCinQu0K7vLqtlZgRtv30jbWEAu6NxocJcdlFHqGkPH1cHX1EfW55LX7j3gqvD86Z-Od4_262vQUJhWKD8yJ7ZbSICo7JzCIO4-59bfABghTpnMndVX2xUsoRby7dYm2PgDhc2MFJmhUX5ZmNe2Q4h5Fw8xyJ_iG1N3douvoLgus4uS-XRGvrPH5FQhk_r_5wt2N1jm-_1tarQX7MLOm-gl7NewnQ3b0_C3v69ecYJIXykCzkLupNx1bVArwqnsLmn0iYtTnoERVqo_SKC3YevpeoFjPoQIEMNw7NxtceF7K_t0xVv4K00I-7fiY0dYxu5AiKpxwxOfjtNvaBlrUFzlykJRefJRCbyFGtD2f0rOywYm5WNuWKNgsOy1l)

| | This free resource details the concrete costs to America's economy, education system, and society thanks to mass illegal immigration, not to mention the death of American citizens we've seen in the news lately.

It also provides policy solutions to these issues from Heritage Foundation experts. We promote these solutions everyday thanks to our members.

**You can download your free copy using the secure link below.**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/the-real-costs-of-americas-border-crisis/**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=f1aedf85d4c548a4adc5a8e0324d539c&_e=tx6-NCinQu0K7vLqtlZgRtv30jbWEAu6NxocJcdlFHqGkPH1cHX1EfW55LX7j3gqvD86Z-Od4_262vQUJhWKD8yJ7ZbSICo7JzCIO4-59bfABghTpnMndVX2xUsoRby7dYm2PgDhc2MFJmhUX5ZmNe2Q4h5Fw8xyJ_iG1N3douvoLgus4uS-XRGvrPH5FQhk_r_5wt2N1jm-_1tarQX7MLOm-gl7NewnQ3b0_C3v69cVHtqqCvfnWCeTEtWTLPpPSZ4Ui_J11tZnwl-SYDGn-7rH-H6oJ_VH1X4zUGgQzy6RNvLliTh3WTetnKCVbKbTv8QL0CT3fTXAE4zCdytEWx-as-30YoXX7OUt6irxAzRdGVUc4yNqx8xKAQbwdhYX)

When leftists that you know try to dismiss the costs of illegal immigration, I hope this resource provides the intellectual ammunition needed to prove just how bad illegal immigration is for our country.

**Please download your free copy of _The Real Costs of America 's Border Crisis_ using this secure link right now: [https://secured.heritage.org/the-real-costs-of-americas-border-crisis/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=f1aedf85d4c548a4adc5a8e0324d539c&_e=tx6-NCinQu0K7vLqtlZgRtv30jbWEAu6NxocJcdlFHqGkPH1cHX1EfW55LX7j3gqvD86Z-Od4_262vQUJhWKD8yJ7ZbSICo7JzCIO4-59bfABghTpnMndVX2xUsoRby7dYm2PgDhc2MFJmhUX5ZmNe2Q4h5Fw8xyJ_iG1N3douvoLgus4uS-XRGvrPH5FQhk_r_5wt2N1jm-_1tarQX7MLOm-gl7NewnQ3b0_C3v69fLhIm0b6Lx5CtoBHg4qruTEUplfWbTNL1RHPLG9XZgaY1Iuho14EEHoErUp0oHA6RmpJpR0owfndsm60baVX8zLuJlQlGtcZaqjiEpLflZ3dbmCmhwkRqgvJYHiPPtpJufRbD_TijNfVqqsDqy9mGV)**

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**Good Afternoon!** Thanks for being a loyal reader of _The Flyover_. Today, we're sending along a special message for you from one of our sponsors, American Hartford Gold. _The Flyover_ works hard to publish a quick read of relevant news each day - without the corporate media bias - and we deliver it absolutely FREE to our loyal readers. We can do this thanks to advertisers like American Hartford Gold, who help us pay our writers and editors - and literally help us to keep the lights on. Our advertising partners are critical to our success, and we hope you take a few minutes to read [American Hartford Gold's message today.](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kcFu2zAMhp9GvjmQKMeODzoE8Dzs0B43YBeDESlHmGQFspy1bz-4TYcBA6rjh1_kR_LH0_SEPvhlfsbIpry4NBGTt1iYJqVqUDU056mpyFwk9apiozoNoI6t6qqr6XvonJQXi8AOTj22Gi5w7GwLiHCSlTcgoVEKlDo1fSMPrTw67MgBHZFaxaKRTL6kfChXLvyCqwuv6c75YFOsgrmWcluFPgsYBYzJOc7rASNnb3G5Yi4uZZpToD0vYOSIPnwkBYwuM9fz5okFjFRTCgFzfcnerntJPQZGWtOWLQs9fHn_3W4lTn8h_wMjk9-i0MPD8oEXjPwfLJz35D48NA9m01J4KUIP9K4yvalM3_VHV2cx3tDPi9BDJ9XzXe7v68_X269v56HKhm6_fQh-bTvRyHl3e1tV-ex8dwN_AgAA__-SZKDg) -Cole, _CEO_

# Major Banks Issue Stark Warning
About "Death of the Dollar"
---
[These 42 powerful nations just launched the first-ever "Anti-Dollar Alliance"...](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kcFu2zAMhp9GvjmQKMeODzoE8Dzs0B43YBeDESlHmGQFspy1bz-4TYcBA6rjh1_kR_LH0_SEPvhlfsbIpry4NBGTt1iYJqVqUDU056mpyFwk9apiozoNoI6t6qqr6XvonJQXi8AOTj22Gi5w7GwLiHCSlTcgoVEKlDo1fSMPrTw67MgBHZFaxaKRTL6kfChXLvyCqwuv6c75YFOsgrmWcluFPgsYBYzJOc7rASNnb3G5Yi4uZZpToD0vYOSIPnwkBYwuM9fz5okFjFRTCgFzfcnerntJPQZGWtOWLQs9fHn_3W4lTn8h_wMjk9-i0MPD8oEXjPwfLJz35D48NA9m01J4KUIP9K4yvalM3_VHV2cx3tDPi9BDJ9XzXe7v68_X269v56HKhm6_fQh-bTvRyHl3e1tV-ex8dwN_AgAA__-SZKDg) And together, they plan to KILL the greenback and DETHRONE America once and for all. Leading the charge are the usual suspects: Russia, China, Iran, and oil-soaked Saudi Arabia. And because this alliance holds close to 70% of all US Dollars... Ditching their holdings could flood America with a tsunami of US Dollars... Triggering hyper-inflation and a Wall Street nosedive so deep, it VAPORIZES trillions in hard-earned retirement savings. Peter Schiff, who famously predicted the housing crash, declares: ["This is going to be far more impactful than the 2008 crisis."](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kcFu2zAMhp9GvjmQKMeODzoE8Dzs0B43YBeDESlHmGQFspy1bz-4TYcBA6rjh1_kR_LH0_SEPvhlfsbIpry4NBGTt1iYJqVqUDU056mpyFwk9apiozoNoI6t6qqr6XvonJQXi8AOTj22Gi5w7GwLiHCSlTcgoVEKlDo1fSMPrTw67MgBHZFaxaKRTL6kfChXLvyCqwuv6c75YFOsgrmWcluFPgsYBYzJOc7rASNnb3G5Yi4uZZpToD0vYOSIPnwkBYwuM9fz5okFjFRTCgFzfcnerntJPQZGWtOWLQs9fHn_3W4lTn8h_wMjk9-i0MPD8oEXjPwfLJz35D48NA9m01J4KUIP9K4yvalM3_VHV2cx3tDPi9BDJ9XzXe7v68_X269v56HKhm6_fQh-bTvRyHl3e1tV-ex8dwN_AgAA__-SZKDg) While Pres. Trump warns it will be like "losing a world war". Major banks are urging its billionaire clients to brace themselves Sadly, the clueless media is not giving you the full story... And with Biden caught in the headlights... These global heavyweights are sprinting to land a final financial assault before a strong, America-first administration takes back power in November. Trump...](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kcFu2zAMhp9GvjmQKMeODzoE8Dzs0B43YBeDESlHmGQFspy1bz-4TYcBA6rjh1_kR_LH0_SEPvhlfsbIpry4NBGTt1iYJqVqUDU056mpyFwk9apiozoNoI6t6qqr6XvonJQXi8AOTj22Gi5w7GwLiHCSlTcgoVEKlDo1fSMPrTw67MgBHZFaxaKRTL6kfChXLvyCqwuv6c75YFOsgrmWcluFPgsYBYzJOc7rASNnb3G5Yi4uZZpToD0vYOSIPnwkBYwuM9fz5okFjFRTCgFzfcnerntJPQZGWtOWLQs9fHn_3W4lTn8h_wMjk9-i0MPD8oEXjPwfLJz35D48NA9m01J4KUIP9K4yvalM3_VHV2cx3tDPi9BDJ9XzXe7v68_X269v56HKhm6_fQh-bTvRyHl3e1tV-ex8dwN_AgAA__-SZKDg) There's now a genius, new way to BULLETPROOF your IRA, 401(k), Pension, and even your bank savings from this looming "global reset".

Today, we're sending along a special message for you from one of our sponsors, American Hartford Gold. The Flyover works hard to publish a quick read of relevant news each day - without the corporate media bias - and we deliver it absolutely FREE to our loyal readers. We can do this thanks to advertisers like American Hartford Gold, who help us pay our writers and editors - and literally help us to keep the lights on. Our advertising partners are critical to our success, and we hope you take a few minutes to read -Cole, CEO * | Major Banks Issue Stark Warning About "Death of the Dollar" And together, they plan to KILL the greenback and DETHRONE America once and for all. Leading the charge are the usual suspects: Russia, China, Iran, and oil-soaked Saudi Arabia. And because this alliance holds close to 70% of all US Dollars... Ditching their holdings could flood America with a tsunami of US Dollars... Triggering hyper-inflation and a Wall Street nosedive so deep, it VAPORIZES trillions in hard-earned retirement savings. Peter Schiff, who famously predicted the housing crash, declares: While Pres. Trump warns it will be like "losing a world war". Major banks are urging its billionaire clients to brace themselves Sadly, the clueless media is not giving you the full story... And with Biden caught in the headlights... These global heavyweights are sprinting to land a final financial assault before a strong, America-first administration takes back power in November. For practically everyone with an IRA and 401(k), it will be like walking into a hurricane with a paper umbrella. But get this: There's now a genius, new way to BULLETPROOF your IRA, 401(k), Pension, and even your bank savings from this looming "global reset". It Reveals A Tax-Free Loophole That Could Shield Your IRA, 401(k) & Pension Savings From This Impending Dollar Attack. | The Texas Flyover 448 W 19th St. Suite #356 Houston, TX 77008 | ---|---|---

name: Team Casey
subject: We need you on our team.

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4884%2E552475%2EUvvz5I)
A recount is underway in Pennsylvania’s Senate race, Peter.
**The margin of this Senate race is too close to call, and we need your help to ensure that every Pennsylvanian’s voice is heard.**
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241121-2?refcode=em20241121-2&refcode2=4884_552475_Uvvz5I&akid=4884%2E552475%2EUvvz5I)**
National Republicans are trying to silence voters by suing to throw out thousands of votes. We need your support right now to fight back against these efforts.
**[Will you rush $5 or more to help us get started?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20241121-2?refcode=em20241121-2&refcode2=4884_552475_Uvvz5I&akid=4884%2E552475%2EUvvz5I)**

Thank you,
Team Casey

name: Ryan Walker (Heritage Action)
subject: We made a big difference this year, but we’re just getting started.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
Here’s why you should renew your membership for 2025...| | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=97147363695f4c7a9d0bea29a803e92c&_t=fh26arRQ2f6xaWMelXJCChbc3Abtkz0SonvlMgCxEuU1jCZfX4SSi2fa7Qv8Oaf3y5LsqHSg1eyFeuKd-0sNlHyjq0OSFR7knjHCU_iR20aHWPvSC_9BSnbx7B9aAvPh)_.
---
| | **Peter, thank you for supporting Heritage Action and the work of our activists in 2024.** Together, we worked to stop the Left’s efforts to fundamentally remake America. Democrats controlled the White House and Senate, but our activists helped block their radical agenda and score massive wins anyway. Together, we:
---
🔔 In 2024, Heritage Action and members like you helped advance the historic impeachment of Biden’s DHS Secretary, Alejandro Mayorkas, who allowed millions to cross our border. 🔔 We helped guide the SAVE Act through the conservative-controlled House to stop non-citizen voting. 🔔 Heritage Action helped kill the Senate’s horrible border deal that would have codified unprecedented illegal immigration. 🔔 And we helped advance 60+ bills, constitutional amendments, and referendums across the country at the state level:
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=97147363695f4c7a9d0bea29a803e92c&_e=5INoXbl-Fl5K4OH4MGw4OpZXgBnHmKpfgsdZ5oTI2PSl03Mb4OnNwcllNNOCulAxfwDf6ueRjHln8rKlQ7v22_wLJKcG2kafgb94a5RCLPef5TZ2C0ZbyekUkaZTiIRIasQoqG0E7xrCN4VI02vOrqsFGgCg3gSOFbXqjvU1ytRpfEWsa559rjgEueQ_hbjYhMZ8YyTz_WVTjaLdTAXwRgD-GYaV2a4QNRJh-7bvr6gzmkr-uwSQk2Z0ivc1-X4SCwGM_5DP7_YLno1qJsl4PpuvUPaGKcKLyWtne8qytbFt0IfRAQ9p2gEFJqsOqy3r1BiksVaSIjVcKHXaNsz6C-slShqSgYCMPLkW5jTH-2Avi_Hnfeoqb6AgMHD3mT0gEWjxzgh1_W4jVM_58rSGyweEUlo-J83He71yCLa8wnvHPDJH4JVa2hjxHm3ZIEcZm7pccDFS6zsOhYb-ODsL6w%3D%3D)
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=97147363695f4c7a9d0bea29a803e92c&_e=5INoXbl-Fl5K4OH4MGw4OpZXgBnHmKpfgsdZ5oTI2PSl03Mb4OnNwcllNNOCulAxfwDf6ueRjHln8rKlQ7v22_wLJKcG2kafgb94a5RCLPef5TZ2C0ZbyekUkaZTiIRIasQoqG0E7xrCN4VI02vOrqsFGgCg3gSOFbXqjvU1ytRpfEWsa559rjgEueQ_hbjYhMZ8YyTz_WVTjaLdTAXwRgD-GYaV2a4QNRJh-7bvr6gzmkr-uwSQk2Z0ivc1-X4SCwGM_5DP7_YLno1qJsl4PpuvUPaGKcKLyWtne8qytbFaMjcF6JiXcv2bWF5vdVrhzsMxKUXhfznfALjSprFt6V1aU9nj0V-Y8u3noJNPMGjsGyUMg35cbvaOyfCnlJD1UyJgiELDFWG9NjPvTfnha0_tcW3T_a_Mf3E1puyll_r6KyD1xtU7JGt9dYSjt2njrLePRA3vaPIFSkYZlzFzMQ%3D%3D)
---
Grassroots support from conservatives like you has helped us expand our reach and efforts this year. On behalf of our entire team, I would like to thank you for supporting our work in 2024, as we could not have achieved these necessary policy wins without your help. With 2024 coming to an end, I believe we must continue to set ambitious goals, advance policies to show our country that conservatives can govern, and continue to fight the Left’s agenda in the states and in Washington, DC.
---
_**We believe America should:**_
* Have secure borders and safe neighborhoods.
* Become economically strong and less dependent on Communist China.
* Protect free speech and put Big Tech in check.
* Give families a choice in education—they need the freedom to decide what’s best.
* Value the sanctity of life.
* Have a system of elections that people can trust.
* Stop spending money on Left-wing policies that hurt America.

---
As we look to 2025, the Heritage Action Team is already preparing our policy strategy, and this will be an all-hands-on-deck effort.
So, I’m humbly asking for your help continuing the fight by **[**renewing your membership for 2025!**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=97147363695f4c7a9d0bea29a803e92c&_e=5INoXbl-Fl5K4OH4MGw4OpZXgBnHmKpfgsdZ5oTI2PSl03Mb4OnNwcllNNOCulAxfwDf6ueRjHln8rKlQ7v22_wLJKcG2kafgb94a5RCLPef5TZ2C0ZbyekUkaZTiIRIasQoqG0E7xrCN4VI02vOrqsFGgCg3gSOFbXqjvU1ytRpfEWsa559rjgEueQ_hbjYhMZ8YyTz_WVTjaLdTAXwRgD-GYaV2a4QNRJh-7bvr6gzmkr-uwSQk2Z0ivc1-X4SCwGM_5DP7_YLno1qJsl4PpuvUPaGKcKLyWtne8qytbGaGu4hdTYBqsTz7JW5HjAxXH_5oXduroxORZ42vuO8fLyUptNE8w46a3oEvC1ACSvCr8YEtpSMaVtS8OBf9QC8tjPvtoJHRaX9HGKob3XmAMVzu7O9Sn2mFEAcBF678mXcGu-ToF6gDhJ8ATwIgKj2uvijPi9-gaoqtRnp4os1yg%3D%3D)**
---
| | Thank you for your continued support, Ryan WalkerHeritage ActionExecutive Vice President
---
|

|
---

# _**GIFT FROM TRUMP**_

body:

# **Preparing for Project 2025**
# [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100168952.172472.132&gen=1&mailing_linkid=12358)
Join Senator Hughes and Andrea Ducas, VP of Health Policy at the Center for American Progress, for an online town hall about how healthcare access and costs could be impacted by plans from Project 2025. This will be an interactive discussion. Senator Hughes and Andrea will discuss what Pennsylvanians can expect from the Project 2025 agenda and take questions from attendees. Please share this invitation with any friends and family who have questions about Project 2025 and the future of their healthcare. All are welcome! [CLICK HERE TO REGISTER](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100168952.172472.132&gen=1&mailing_linkid=12359)

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Opponents of voting rights want "a reckoning"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112124_1&amount=25]
Folks -- when we say that the Department of Justice (DOJ), its Civil Rights Division, and efforts to defend the right to vote are under threat, this is exactly what we mean:
@CletaMitchell: Every lawyer in the Voting Section and likely in the Civil Rights Division needs to be terminated. They are not supportive of Pres Trump or MAGA. There has to be a reckoning. These are leftwing activists who have come from and should return to their leftwing organizations. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112124_1&amount=25]
That's Cleta Mitchell, a lead lawyer in the MAGA movement and a huge opponent of voting rights. She's led partisan groups as they organize "poll watchers" to challenge voters and try and turn them away, she's led lawsuits to restrict youth voting, and now she's advocating for the new administration to clear out our last line of federal defense to protect voting rights.
Attacking federal employees -- who protect our rights in a nonpartisan fashion -- is just the next step as opponents of voting rights try to remake our democracy in their image, where they get to pick and choose who gets to vote and whose voice doesn't count.
We've got to fight this, Team, and not stop until we win in court, in Congress, in state legislatures, and at the ballot box. Fuel our work to defend voting rights with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112124_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112124_1&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112124_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112124_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112124_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=112124_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112124_1&amount=35]
Listen, we'll be blunt -- if the DOJ's Civil Rights division was filled with ultra-partisan activists, don't you think voting in America would look a lot different than it does?
Opponents of voting rights like Cleta Mitchell attack these civil servants because they know -- even as non-partisan workers -- that they stand between the vote suppressors and their total control over our elections.
Backed by dark money billionaires, inside-the-beltway "think tanks", and state legislators who drank the Kool-Aid or are fearful of MAGA reprisals, opponents of voting rights are tweaking state laws, replacing nonpartisan officials, taking judicial seats, and more. Stopping them is going to take all of us .
We need you to stand with us as we prepare for state legislative sessions in 2025 and whatever opponents of voting rights try to pull off at the federal level. Chip in with $25 or however much you can right now to protect our right to vote >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=112124_1&amount=25]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112124_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112124_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112124_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112124_1&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=HcCZFcVP6UbAnGKNFSvI%2BAskqi9PKi%2FGAfC33rsz7sJG98H%2BC0aqA%2BxeuMkJdAQm9icx9qN8UkKNNgr36q2CNvcwa60rvzfPpI%2FKtMK8%2BXupvJCxpewPFJZG%2FaOq5HxV4A9I%2BBQtvIsMhf8lU%2FWE1zRPCPU%2F%2BWVKuTCVpi%2F1s1aEuOTNvXPGa2B8K7HiixqxCXLZLAG6F9cRvx52OMwUDF8fM3WCCcyHBAviwxyxX5hK%2B%2Ft1mf3RJGkzCKQKuW8GAFFwwe9vmIlVrs6xkB3E%2FmvqeWFsGbCWGmWSJqO1%2FuqvXVGvRe%2FLhfv0FNs%2FKgoT%2BMbwNWcXkrfTNXWEbOSpO1y0U%2FCMe1CSt0%2FtxUcmaBrhFncNd1%2BnQGQkRp5r%2BbKVuOGkXvz9AAvN%2BeK3gQ54j1CwKct%2FaScZwHvoZ40zEx4%3D .

Republicans are headed toward one of the smallest House Majorities EVER.

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8a5aff0e-c5f0-429d-a93f-f0b1c9d37a9b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| We have BREAKING NEWS, Peter: MATT GAETZ – the former Congressman under investigation by the House Ethics Committee sexual misconduct and misuse of campaign funds – WITHDREW his nomination to be Trump’s Attorney General. Your support truly made the difference in stopping Matt Gaetz – we made enough noise to make it clear that we will not stand for a guy like Matt Gaetz as Attorney General. But we HAVE to keep going. The report on Gaetz’s misconduct is still up in the air, and we need to fight tooth and nail to make sure this report gets released so EVERYONE knows who Matt Gaetz truly is. [Will you sign our petition calling on the House Ethics Committee to release the report on Matt Gaetz?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T939bd5f2-8fd2-41fd-aafa-52ce2f76dc05/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf8d20a53-00c5-46b8-a4a2-8cff9a3fb64c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
Republicans have wielded their narrow, veto-proof supermajority to pass backward abortion restrictions and attack access to the ballot box. We cannot afford to let their unchecked power continue. | | |
---
| |
---|---
We’re asking for your help. Democrats narrowly broke the supermajority in the North Carolina House – and _now_ , we’re facing a recount in a race that was decided by just 233 votes. **We cannot afford to let their unchecked power continue to harm North Carolinians.**
[Losing puts Republicans one step closer to regaining their supermajority. Peter,

**Sarah McBride didn’t run for Congress to fight about bathrooms.** She ran to fight for Delawareans. But that didn’t stop the MAGA GOP from announcing an anti-trans bathroom ban at the Capitol in an effort to distract from the real issues facing this country. [Can you split an urgent $15 contribution to stand with Sarah and send a powerful message to the GOP that we support her as she prepares to fight for us in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97458104/513483352/1256847406?amount=15&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_112124_1_1_McBrideSplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTBlYzc1YS0zZWE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCiBy_XnTlGRHNoyyiwt3FDyb6kh3OdV_kSkXPK1UK0=) | | **[RUSH A DONATION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97458109/513483358/1256847406?amount=15&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_112124_1_1_McBrideSplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTBlYzc1YS0zZWE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCiBy_XnTlGRHNoyyiwt3FDyb6kh3OdV_kSkXPK1UK0=)**

We know what this political stunt really is: _a blatant attempt from the extreme MAGA right to distract from their chaotic caucus, Donald Trump’s unqualified nominees, and their dangerous Project 2025 agenda. Full stop._
Mike Johnson and the right-wing professional provocateurs in the House are hellbent on fighting about bathrooms and manufacturing culture wars.
**Meanwhile, Sarah is focused on what an _overwhelming_ majority of voters in Delaware elected her to do:** build bridges and find solutions to bring down the costs of housing, health care, and child care.
That’s how Sarah led the successful effort to pass paid medical and family leave, raise the minimum wage, and expand health care access as State Senator in Delaware. And that’s exactly the results-driven approach she’s bringing to Washington — and she won’t let extremists slow down her efforts.

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: America is on the brink of destruction
body:
| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d1a5a6e58c94e8dbfb4930ebf928a44&_e=H8ea3Lx4Un4h41D6Gz66EKq72D9fC6gGs-_DZd640j4hxmazwOgVicNOwPlst1T0ObrPIMJIlRfM6bDqwDb4-UhNCjkGUFG_mEHbOY_hZagv4cRyrTdGwee9Glstmdrg44Va2l_Ic-uO0f4xj8fLbNa74WexYnRUzhnHvHj5k6q7S286RZwGG47Nimz6ZgQXbj4HVtoiJKKiiYh9iN9rO7hD-phMRd6IbH8A0e8JOFtUR5NeHGfbDw6T5Ptflwtg_AA4FLApm-SOw8BR_Odk_ytKPPd1Eou7oplzHe7jaxOhtG8FdzJa1S85n5f8SSr5hqLBCL5IfUHBFrs6ZHU4xSjM9HlQiqqLgZ0U1worFaYm5rnHtwJnq8kPCqoJDAL2rD2uuMB99SIZnYq8zbY4ug%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d1a5a6e58c94e8dbfb4930ebf928a44&_e=H8ea3Lx4Un4h41D6Gz66EKq72D9fC6gGs-_DZd640j4hxmazwOgVicNOwPlst1T0ObrPIMJIlRfM6bDqwDb4-UhNCjkGUFG_mEHbOY_hZagv4cRyrTdGwee9Glstmdrg44Va2l_Ic-uO0f4xj8fLbNa74WexYnRUzhnHvHj5k6q7S286RZwGG47Nimz6ZgQXbj4HVtoiJKKiiYh9iN9rO7hD-phMRd6IbH8A0e8JOFtUR5NeHGfbDw6T5PtflwtgexE6OU_nHmpF7RVIDa-RlGHfa3JoX98L0jpKf7Uv6PJ_NvVGuaBEFlUgnpO7fMA33_iQlT_mD8yneEeF9UjxNOG_TnsQwLQfQbz-SGUwuE45LVEN6JAt84P8GNSvt55F5cN8YEXpNH5NTCm0ridOxQ%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d1a5a6e58c94e8dbfb4930ebf928a44&_e=H8ea3Lx4Un4h41D6Gz66EKq72D9fC6gGs-_DZd640j4hxmazwOgVicNOwPlst1T0ObrPIMJIlRfM6bDqwDb4-UhNCjkGUFG_mEHbOY_hZagv4cRyrTdGwee9Glstmdrg44Va2l_Ic-uO0f4xj8fLbNa74WexYnRUzhnHvHj5k6q7S286RZwGG47Nimz6ZgQXbj4HVtoiJKKiiYh9iN9rO7hD-phMRd6IbH8A0e8JOFtUR5NeHGfbDw6T5Ptflwtga3uRLmqPNhMEP9AL_60YRh0jXqAm7FsUuOfv9qGWnZXaB3GIWWeiWZ7hbvQA84kmKskkvzMRP9H8VhxG12tdZkRtLE3N55MnQWYxPX0IBIRjqO9OtSvDAobarMWTsoxrY4YB29ku3Pdy5uh6h-hkNw%3D%3D)**
---

They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it. So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can. | | Sincerely, David Horowitz P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.orgP.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | |

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Gaetz drops out of AG nomination
body:
We held MAGA accountable for their nomination of Matt Gaetz—now let’s keep turning up the heat!
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vhwp1-iv0rcd-kyd76rh1/)
---
# **Matt Gaetz Drops Out of AG Nomination**
---
| | | | | [ ](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vhwp1-iv0rce-kyd76rh2/)
---
| | | | This is big news, folks. Matt Gaetz, facing mounting allegations of sexual misconduct, was forced to withdraw his nomination as Donald Trump’s pick for Attorney General. It’s a small but critical win for democracy, proving that when we apply pressure, MAGA’s worst offenders _can’t_ escape the consequences of their actions. **But let’s be clear—this is just the beginning.** Gaetz’s withdrawal didn’t come from some sudden sense of honor; it came because **we refused to let his toxic history go unchecked.** His fall from grace is a direct result of relentless scrutiny and the refusal of even some Republican senators to rubber-stamp Trump’s controversial pick. MAGA’s powerbrokers are vulnerable, but only if we stay vigilant and continue holding them accountable. Trump, who praised Gaetz’s efforts to win over Senate Republicans, remains laser-focused on filling his administration with extremists and loyalists, no matter how unfit they are for office. If we don’t fight back, Gaetz’s withdrawal will be just a speed bump on MAGA’s road to dismantling justice, fairness, and decency. The allegations against Gaetz—**ranging from statutory rape to drug use** —are not just salacious headlines. They’re a stark reminder of the moral bankruptcy at the core of MAGA leadership. Trump tried to hand the Department of Justice to someone under investigation for exploiting a minor, and he’ll try again with someone equally dangerous. This fight isn’t over. The MAGA agenda thrives on distraction, division, and disinformation, hoping we’ll lose focus. **We can’t let that happen.** [**_Gaetz dropping out shows we are not powerless._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vhwp1-iv0rcf-kyd76rh3/)[**__**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vhwp1-iv0rcg-kyd76rh4/) [**_When we fight for accountability at every level of government, we can win. It takes bold action and the use of strong platforms across the country to ignite change and hold those in power responsible. This is the fight we must continue—relentless, strategic, and united. Join us in our fight for accountability today._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vhwp1-iv0rch-kyd76rh5/)

---
| |

| The deadline is TODAY! November 21st.
---
| |
---
| **URGENT!!! Sending E-Mail's are DUE TODAY!!!****

There are two attached letters you can use! ** **Please email every Representative on this list below
and Lindsay Trapp at the DEQ!**

I just called Jo Rae Perkins, Secretary of the Oregon Republican Party and today is the last day you can send an email! PLEASE take 5 minutes and email everyone right now! Don't wait and forget! **This is YOUR pocket book!!!** _Send this email to everyone you know!**(At the very end is letter you can use too).**_

DEQ's plan to raise our gas prices!
This is a letter writing request for as many members as possible, information and sample letter below:
DEQ’s Plan to Raise the Cost of Driving Should Be Cancelled
By John A. Charles, Jr.
Cascade Policy Institute
On November 21, the Oregon Environmental Quality Commission is scheduled to adopt a carbon rationing scheme known as the Climate Protection Program. The regulation will set a statewide cap on the emissions of human-caused carbon dioxide, and then steadily reduce the cap over time. By 2040, most fossil fuels will be outlawed. The effects of this cap will be swift and painful. Based on experience in Washington and California, the DEQ regulation will increase the cost of gasoline sold in Oregon by at least 25 cents/gallon, and possibly as much as 45 cents. None of this will benefit drivers, and it won’t even benefit the environment. Carbon rationing will force fuel suppliers to rely on corn-based ethanol and other agricultural commodities, which will vastly increase the amount of land, water and fertilizer needed to produce automotive fuel. The Climate Protection Program was ordered by former Governor Kate Brown, who is no longer in office. But elected officials who are in office should note that the number one message from voters in the recent election was that they can’t afford the rising cost of consumer goods. If state legislative leaders are smart, they will tell DEQ to drop the carbon tax. Elections matter, even in Oregon. We ask that you write a letter to your legislators in Oregon protesting this increase in tax. **__Here is a sample letter:__**
I am writing to express my strong opposition to the Oregon Environmental Quality Commission’s Climate Protection Program, scheduled for adoption on November 21. This carbon rationing scheme, while intended to address climate change, will have detrimental consequences for Oregon's economy, environment, and the welfare of our residents.
My objections are as follows:
Significant Economic Impact on Consumers: The proposed regulation will lead to a considerable increase in fuel prices, estimated to be at least 25 cents per gallon, with potential spikes up to 45 cents. This cost will be borne disproportionately by Oregon families and small businesses, exacerbating the financial strain on households already struggling with inflation and rising living costs.
Questionable Environmental Benefits: The shift towards biofuels like corn-based ethanol will create additional environmental challenges, including increased land, water, and fertilizer use. This agricultural expansion will lead to unintended ecological damage and may counteract the intended carbon reduction goals.
Outdated and Unpopular Policy Directive: The Climate Protection Program is a remnant of former Governor Kate Brown’s administration. In the most recent election, voters sent a clear message emphasizing the importance of affordability and economic stability. Our elected officials must prioritize policies that reflect these concerns and reassess regulations that drive up consumer costs without clear benefits.
This is a very simple ask but it is just the start of tax increases coming in the next legislative session. We will be on guard and we will be communicating with you about our efforts to fight these continued financial burdens being placed on our Oregon Residents.**__
__****__SECOND SAMPLE LETTER:__** **Dear Lindsay Trapp and Representatives,**
**I am writing to express my strong opposition to the Oregon Environmental Quality Commission’s Climate Protection Program, scheduled for adoption on November 21. This carbon rationing scheme, while intended to address climate change, will have detrimental consequences for Oregon's economy, environment, and the welfare of our residents.**
**These are my objections:**
**1\. Significant Economic Impact on Consumers:**
**2\. The proposed regulation will lead to a considerable increase in fuel prices, estimated to be at least 25 cents per gallon, with potential spikes up to 45 cents. This cost will be borne disproportionately by Oregon families and small businesses, exacerbating the financial strain on households already struggling with inflation and rising living costs.**
**3\. Questionable Environmental Benefits:**
**4\. The shift towards biofuels like corn-based ethanol will create additional environmental challenges, including increased land, water, and fertilizer use. This agricultural expansion will lead to unintended ecological damage and may counteract the intended carbon reduction goals.**
5\. **Outdated and Unpopular Policy Directive:**
**6\. The Climate Protection Program is a remnant of former Governor Kate Brown’s administration. In the most recent election, voters sent a clear message emphasizing the importance of affordability and economic stability. This regulation must be halted. It is not a law and we, nor our representatives, voted on this. This rule was a Governor Brown Executive Order, which should not be enacted.**
**Sincerely,** I looked up all

This is a letter writing request for as many members as possible, information and sample letter below: DEQ’s Plan to Raise the Cost of Driving Should Be Cancelled By John A. Charles, Jr. Cascade Policy Institute On November 21, the Oregon Environmental Quality Commission is scheduled to adopt a carbon rationing scheme known as the Climate Protection Program. The regulation will set a statewide cap on the emissions of human-caused carbon dioxide, and then steadily reduce the cap over time. By 2040, most fossil fuels will be outlawed. The effects of this cap will be swift and painful. Based on experience in Washington and California, the DEQ regulation will increase the cost of gasoline sold in Oregon by at least 25 cents/gallon, and possibly as much as 45 cents. None of this will benefit drivers, and it won’t even benefit the environment. Carbon rationing will force fuel suppliers to rely on corn-based ethanol and other agricultural commodities, which will vastly increase the amount of land, water and fertilizer needed to produce automotive fuel. The Climate Protection Program was ordered by former Governor Kate Brown, who is no longer in office. But elected officials who are in office should note that the number one message from voters in the recent election was that they can’t afford the rising cost of consumer goods. If state legislative leaders are smart, they will tell DEQ to drop the carbon tax. Elections matter, even in Oregon. We ask that you write a letter to your legislators in Oregon protesting this increase in tax. name: Becky Edwards
subject: You Made a Difference in Utah!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOVERNING GROUP PAC
body:
Thanks to your help, Governing Group has emerged as one of the most effective organizations in Utah. | | | | | [](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=37aae0fd01&e=6484bb6dd5)
---
| | | | |
Dear friends,
The 2024 election is officially behind us, and we’re excited to share the incredible results you helped make possible.
**Governing Group-endorsed candidates won 25 out of 28 general races** , including many in highly competitive contests where victory was far from guaranteed. These wins highlight the power of your support and the effectiveness of our approach in shaping Utah’s political future.
These results are no accident. They are a testament to the effectiveness of the Governing Group’s unique approach to campaigning—providing candidates with resources, strategic guidance, and a model for principled, policy-driven leadership.
As one of the most impactful PACs in Utah, we are shaping the future of politics in the state by supporting candidates who prioritize collaboration, respect for the democratic process, and meaningful action over divisive rhetoric.
But we’re not stopping here. Your continued support is critical as we expand our influence, recruit more exceptional candidates, and strengthen our role in Utah’s political landscape. [**Will you chip in a contribution today?**](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=54748b5a96&e=6484bb6dd5)
**A full list of our winning candidates:**
* Mike McKell: State Senate District 25
* Amanda Bollinger: State School Board District 9
* Jake Sawyer: State House District 9
* Logan Monson: State House District 69
* Christine Watkins: State House District 67
* Doug Welton: State House District 65
* David Shallenberger: State House District 58
* Tracy Miller: State House District 45
* Steve Eliason: State House District 43
* Clint Okerlund: State House District 42
* Jason Thompson: State House District 3
* Anthony Loubet: State House District 27
* Ray Ward: State House District 19
* Paul Cutler: State House District 18
* Ariel Defay: State House District 15
* Karen Peterson: State House District 13
* Nicole McDermott: Granite School Board Precinct 4
* Joani Farnsworth Stevens: Davis School Board Precinct 2
* Alisa Allred Mercer: Davis School Board Precinct 1
* Heidi Gunn: Washington School Board District 1
* Colleen Bonner: Wasatch County Council
* Molly Hart: State School Board District 7
* Randy Boothe: State School Board District 13
* Teri McCabe: Provo School Board District 5
* Mark Clement, Alpine School Board District 5

Thank you for being an integral part of this movement. Together, we’re proving that politics can—and should—be about making a real difference.
Becky EdwardsFounder, Governing Group

---
[DONATE TODAY](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=8821af97f7&e=6484bb6dd5)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: We’re going to stop this madness
body:
Are you looking for a way to protect your children and grandchildren from the lies they’re hearing at school? | | | Dear Friend, Are you looking for a way to protect your children and grandchildren from the lies they’re hearing at school?
---
| | Friend,Are you looking for a way to protect your children and grandchildren from the lies they’re hearing at school? Believe me, I know firsthand how bad things are.I’m Riley Gaines, the University of Kentucky swimmer who was forced to compete against a 6’4’’ man at the NCAA women’s championship. Yes, I even had to change in the same locker room with him. I kept thinking my coaches would do something. Or the NCAA would say, “this is insane.” But our “cancel culture” has people scared. Too scared to simply tell the obvious truth that a man can’t turn himself into a woman.So, I stood up and started speaking out. At first, I was the only one and it was terrifying. I’ve been cancelled, punched, and threatened. But more and more Americans are finally waking up. And they’re realizing that speaking out is how we’re going to stop this madness.That’s why I’m so grateful for the patriots at **Brave Books** who are publishing books that teach kids to love God and our country – and to be brave about it! I’ve partnered with **Brave Books** to write _Happy No Snakes Day_ , a Christian children’s book that teaches the importance of standing up for the truth. **[And in appreciation of your gift of $100 or more, I would love to send you a copy of my book to share with your children or grandchildren and protect their hearts and minds from our toxic culture.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=0b6628a970974094a2d1d67147352562&_e=9VDFEWzVf24voJKH-DFsvPx4arnFsDdXEh8s3HJ35eEwyaPSnXZUYc7iOANAtHNbh8l_PKTlqyy63Y22Z6ZkHMaw_B_Z0AEALIBTbS9gbDa1tBZtvJm-x3gLgtmLnrKghwE40CJC-Z1qvS-g3T6xBv4Hs8uNG7m5L49-7HPOW_fQYJroFNwUMSdRbrBydg1nNUuMpMpM8ESVyXgTHh5yGJcownre9B_2lXJJiTZxaAQDWEvZ6CcD1x7qtcjVy397TdyvM4Ftz_xRzqbdoFPQhfTZlwvIg8BLRbR4BL1ZI8IHvecz6K-hWJE8Tsk2Z3grjWL8Df1LI5_J7ny2xOFVsV1PEB7cWZmLiL5WgFlUaHXp3VPxkSP4QjLo7KxO3oog1aUSyfySiJjEllQv19XL4w%3D%3D)** **Brave Books** has a plan to equip the next generation to be truth-tellers. And you can be a part of it. Let’s get busy taking back America!In truth and love,

name: Call Trump's Bluff via Our Revolution
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Bernie is calling Trump's bluff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — Bernie is
challenging Trump, and we’re here for it.

While we fight to stop Trump’s most horrific, racist plans in their
tracks, we also have a chance to challenge him on populist promises like
capping credit card interest rates at 10%. Either he works with Bernie to
take on the big banks — or else he gets exposed as the fraud we’ve seen
for 8 years. Either way, we have Bernie’s back.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20523?source=email-20241121&t=1011&akid=7281%2E5885482%2Ew0Js8I ][IMG]

It’s time to call the GOP’s bluff. Democrats can push legislation for the
working class like raising the federal minimum wage, taxing the rich,
raising teacher pay, expanding Social Security, and more — and Republicans
will be forced to show where they really stand — with the ultra-rich and
corporations, not the working class.

This is a solid strategy, and Our Revolution will stand with Bernie and
battle Trump every step of the way.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20523?source=email-20241121&t=1012&akid=7281%2E5885482%2Ew0Js8I ]Add your name to support Bernie’s agenda and urge Democrats to fight
Trump and the GOP on policy >>

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20523?source=email-20241121&t=1013&akid=7281%2E5885482%2Ew0Js8I ]STAND WITH BERNIE

As Bernie said, “The simple fact is: if you stand with working people,
they will stand with you. In my view, if Democrats deliver on an agenda
like this, they can win back the working class of our country and the
White House.”

* End Citizens United and stop billionaires from buying elections
* Raise the federal minimum wage to $17 an hour
* Pass the PRO Act to make it easier for workers to unionize
* Protect and expand Social Security benefits by lifting the cap
* Expand Medicare to include home care, dental, hearing, and vision
* Cut prescription drug prices in half
* Guarantee paid medical and family leave
* Guarantee equal pay for equal work
* Build 3 million housing units of affordable housing
* Tuition free higher education
* Make childcare affordable
* Raise public school teacher pay
* Tax the rich
* Slash the massive Pentagon budget

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20523?source=email-20241121&t=1014&akid=7281%2E5885482%2Ew0Js8I ]STAND WITH BERNIE

One of the levers of power that Bernie and Democrats hold now is the power
to expose the GOP’s lies. The pressure will be ratcheted up on Trump and
the GOP, especially with only a tiny GOP margin in the U.S. House.

No matter how many people in the billionaire class or leadership of the
Democratic Party criticize Bernie for speaking the truth, we know our
progressive fight is the way forward. And that means challenging and
fighting Trump, and continuing our fight for the working class.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20523?source=email-20241121&t=1015&akid=7281%2E5885482%2Ew0Js8I ]Stand with Bernie now. Sign on to support his call for the Democratic
Party to embrace this agenda and bring the fight to Republicans.

Thank you,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7281%2E5885482%2Ew0Js8I ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7281%2E5885482%2Ew0Js8I ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7281%2E5885482%2Ew0Js8I ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7281%2E5885482%2Ew0Js8I ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7281%2E5885482%2Ew0Js8I ]Website |

group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20241121.CazVe4&t=1008&akid=7281%2E5885482%2Ew0Js8I ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

disclaimer_text: Paid For By GIFFORDS; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Matt Gaetz just removed himself from consideration to be the next Attorney General.
#

Did you hear the news? Matt Gaetz just withdrew himself from consideration to be Donald Trump’s Attorney General.
We reached out to you yesterday about our work to prevent Matt Gaetz from assuming this position. The outpouring of support we received to this message and the pressure we mounted no doubt had an impact on Gaetz’ decision.
This is a HUGE deal, and shows that when we all speak our minds, we have the ability to put a check on MAGA extremism.
This is one battle that we’ve won, but the fight isn’t over. Trump has nominated many other cabinet members that would be a threat to our public safety if confirmed.
[**So we have to ask: Will you make a contribution to GIFFORDS to help us prepare to fight back against other cabinet picks?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-c4-em-nov24.HTgqwI&refcode=em241121-1-30&t=1&akid=9481%2E3935704%2EeVZ0R_)
