| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d65f66dbaf4e4e508f8ba077156dec27&_e=cZXHXdbHGahM059cnjl61JOyPlQjFV91pzNuhvCaMYInGQSY712YuXciBjqklD8cxZmkJWbzzEM9T-nEP7RdxFnh7b7hotQXJnwq6Rn3aaiAjs3BGVQBK_C4b-cIZzZVSpZAqj1eQKXtVwdQXsKQSGeZZzoGEFH5ZOzI-YjLzDvdSh_Fx_qastiglX3iE1zG-MaaPLREzv1wTerqCJdwf3bY9tgqJNSIm_mXuOnEkwpHET9zm4z5JKUxfcFI5v6O8flZbpaSjfFoKozWaWYNFuImQQVilAM1yQSta0jWM7GZF9ZumrPztnW6p9LZ2FxJUeVLpqvzI4rfCs2gj6JLilN8-KTFtw-VLVuRV2I40vVUQ_EjGrD_7OB5Nl8FMl58l6BpGfRa3MHauJ6mhBoybzJZoG0QTQrmDA3CXYBzrmc%3D)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d65f66dbaf4e4e508f8ba077156dec27&_e=cZXHXdbHGahM059cnjl61JOyPlQjFV91pzNuhvCaMYInGQSY712YuXciBjqklD8cxZmkJWbzzEM9T-nEP7RdxFnh7b7hotQXJnwq6Rn3aaiAjs3BGVQBK_C4b-cIZzZVSpZAqj1eQKXtVwdQXsKQSGeZZzoGEFH5ZOzI-YjLzDvdSh_Fx_qastiglX3iE1zG-MaaPLREzv1wTerqCJdwf3bY9tgqJNSIm_mXuOnEkwpHET9zm4z5JKUxfcFI5v6O-znuy2VeQjr1WIcC8xfQ-zb1VGnXY_bK3HnhBsExx_-NodNQhCC0yFHMzkrSjD9jYVDtS9NNx0OX31xtQc5BpQeTpnE4697z0T1fY75vlppbntDMPowxdDiVayzAItJh7sKFsGtA86TPgJmcgqpvtew3dM9AAzdYCUaq5ONhR-U%3D) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.

[ **DONATE **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d65f66dbaf4e4e508f8ba077156dec27&_e=cZXHXdbHGahM059cnjl61JOyPlQjFV91pzNuhvCaMYInGQSY712YuXciBjqklD8cxZmkJWbzzEM9T-nEP7RdxFnh7b7hotQXJnwq6Rn3aaiAjs3BGVQBK_C4b-cIZzZVSpZAqj1eQKXtVwdQXsKQSGeZZzoGEFH5ZOzI-YjLzDvdSh_Fx_qastiglX3iE1zG-MaaPLREzv1wTerqCJdwf3bY9tgqJNSIm_mXuOnEkwpHET9zm4z5JKUxfcFI5v6OSvcrlxQkGrmDnV3h6CI7dWoIvNhg889lalme_bDjPkz3zQPEBQbrhzMdrM-D-Mtj1FIbfhHLl89keRnMi_bUU47v_JYIcNIsG7DsK5_VOMuOO5zJNc08f87ulILszIlCdCqwVFA9XkAd87h40H6mHdCe66q7rQQu8LJ3iOmHy9I%3D)

Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Yours Truly,

name: Biz, All On The Line
subject: Moral arcs don’t bend with certainty.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
There’s no easy way to say it: A lot of good folks lost this election season.
|
---

Peter,
As Attorney General Holder once said, “Moral arcs don’t bend with certainty. History is not a Marvel movie — the good guys lose as often as they win.”
There’s no easy way to say it: A lot of good folks lost in races around the country. But some really strong pro-democracy leaders won, too — like former voting rights advocate and current North Carolina Supreme Court Justice Allison Riggs. _Just yesterday_ , a recount began in the race for the North Carolina Supreme Court, which Riggs won by just a few hundred votes. These close races show how important the fair maps movement’s efforts to reach every voter in North Carolina are — and how important it is to ensure that every voter’s voice is heard.
We know many people in this community worked so hard for so long to make positive change in this election season, both here with All On The Line and with other organizations across the country.
We understand that it can feel discouraging. And let us be clear: The incoming administration that will control the federal government has threatened to take away many fundamental freedoms, and the threat of those losses is scary. [**But we need you to know — and we need you to believe — that your support of All On The Line had real impact in some some major ways:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97461511/513495390/-330226019?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_PostEday_email_20241121-AOTL-RedLite-PostEday-Biz_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241121-AOTL-RedLite-PostEday-Biz_&utm_campaign=PostEday&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFlYjk5NmE2LTRiYTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=U52T9MGZGsxAVZEt9w5TrzE8vl_hVIFeAgIvPfLHRY8=)
**In both Louisiana and Alabama, we saw what can happen when fair maps are in place.**
As you’ll remember, the _Allen v. Milligan_ decision enforced protections enshrined in the Voting Rights Act of 1965 — and because of the ruling, both Louisiana and Alabama had to redraw their maps.
And this year, voters in both of those states elected two Black Members of Congress who truly reflect their political desires.
**In Arizona, the work we did to educate voters around the high stakes of the ballot initiative helped defeat “The Judicial Accountability Act of 2024.”** As a reminder, if passed, this would have essentially _ended_ term limits for state supreme and appellate court judges. But instead, you helped hold the line against a tremendous, partisan abuse of power, and Arizonans will continue to have a say over who sits on their highest court.
**And maybe even the most critical, you helped build power in states all across the country.** All On the Line and affiliates recruited over 6,800 poll watchers and sent over a million text messages to voters. We have real capacity within this community.
**The work to restore fairness to our democracy is bigger than one election season. All On The Line has always been about the long-term fight for fair maps.** And in a time like this, it’s worth repeating: The work to end gerrymandering and protect voting rights for all Americans is effective. Fair maps matter. And your support makes it possible.
Next year alone, there are state house elections in Virginia, a state supreme court seat up in Wisconsin, and _three_ state supreme court seats up in Pennsylvania. And our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), is supporting voters in active litigation in Georgia, Alabama, Louisiana, Texas, and Florida.
**So we must continue the fight. We cannot give up on bending the moral arc. We need to put our full weight into this work.**
Thank you, Peter, for what you’ve done to date. Together, we’ll continue to lay the groundwork for fair representation and the election of leaders who will defend, not undermine, our democracy.
Thank you — and more soon.
Biz
John Bisognano
President, All On The Line

clean_body: There’s no easy way to say it: A lot of good folks lost this election season. | Peter, As Attorney General Holder once said, “Moral arcs don’t bend with certainty. History is not a Marvel movie — the good guys lose as often as they win.” There’s no easy way to say it: A lot of good folks lost in races around the country. But some really strong pro-democracy leaders won, too — like former voting rights advocate and current North Carolina Supreme Court Justice Allison Riggs. Just yesterday , a recount began in the race for the North Carolina Supreme Court, which Riggs won by just a few hundred votes. These close races show how important the fair maps movement’s efforts to reach every voter in North Carolina are — and how important it is to ensure that every voter’s voice is heard. We know many people in this community worked so hard for so long to make positive change in this election season, both here with All On The Line and with other organizations across the country. We understand that it can feel discouraging. And let us be clear: The incoming administration that will control the federal government has threatened to take away many fundamental freedoms, and the threat of those losses is scary. = In both Louisiana and Alabama, we saw what can happen when fair maps are in place. As you’ll remember, the Allen v. Milligan decision enforced protections enshrined in the Voting Rights Act of 1965 — and because of the ruling, both Louisiana and Alabama had to redraw their maps. And this year, voters in both of those states elected two Black Members of Congress who truly reflect their political desires. In Arizona, the work we did to educate voters around the high stakes of the ballot initiative helped defeat “The Judicial Accountability Act of 2024.” As a reminder, if passed, this would have essentially ended term limits for state supreme and appellate court judges. But instead, you helped hold the line against a tremendous, partisan abuse of power, and Arizonans will continue to have a say over who sits on their highest court. And maybe even the most critical, you helped build power in states all across the country. All On the Line and affiliates recruited over 6,800 poll watchers and sent over a million text messages to voters. We have real capacity within this community. The work to restore fairness to our democracy is bigger than one election season. All On The Line has always been about the long-term fight for fair maps. And in a time like this, it’s worth repeating: The work to end gerrymandering and protect voting rights for all Americans is effective. Fair maps matter. And your support makes it possible. Next year alone, there are state house elections in Virginia, a state supreme court seat up in Wisconsin, and three state supreme court seats up in Pennsylvania. And our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), is supporting voters in active litigation in Georgia, Alabama, Louisiana, Texas, and Florida. So we must continue the fight. We cannot give up on bending the moral arc. We need to put our full weight into this work. Thank you, Peter, for what you’ve done to date. Together, we’ll continue to lay the groundwork for fair representation and the election of leaders who will defend, not undermine, our democracy. Thank you — and more soon. Biz John Bisognano President, All On The Line = is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 712 H St NE, Suite #25, Washington, DC, 20002 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Eliza Walton
subject: Oregon restores landmark Climate Protection Program!
body:
Take action on this landmark program and send a thank you to the Environmental Quality Commission and Governor Tina Kotek! | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97461974/513497009/856244269?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0OWY1OWIxLTRkYTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ivunHMAdgCkLdSONrk2JeWqjvf8IsYdkyD78YaF0hUA=&emci=c2a215be-98a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=149f59b1-4da8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) Hi Peter, In a monumental step forward for state-based climate action, the Oregon Environmental Quality Commission (EQC) just voted to restore the state’s landmark Climate Protection Program. These investments from the Climate Protection Program are especially important now that we can’t rely on climate leadership at the federal level. [**Will you take action to thank the EQC and Governor Tina Kotek on this huge win for climate in Oregon?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97461975/513497010/856244269?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0OWY1OWIxLTRkYTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ivunHMAdgCkLdSONrk2JeWqjvf8IsYdkyD78YaF0hUA=&emci=c2a215be-98a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=149f59b1-4da8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) The CPP will hold big polluters accountable for their harm against people and the environment, reducing pollution by 90% and fining companies that don’t comply. It will also invest upwards of $150 million annually in clean energy projects for frontline Oregon communities most impacted by climate damage. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97461976/513497011/856244269?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0OWY1OWIxLTRkYTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ivunHMAdgCkLdSONrk2JeWqjvf8IsYdkyD78YaF0hUA=&emci=c2a215be-98a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=149f59b1-4da8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) [**It’s time to thank the EQC Commissioners and Governor Tina Kotek for these historic climate and community protections.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97461977/513497012/856244269?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0OWY1OWIxLTRkYTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ivunHMAdgCkLdSONrk2JeWqjvf8IsYdkyD78YaF0hUA=&emci=c2a215be-98a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=149f59b1-4da8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230)** ** The CPP will help Oregon stay on track to achieve science-based emissions reductions and deliver impactful investments for environmental justice communities across the state. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97461978/513497013/856244269?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE0OWY1OWIxLTRkYTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ivunHMAdgCkLdSONrk2JeWqjvf8IsYdkyD78YaF0hUA=&emci=c2a215be-98a7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=149f59b1-4da8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=2107230) Thank you for your support! Sincerely,
Eliza Walton
OLCV Coalition Director |

clean_body: Take action on this landmark program and send a thank you to the Environmental Quality Commission and Governor Tina Kotek! | | | Hi Peter, In a monumental step forward for state-based climate action, the Oregon Environmental Quality Commission (EQC) just voted to restore the state’s landmark Climate Protection Program. These investments from the Climate Protection Program are especially important now that we can’t rely on climate leadership at the federal level. The CPP will hold big polluters accountable for their harm against people and the environment, reducing pollution by 90% and fining companies that don’t comply. It will also invest upwards of $150 million annually in clean energy projects for frontline Oregon communities most impacted by climate damage. The CPP will help Oregon stay on track to achieve science-based emissions reductions and deliver impactful investments for environmental justice communities across the state. Thank you for your support! Sincerely, Eliza Walton OLCV Coalition Director | ---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. | ---|---

subject: We’re here thanks to your care 💌🫂
body:
Fill out a thank-you note here to show your appreciation for caregivers in your community.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97461987/513497199/664783965?ms=112124_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDQ5YWViZC00ZGE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A2CJarrOJuoYVZiXmb-s8mcNxUyYcWbg5konNkc-1Rg=&emci=eba6f9e2-8ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=2d49aebd-4da8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=864787)
Dear Peter,
At some point in our lives, all of us will need care. **That means we all know someone who is a caregiver,** whether for a young child, an aging parent, a person with a disability, or another friend or family member.
If you’re a caregiver — either professionally, for your family members or balancing both — it’s likely that you’ve experienced moments where you feel underappreciated and undervalued for your work.
**We want to make sure that all caregivers feel supported and know how vital their work is.** So this Thanksgiving, we’re putting together an online thank-you wall to celebrate caregivers across the country in our community!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97461989/513497202/-652034714?ms=112124_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDQ5YWViZC00ZGE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A2CJarrOJuoYVZiXmb-s8mcNxUyYcWbg5konNkc-1Rg=&emci=eba6f9e2-8ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=2d49aebd-4da8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=864787)

**********__[Write your thank-you note](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97461992/513497207/-652034714?ms=112124_thankyou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDQ5YWViZC00ZGE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A2CJarrOJuoYVZiXmb-s8mcNxUyYcWbg5konNkc-1Rg=&emci=eba6f9e2-8ca7-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=2d49aebd-4da8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=864787)__**********

Thank you for taking a moment to give thanks to the caregivers in your life!
In support and solidarity,
Care in Action

Peter, we were honestly hoping for better after launching our Fight Fund program. Please look at this chart. Blue is the amount raised by day. The line is the number of donations by day. [](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/920?c0=em-hvf-november-fight-fund-2024.2fXGwp&refcode=kh_em_fr_20241121_b2_khc_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-&t=2&akid=284%2E2563979%2E8O-FuV) You can see the rise as we launched and the drop-off that happened after that. Not great. We need to close the gap, and we are counting on people like you who understand the stakes of holding Trump accountable to get it done. Because if we don't have the resources to do so, we won't. It'll be another four years of chaos and confusion. It's honestly that simple. That may seem like a lot of pressure, but the good news is you are not alone. Lots of people are donating today -- and they’re hoping you will too. **[So please, will you rush a donation to support the Harris Fight Fund program today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-hvf-november-fight-fund-2024?refcode=kh_em_fr_20241121_b2_khc_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-&amount=50&amounts=50%252C75%252C100%252C250%252C500&countdown=-16&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ak&utm_campaign=kh_em_fr_20241121_b2_khc_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-&refcode2=284_2563979_8O-FuV&akid=284%2E2563979%2E8O-FuV)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$50 >>](https://act.kamalaharris.com/go/1009?c0=em-hvf-november-fight-fund-2024.OpRu0f&refcode=kh_em_fr_20241121_b2_khc_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-&amount=50&amounts=50%252C75%252C100%252C250%252C500&utm_campaign=kh_em_fr_20241121_b2_khc_tier1_kfm_ped_fl_ak-fnd-&countdown=-16&t=4&akid=284%2E2563979%2E8O-FuV)

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Two battleground House races in CA are still counting votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends, I wrote to you recently about why it is that you’re still getting fundraising emails right now. One of the reasons I mentioned is that there are still races that have yet to be called, and they still need our support.
That’s why I’m reaching out today on behalf of Adam Gray, running in CA-13, and Derek Tran, running in CA-45. Both of these great Democrats are working hard to ensure that every single vote is counted, and they’re fundraising to support those efforts.
There are still thousands of votes to be counted in these two competitive districts, and the campaigns are doing outreach to voters around the clock to make sure that any rejected ballots are corrected and re-submitted — a legal process we call “curing ballots.”
If you’d like to help them with this work, consider joining me today and splitting a donation between Adam Gray and Derek Tran’s recount fundraising efforts. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-gray-tran]
Split a donation → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-gray-tran]
Making sure every vote is counted is fundamental to our democracy – and could help flip these two seats. With the margin in the House as narrow as it is, every single seat and every single vote is going to matter a lot over the next two years.
Thanks for your support and for staying engaged in this work,
Sara

clean_body: [] Friends, I wrote to you recently about why it is that you’re still getting fundraising emails right now. One of the reasons I mentioned is that there are still races that have yet to be called, and they still need our support. That’s why I’m reaching out today on behalf of Adam Gray, running in CA-13, and Derek Tran, running in CA-45. Both of these great Democrats are working hard to ensure that every single vote is counted, and they’re fundraising to support those efforts. There are still thousands of votes to be counted in these two competitive districts, and the campaigns are doing outreach to voters around the clock to make sure that any rejected ballots are corrected and re-submitted — a legal process we call “curing ballots.” If you’d like to help them with this work, consider joining me today and splitting a donation between Adam Gray and Derek Tran’s recount fundraising efforts. [] Split a donation → [] Making sure every vote is counted is fundamental to our democracy – and could help flip these two seats. With the margin in the House as narrow as it is, every single seat and every single vote is going to matter a lot over the next two years. Thanks for your support and for staying engaged in this work, Sara [] Congresswoman Sara Jacobs California’s 51st District [] Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress Sara Jacobs for Congress PO Box 120085 San Diego, CA 92112 United States www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/ [www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/] twitter.com/sarajacobsca [twitter.com/sarajacobsca] www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/ [www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/] CONTRIBUTE TODAY [] We believe these emails are a critical way for Sara to stay in touch with supporters and constituents. name: Ben Ray, EMILYs List
subject: [U.S. HOUSE] Taking back the chamber in 2026:
body:
EMILYs List was built for this |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97462277/513497944/162262288?refcode=WTEFEW53_20241121_2026House_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055453&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2MzNTg0ZC00ZWE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TJ2R5rP-MUpP__pSmOV8Rph8mjmTGuH2EpOt0kZGnUI=) Peter,

Republicans held the U.S. House majority this cycle, but just barely — they are now on track to hold the _smallest_ congressional majority since Hawaii and Alaska became states more than 50 years ago!

That means we need to flip **between two and five** seats in 2026 to take back the chamber (a few 2024 races are still too close to call!). And we're already laying the groundwork to make that happen. [**Democratic pro-choice women will be the key to securing the next U.S. House majority. Donate now to support EMILYs List women from the very beginning of their campaigns:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97462278/513497947/-1512887892?refcode=WTEFEW53_20241121_2026House_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055453&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2MzNTg0ZC00ZWE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TJ2R5rP-MUpP__pSmOV8Rph8mjmTGuH2EpOt0kZGnUI=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97462279/513497950/162262288?refcode=WTEFEW53_20241121_2026House_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055453&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2MzNTg0ZC00ZWE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TJ2R5rP-MUpP__pSmOV8Rph8mjmTGuH2EpOt0kZGnUI=)
---
If we take back the House next cycle, that majority will go a long way toward restraining the extremist agenda of the incoming Trump administration (just like it did in 2018). Here's our game plan to win back the majority in 2026 with Democratic pro-choice women:
* **Recruitment:** At this moment, there are 2026 candidates out there who _haven't even decided to run yet_. That's why we've got EMILYs List regional staff deployed _all across the country_ to scout Democratic pro-choice women who want to make a difference in their communities _and_ shape the national conversation around Democratic values in 2026.****

* **Building campaigns:** We're already kicking off resume drops and organizing workshops for new and returning campaign staff, as part of our tried-and-true recruitment and training process to ensure our candidates have the strongest teams behind them.

* **Investing in incumbents:** We know that early money is absolutely crucial to our candidates, because that's how they build the foundation to raise even _more_ money down the line (in fact, it's in our name: **E** arly **M** oney **I** s **L** ike **Y** east!). That's why we're identifying which of our incumbents will need the most support to hold their seats next cycle and making a plan to get them the resources they need.

_**I know that our candidates can take back the House next cycle.**_**** Why? Because EMILYs List women won some of the toughest House races of 2024. **Janelle Bynum (OR-05)** and **Laura Gillen (NY-04)** flipped red seats, unseating staunch MAGA extremists. **Rep. Kristen McDonald Rivet (MI-08)** won her Trump +2 district by a whopping _seven points_. And pro-choice champions like **Reps. Emilia Sykes (OH-13)** and **Marie Gluesenkamp Perez (WA-03)** held their ground in some of the toughest races of the cycle — even as billionaires like Elon Musk poured millions into their opponents' campaigns.
[**Make no mistake: the path ahead will be tough, and Republicans will throw everything they have at us. But with the support of this community, we can prepare the next generation of EMILYs List women to fight the toughest battles of 2026 — and WIN. Donate now to help TAKE BACK the House next cycle: **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97462280/513497951/-1512887892?refcode=WTEFEW53_20241121_2026House_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055453&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2MzNTg0ZC00ZWE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TJ2R5rP-MUpP__pSmOV8Rph8mjmTGuH2EpOt0kZGnUI=)

name: IL-13 Update (via Team Nikki)
subject: A fair share of federal dollars
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress [https://nvlupin
body:
Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92407/images/Budzinski_Logo_AAA.png]
PIATT, MADISON, & MACOUPIN COUNTIES: Budzinski Announces Nearly $1 Million in Rural Energy Funding
— November 18, 2024
“As our communities continue to struggle with high energy costs, the Rural Energy for America Program is making critical investments to help folks lower their power bills,” said Congresswoman Budzinski. “I’m thrilled to announce more than $950,000 in federal funding for farmers and small businesses in Piatt, Madison, and Macoupin Counties to bring more energy production online, bring down costs, and reduce harmful carbon emissions. I’ll keep working to ensure Central and Southern Illinois receives its fair share of federal dollars and empower rural communities through investments like this one.”

Team,

We knew we had to hit the ground running to continue delivering for the folks across the 13th District. That is why as many folks are still digesting the election results, Nikki is getting right back to work.

Supporting our farmers is always the right decision, and Nikki will always fight to make sure they have the resources they need to farm sustainably, battle the effects of the climate crisis, and continue delivering the food our communities rely on.

With this investment into the Rural Energy for America Program, agricultural producers and rural small businesses will have the resources they need to implement or upgrade their renewable energy systems or to make energy efficiency improvements. This leads to increases in income, business growth, reduced emissions, and lower energy costs — a win all around.

Thanks for sticking with us and supporting Nikki as she continues to fight for all of us.

— Team Nikki

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/njb-em-nov2024]
Nikki for Congress
PO Box 5171
Springfield, IL 62705
United States

I’ll keep working to ensure Central and Southern Illinois receives its fair share of federal dollars and empower rural communities through investments like this one.” Team, We knew we had to hit the ground running to continue delivering for the folks across the 13th District. That is why as many folks are still digesting the election results, Nikki is getting right back to work. Supporting our farmers is always the right decision, and Nikki will always fight to make sure they have the resources they need to farm sustainably, battle the effects of the climate crisis, and continue delivering the food our communities rely on. With this investment into the Rural Energy for America Program, agricultural producers and rural small businesses will have the resources they need to implement or upgrade their renewable energy systems or to make energy efficiency improvements. This leads to increases in income, business growth, reduced emissions, and lower energy costs — a win all around. Thanks for sticking with us and supporting Nikki as she continues to fight for all of us. — Team Nikki DONATE [] Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States Nikkiforcongress.com [ style=] | info@nikkiforcongress.com [info@nikkiforcongress.com] Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

The Associated Press called the race for Dave McCormick.

The race is OVER.

Dave WON.

But Bob Casey refuses to concede, and now a recount is underway.

Dave won this race fair and square. But now, he needs to fund lawyers and staff across the state to fight back against this ridiculous recount.

Just a few days before Election Day, I was on the campaign trail with Dave McCormick in Pennsylvania because I know Dave is the leader we need in the Senate to help get our country back on track.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1e0338b662c74c55ad9580f0073782ec&_e=iTNb3J-sC-NkdrdJctFloKSM7o9p6qqVYPFzf08_uE5rqe-QS2M3mNBSIboqysMIdWXNIZEqLMeUPXVSYr5LlePeABlwWoyLPxVwn-Q4LmNhmWvdF8xNd7mSWLOkpab780hL6QwYqSHGGld1ScdP-NHLr-vdNOGZkRR88fk2jS44m18-h0n1JZneJhgpiw2B3MCO6oJ17Znl0HTilna_WMmRsSWaKnkqC1Kj5VFSiUJR79pXa9kpkcpmkD_soB66MNLfhqX0Ilk6nzOCwVz7My2oxT5JM49qekgB1SxtzAc0PUI1I7bhGaQUnfeGI5SLAJ5glvLFGlqFbQSb8aJEM2d9F4de7vPW0GF2phxuFeyvoUrav4cU1-NkvVPqzlFNYeSlmceXc6M_vvgWI_xW3Q%3D%3D)

But with Casey refusing to concede and a recount happening right now, he needs your help to fight back.

name: Dan Kovats, IDCCA
subject: I know that this has been a long election cycle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97462726/513499468/458544607?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_211124_FR_County-Party&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWU0YTA5OGEtNTBhOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ADx0mUS-91afGcBKzmAznBby_wS534GvRRdRfZOaK34=)
Team,

Look, I know that this has been a long election cycle. I know we, and other campaigns, have asked you for money a lot. But the thing is, our work at IDCCA doesn’t stop. We have municipal elections coming up in April 2025 that we’ve already begun preparing for.

The municipal elections will be the first elections of the new Trump era, and our first opportunity to prove that we’re still in the game and not giving up on our values. However, our county parties need to rebuild their infrastructure so they can start planning and prepping for next April.

[**Will you make a split contribution right now between us and over 75 Illinois County Parties so we can start preparing for April?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97462727/513499470/458544607?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_211124_FR_County-Party&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWU0YTA5OGEtNTBhOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ADx0mUS-91afGcBKzmAznBby_wS534GvRRdRfZOaK34=)

| | We couldn’t be more proud of this team. Even though we faced painful losses, the work you did still made an impact. In the face of so many obstacles, you kept going. You worked hard throughout this election season — mobilizing to call out voter suppression attempts, helping to fundraise for our work, and turning out in record numbers for early voting here in Georgia. We did this work together, and we need to be ready for the fights to come. **So we want to ask you, friends, how will you continue to show up for voting rights?** It could be as simple as reminding your friends and family to check their registration after they move or getting involved in community organizing. Maybe you plan to contact your representatives about the issues that matter most. [**However you’re showing up at this moment, we want to hear from you. Click here to share with us today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97462746/513499538/-2102468181?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241121_f_HowAreYouShowingUp_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODRhMDk4YS01MGE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRfxwHgSTgCUK5WLCaGbNbhSxpOIdzaX87XNBLSApRw=&emci=e99bb2a7-43a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a84a098a-50a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=1037277) | [SHARE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97462748/513499540/-2102468181?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241121_f_HowAreYouShowingUp_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODRhMDk4YS01MGE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRfxwHgSTgCUK5WLCaGbNbhSxpOIdzaX87XNBLSApRw=&emci=e99bb2a7-43a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a84a098a-50a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=1037277)

The movement to protect and expand the freedom to vote is built by people like you. In the face of a Trump victory, we’re focused more than ever on moving forward to ensure everyone can participate in our democracy.
We know there will be future right-wing efforts to challenge our freedoms and keep us from the ballot box — that’s why we need your support in the months ahead.
[**Commit to taking action to defend our democracy and let us know how you’ll fight back.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97462750/513499542/-2102468181?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20241121_f_HowAreYouShowingUp_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODRhMDk4YS01MGE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRfxwHgSTgCUK5WLCaGbNbhSxpOIdzaX87XNBLSApRw=&emci=e99bb2a7-43a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=a84a098a-50a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=1037277)

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: protecting our nation’s security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Peter, in case you missed it, I joined Jen Psaki this week to discuss the stakes of Trump’s nomination of Tulsi Gabbard as Director of National Intelligence:

| **Peter, in case you missed it, I joined Jen Psaki this week to discuss the stakes of Trump’s nomination of Tulsi Gabbard as Director of National Intelligence:**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97462790/513499729/-1898250644?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-11-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTk0YmUzZDEtNTBhOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f_TzBtNFP7i-yG8kj0pU_MYoWxQhdik1BOfa4eTaiIc=)
Let me be clear: this selection is deeply concerning. As a former CIA case officer who worked undercover, I understand firsthand the high stakes involved in America’s intelligence operations. The methods, sources, and the sensitive information we rely on to safeguard national security are critical to our safety and well-being.

The Director of National Intelligence oversees the entire U.S. intelligence community. They have access to all the intelligence that informs decisions to keep the American people safe.

Frankly, Tulsi Gabbard has cozied up to our adversaries, including Vladimir Putin, and has tweeted out Kremlin propaganda.**This isn’t about partisan politics. This is about protecting our national security.**

I have dedicated my career to safeguarding our democracy and protecting our fellow Americans. As I continue my work in Congress and look ahead to serving as Virginia’s next Governor, I will keep speaking out on these critical issues. [_**I hope you’ll join me in making sure that we have the leadership necessary to protect our country and our future:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97462791/513499730/-1898250644?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-11-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTk0YmUzZDEtNTBhOC1lZjExLTg4ZDAtNjA0NWJkZDYyZGI2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f_TzBtNFP7i-yG8kj0pU_MYoWxQhdik1BOfa4eTaiIc=)

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Protect Social Security →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
With a Republican trifecta in Washington, we must fight like never before.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=SGK%2Bi13H1ZnyiFKCNcXm41me5SviTAQ%2FuFwADUpux9%2FlbdVrr9k5kxn5nMpWF9VpQKtvl1pyFkfRZJUjm4qFMdq8EKy2uH4qQXKCzAw0MX1azhLE36hNSDN8R1cNsmbn1WIy0m0zv9vHNOr5Lu5ZLsQ91qp3LrCvRsIJuvlhDBuDPNRoPFnWcYPhO7MnP4Hwew5IeQ598z4XGD6u31NBgOoBI01PMeFCEj3htbvlk1XY%2FRzHvZCOogirO4bJKwUcu5V7%2FewBJOXXM3KKaCdhPFaYYf42A8G0ciEZUNjrmeY6hze34eiEgP0FAFSyYh2H8TysOV2CSC5ZAPHEujggZwHTXTHyYjDBxWRtpb8nnO5iIccKufUP2bom1%2FEBMzB04ZZtEGh4uSMg2oNgBM%2FBs1qoGn9n4PlbpTasEg%2BWtX0%3D)
---
| |
---
Saludos, Gabe here. Our fight to protect our democracy has never been more important, and it’s going to start right here in New Mexico. With a Republican trifecta in Washington, we must fight like never before to defend our basic rights and freedoms. That’s why I voted to protect Social Security last week. Time and time again, Republicans have made it clear that Social Security is on the chopping block under president-elect Donald Trump. And I refuse to let any New Mexican be left behind by MAGA extremist leadership. That’s why we need to fight to protect our seniors. [My team and I are circulating a brand new petition to demand Republicans protect Social Security. We need at least 7,000 signatures before midnight tonight. Will you stand with me today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97462923/513500092/1553810784?source=SBD_GV_EM_EN_112024_1_1_SOCIALSECURITY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzg2YTM1ZS01MWE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3llsYpJiiSIAS632lJ-jSoxJKlSQU_dkL8oCfUGsSw=&emci=3b97384c-d4a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=3386a35e-51a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4482565) | | [SIGN ON TODAY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97462924/513500094/1553810784?source=SBD_GV_EM_EN_112024_1_1_SOCIALSECURITY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzg2YTM1ZS01MWE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3llsYpJiiSIAS632lJ-jSoxJKlSQU_dkL8oCfUGsSw=&emci=3b97384c-d4a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=3386a35e-51a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4482565)
---
Our seniors deserve to receive their full, fair and hard-earned benefits.
I ran for Congress in 2021 to fight for EVERY single New Mexican. And in 2024, that hasn’t changed. I’m fighting to protect every single one of our freedoms and rights, and that’s why I’m demanding Republicans protect Social Security as we gear up for another presidency under MAGA extremist Donald Trump.
[Will you join me today and take 60 seconds or less to sign our new petition today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97462925/513500095/1553810784?source=SBD_GV_EM_EN_112024_1_1_SOCIALSECURITY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzg2YTM1ZS01MWE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3llsYpJiiSIAS632lJ-jSoxJKlSQU_dkL8oCfUGsSw=&emci=3b97384c-d4a5-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=3386a35e-51a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4482565)

clean_body: With a Republican trifecta in Washington, we must fight like never before. Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Saludos, Gabe here. Our fight to protect our democracy has never been more important, and it’s going to start right here in New Mexico. With a Republican trifecta in Washington, we must fight like never before to defend our basic rights and freedoms. That’s why I voted to protect Social Security last week. Time and time again, Republicans have made it clear that Social Security is on the chopping block under president-elect Donald Trump. And I refuse to let any New Mexican be left behind by MAGA extremist leadership. That’s why we need to fight to protect our seniors. | | Our seniors deserve to receive their full, fair and hard-earned benefits. I ran for Congress in 2021 to fight for EVERY single New Mexican. And in 2024, that hasn’t changed. I’m fighting to protect every single one of our freedoms and rights, and that’s why I’m demanding Republicans protect Social Security as we gear up for another presidency under MAGA extremist Donald Trump. | Gracias, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Thank you, San Francisco!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
https://www.pelosiforcongress.org [https://www.pelosiforcongress.org]

Dear Friends,My colleagues in Congress have bestowed many honors on me. But in the Congress, my greatest honor comes from you — to step foot on the Floor of the House and say that I speak for the people of San Francisco. Thank you, San Francisco, for your vote and the continued opportunity to be your voice in the Congress.

To have earned the overwhelming support of voters from every community of our beautifully diverse city in my re-election reflects and strengthens my commitment to always serve each and every San Franciscan with respect, humility, compassion and gratitude:

* Continuing to deliver jobs, resources and increased opportunity for San Francisco families
* Fighting to Save Our Health Care from Republican sabotage and attack
* Defending our Constitution, our fundamental rights and freedoms and our shared Democratic principles

With your help, Democratic House members and challengers ran against the tide in this election and won decisive victories in swing seats — and thanks to you, we will have leverage to protect your health care, rights and freedoms in the new Congress.

To everyone who voted, volunteered and helped to build our amazing grassroots community, you are our VIPs — our Volunteers In Politics. You are the heart of our Democracy and I thank you.

God bless you and God bless America,

NANCY
SOME HOUSE RACES ARE TOO CLOSE TO CALL! [https://linktr.ee/TeamPelosi]Volunteer with Team Pelosi to ensure every last vote is counted!
VOLUNTEER >> [https://linktr.ee/TeamPelosi]
Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District.
She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support?

name: Save America Now PAC
subject: A Quick Message From Our Friends at San Diego Christian College
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/saveamernow/a-quick-message-from-our-friends-at-san-diego-christian-college?e=c50c08d277)
---
| | | A quick message from one of our partners.
---
| [ ](https://saveamernow.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bfee6d8faa8bd945842640631&id=547d8514c0&e=c50c08d277)
---
| |
---
| **Dear Save America Now PAC Supporter,**

As the year comes to a close, we at **San Diego Christian College (SDCC**) are filled with excitement for the future and gratitude for supporters like you who have made 2024 a landmark year. Thanks to your generosity, **SDCC** has been able to grow and expand in ways that enrich our students’ lives, impact our community, and advance our mission.

## Aviation Program Revival
We are thrilled to announce the return of **SDCC’** s Aviation Program, which has historically been one of our most popular and prestigious offerings. With updated curriculum and training facilities, we’re equipping a new generation of pilots with the skills and ethical grounding to excel in an increasingly complex aviation landscape. Our revived aviation program is set to lift students to new heights, preparing them for exciting careers in aviation and aeronautics.

## Expanded Teacher Education and Credentialing Programs
Our commitment to developing quality educators has deepened this year. In response to growing demand, **SDCC** has expanded our teacher education and credentialing programs, equipping students to become exceptional educators who will influence future generations. With our renewed focus on practical training and in-field experience,**SDCC** teachers are entering classrooms ready to make a positive impact on their communities from day one.

## New Healthcare Programs in Partnership with Community Leaders
**SDCC** is also entering the healthcare education sector through new partnerships with Grossmont Healthcare District, Sharp Medical, Seaport Scripps Home Health, and the East County Economic Development Council. These collaborations allow us to design healthcare programs that meet current industry needs and provide a pathway for our students to serve in critical healthcare roles. By expanding into healthcare, **SDCC** aims to address the needs of our community, provide job-ready graduates, and improve public health outcomes across San Diego and beyond.

## Your Year-End Impact
These exciting developments are possible only with the support of friends like you. As we approach year-end, we invite you to consider an impactful gift to **SDCC**. Your tax-deductible contribution will go directly toward enhancing our academic programs, funding scholarships, and upgrading facilities to meet the needs of a growing student body. Every dollar you give will not only help us achieve our immediate goals but will also create lasting opportunities for our students and community.

As the calendar year winds down, please take a moment to make your year-end, tax-deductible gift to **SDCC** by December 31. Your support will make a difference in the lives of our students and enable us to continue offering programs that reflect our commitment to Truth, Purpose, and Impact.

To contribute, please visit [**https://sdcc.edu/give**](https://saveamernow.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bfee6d8faa8bd945842640631&id=7f675dd18c&e=c50c08d277) or mail your donation to:

**SDCC - Advancement**
280 Riverview Parkway
Santee, CA 92071

Thank you for considering this opportunity to partner with **SDCC** as we build a brighter future together. With your support, we look forward to an incredible 2025 and beyond.

With heartfelt gratitude,
Board of Trustees and Executive Team
San Diego Christian College

**P.S. Your year-end gift is tax-deductible and will directly support SDCC’s vision to develop the Christian leaders of tomorrow.**
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://saveamernow.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bfee6d8faa8bd945842640631&id=e148d2faad&e=c50c08d277)
---
|
---

name: Team Schrier
subject: Congress is in a lame duck session right now, but our farmers don’t have time for delays.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Add your name next to Kim’s ASAP → [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97463552/513502129/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGE1MTAwNC01NGE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qkK6Sg-TnqIXV6IglXo6rAmnO6o89PNNKP1NZ1yyEaE=&emci=a264cdae-36a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=bda51004-54a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter —

Right now, our legislative bodies are in a lame duck session — _a time when not much gets done as Congress waits for a new administration to take over._

But there’s one issue that we simply can’t afford to wait for: **The Farm Bill.**

Last year, Congress passed a temporary extension that is set to expire soon, and farmers across Washington state and the entire country are counting on us to act and renew this critical bill.

If Congress doesn’t pass a new Farm Bill, it could mean devastating consequences for the people who put food on our tables. As Chair of the Farm Bill Task Force, Kim is fighting tooth and nail to protect farmers, strengthen rural economies, and make sure no one gets left behind. **But Peter, she can’t do it alone.**

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Your Support Matters! …and Flipped MAGA Seats in Rural America 🤠
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
| | |
Hey friends!
It’s been two weeks since the election, and we have a few big updates! We also have a fundraising ask, which I’ll get to in a second.
Firstly, although we didn’t win our election, we received the highest number of votes and our best percentage to date. On the back of that momentum, we flipped two major local seats:

* **Hesperia:** Chris Ochoa ousted a longtime MAGA city council member, becoming the first Democrat and the first Mexican American to serve on the city council.
* **Adelanto:** We also flipped another city council seat, Stevonna Evans ousted another MAGA incumbent.

Our organizing—and your support—made that happen.
These local**blue wins** in a year that favored red made me realize something important: we have to increase our focus on local elections. A large part of the reason why we’re where we are politically is because of decades of Barry Goldwater-style organizing. Don’t know who Barry Goldwater was? He turned his failed Republican presidential run in 1964 into an organizing juggernaut that focused with laser precision on winning local races—city council, school board, water board, college board, etc.—for Team Red. The result? Reagan, two generations of shifting the country rightward (including the Democratic Party), and now a Republican trifecta led by Trump.
It’s time to turn the tide.
Starting in the next few weeks, we’ll transition our congressional resources into a new organization focused exclusively on building local power and voter registration: Local Democracy Project. Leveraging the strategies that led to our recent wins, we’ll identify candidates and districts to train and run in 2026. We’ll do this in coalition with outstanding organizers across the country and their regional and national organizations to unify strategies around building local power.
As Democrats and Democratic-aligned independents, we have to stop rolling over and playing dead in rural America. We have to build power locally. We have no other choice.
**Here’s where you come in:** Our team needs financial support to bridge the next month as we lay the foundation for this new organization. I know a lot of folks are feeling tapped out and exhausted—trust me, I get it. clean_body: | | | Hey friends! It’s been two weeks since the election, and we have a few big updates! We also have a fundraising ask, which I’ll get to in a second. Firstly, although we didn’t win our election, we received the highest number of votes and our best percentage to date. On the back of that momentum, we flipped two major local seats: Hesperia: Chris Ochoa ousted a longtime MAGA city council member, becoming the first Democrat and the first Mexican American to serve on the city council. Adelanto: We also flipped another city council seat, Stevonna Evans ousted another MAGA incumbent. Our organizing—and your support—made that happen. These localblue wins in a year that favored red made me realize something important: we have to increase our focus on local elections. A large part of the reason why we’re where we are politically is because of decades of Barry Goldwater-style organizing. Don’t know who Barry Goldwater was? He turned his failed Republican presidential run in 1964 into an organizing juggernaut that focused with laser precision on winning local races—city council, school board, water board, college board, etc.—for Team Red. The result? Reagan, two generations of shifting the country rightward (including the Democratic Party), and now a Republican trifecta led by Trump. It’s time to turn the tide. Starting in the next few weeks, we’ll transition our congressional resources into a new organization focused exclusively on building local power and voter registration: Local Democracy Project. Leveraging the strategies that led to our recent wins, we’ll identify candidates and districts to train and run in 2026. We’ll do this in coalition with outstanding organizers across the country and their regional and national organizations to unify strategies around building local power. As Democrats and Democratic-aligned independents, we have to stop rolling over and playing dead in rural America. We have to build power locally. We have no other choice. Here’s where you come in: Our team needs financial support to bridge the next month as we lay the foundation for this new organization. I know a lot of folks are feeling tapped out and exhausted—trust me, I get it. I’ve been running uphill for four years now. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Moreover, if you’d like to be involved or have advice or thoughts, email me directly: derek@derekmarshallca.com Thank you for believing in us! – Derek is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 | | Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Derek Marshall for Congress, please .

name: John Fetterman
subject: Matt Gaetz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Did you see that Matt Gaetz dropped out of the running for Attorney General?
#
Hey Derek, it's John.
Did you see that Matt Gaetz dropped out of the running for Attorney General? Definitely didn’t see that one coming. 🙄
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241121?refcode=em20241121-9615&refcode2=9615_434096_jMsnfX&akid=9615%2E434096%2EjMsnfX)
Look, that nomination was an *obvious* troll. With all the dirt on that guy, no way he was getting confirmed in the Senate.
I’m not opposed to voting for someone I have some political differences with. That’s to be expected when the other party controls the White House. But they’ve gotta be qualified for the job — and this clown just isn't.
**I’ll always do what’s right for PA, no matter who’s president at the time. But I need your help to keep this seat and our commonwealth 🔵 in the next elections. [Can you pitch in $5 to help us get a head start?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241121?refcode=em20241121-9615&amount=5&refcode2=9615_434096_jMsnfX&akid=9615%2E434096%2EjMsnfX)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241121?amount=5&refcode=em20241121-9615&refcode2=9615_434096_jMsnfX&akid=9615%2E434096%2EjMsnfX)**
Thanks,
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241121-9615-footer&t=1&refcode2=9615_434096_jMsnfX&akid=9615%2E434096%2EjMsnfX)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9615%2E434096%2EjMsnfX)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9615%2E434096%2EjMsnfX)

We wouldn’t be reaching out unless it was important.

### What is a sponsor?
### a sponsor is registered voter who would like to see the proposed legislation or petition on the ballot. No formal obligations, you just have to have the chance to read the petition and agree it is something you would want on the ballot in 2026.
#### I will send you the petition with some language updates, then you will have to sign the sponsor sheet and send it to me by mail. I need wet signatures, please make sure it is mailed to the correct address, I will include instructions on where to return. If you are in Anchorage, Eagle River, Mat-Su I can collect it from you in person.
#### (I need 100 sponsors, currently we have 500 people signed up to help Repeal RCV in 2026)

name: Jenna Burns
subject: She’s trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life
body:
For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.
Dear Peter,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9d15cf6e5b12480db1c7fdd777eb33e0&_e=9RK5V2j0G56dYxbMkWUVUcheaONimkg7kwZgVLQFIVaCgE307IYPHhbNsHs_ltpcBNOK3kwPLYFgqg8Jg67Sbwurt3nuXUDq4y1aMO_fgpCXN4c7DGdRyklnoLPsKWraFv9igGoRhmw5DDtIPsTm_u-79IZCy4yZdEpB1IBi_WXI3BIIgAwFSwAgTRVN5vh4kfRECLZk5dwBZLhJSzBBt-zTDrKCJVKsy-tEy1s0qmk5H2wXvQfnnd1R_4BEItGvMLUiyEclN0URT3PfMpXB_p11UIcJT-6kFqFtQCWggawJp7mmQpLL7TnLKv8-m9FCdG1oc0uMbSTBbkGMAJMHakdYOZMY8cyWd0O8lfR6jemsOgK3IImC-_7axB4MUNy8)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9d15cf6e5b12480db1c7fdd777eb33e0&_e=9RK5V2j0G56dYxbMkWUVUcheaONimkg7kwZgVLQFIVaCgE307IYPHhbNsHs_ltpcBNOK3kwPLYFgqg8Jg67Sbwurt3nuXUDq4y1aMO_fgpCXN4c7DGdRyklnoLPsKWraFv9igGoRhmw5DDtIPsTm_u-79IZCy4yZdEpB1IBi_WXI3BIIgAwFSwAgTRVN5vh4kfRECLZk5dwBZLhJSzBBt-zTDrKCJVKsy-tEy1s0qmlkFAXuHPSm4e9zSG_LYrL2cai-t7YfeYTWrHihzl05nva8lSai7QHw2Nrx9-fnSNOglTfD6569Lm4yzBpJt1vmKt0EmpGi3JJSdPU_R_pLJdVdIQGuo1eei0u9T16kie2QdKa5O_r4R4l0Oz2JAFMe)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9d15cf6e5b12480db1c7fdd777eb33e0&_e=9RK5V2j0G56dYxbMkWUVUcheaONimkg7kwZgVLQFIVaCgE307IYPHhbNsHs_ltpcBNOK3kwPLYFgqg8Jg67Sbwurt3nuXUDq4y1aMO_fgpCXN4c7DGdRyklnoLPsKWraFv9igGoRhmw5DDtIPsTm_u-79IZCy4yZdEpB1IBi_WXI3BIIgAwFSwAgTRVN5vh4kfRECLZk5dwBZLhJSzBBt-zTDrKCJVKsy-tEy1s0qmnBj0YcSiSvHgWeqd9UXk_IS6Q0uQK9lM7w9SaNrXIQKxuQRZvjvS21Mj0be-xSB_lSsrr08kOtkYv6HDb2Hb--9ENC9zdEY1eIIkQSw5sFa0bdqnHBsgPRxyTTq8V2KUtJT1mJs5UlBXTG-7CtrYYW)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9d15cf6e5b12480db1c7fdd777eb33e0&_e=9RK5V2j0G56dYxbMkWUVUcheaONimkg7kwZgVLQFIVaCgE307IYPHhbNsHs_ltpcBNOK3kwPLYFgqg8Jg67Sbwurt3nuXUDq4y1aMO_fgpCXN4c7DGdRyklnoLPsKWraFv9igGoRhmw5DDtIPsTm_u-79IZCy4yZdEpB1IBi_WXI3BIIgAwFSwAgTRVN5vh4kfRECLZk5dwBZLhJSzBBt-zTDrKCJVKsy-tEy1s0qmllPxJjLCZn0QzcoBMskpcSyK3x1ttDLZ1oFcjLJm5A2FpyuR8ZsfKMR3Eo57vhvamfF9dZ4xzkjHKBzRkMFN9_RNSvz7P_03pIWQmizdGaro_xV8QgMXPoC_hnDGeRVTwC4pNywPikgOYETg3GIzWF)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9d15cf6e5b12480db1c7fdd777eb33e0&_e=9RK5V2j0G56dYxbMkWUVUcheaONimkg7kwZgVLQFIVaCgE307IYPHhbNsHs_ltpcBNOK3kwPLYFgqg8Jg67Sbwurt3nuXUDq4y1aMO_fgpCXN4c7DGdRyklnoLPsKWraFv9igGoRhmw5DDtIPsTm_u-79IZCy4yZdEpB1IBi_WXI3BIIgAwFSwAgTRVN5vh4kfRECLZk5dwBZLhJSzBBt-zTDrKCJVKsy-tEy1s0qmkER4YhnNTm81EXxi6TUEVCsOW42vdZNE6zNhWhI9W8Aewts4aOe4JtSbOwRJEdJzkhuWLJMd57W_okApqOxc7J76KvX45SIrxG9ugs9Hs6E7BusuVb9RJNksfV1gXQwiFTDNRqWa30Qb7omgHI89uB)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9d15cf6e5b12480db1c7fdd777eb33e0&_e=9RK5V2j0G56dYxbMkWUVUcheaONimkg7kwZgVLQFIVaCgE307IYPHhbNsHs_ltpcBNOK3kwPLYFgqg8Jg67Sbwurt3nuXUDq4y1aMO_fgpCXN4c7DGdRyklnoLPsKWraFv9igGoRhmw5DDtIPsTm_u-79IZCy4yZdEpB1IBi_WXI3BIIgAwFSwAgTRVN5vh4kfRECLZk5dwBZLhJSzBBt-zTDrKCJVKsy-tEy1s0qmmbALGnDFFQXdb64IPI7ciH90c56eknnCbAOBluwfJWBnCvLx2dp9oldbtrxzb7D_kFmtbyCADkdG8_WeZEcnCY1SpS4MnD0jum1OxdZ-i8osiYBWuQ-btkKuVf5XVXwUVOqS1zw9oT923JeQk9KM1x)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! **[Follow this link right now to make your best tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to LELDF.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9d15cf6e5b12480db1c7fdd777eb33e0&_e=9RK5V2j0G56dYxbMkWUVUcheaONimkg7kwZgVLQFIVaCgE307IYPHhbNsHs_ltpcBNOK3kwPLYFgqg8Jg67Sbwurt3nuXUDq4y1aMO_fgpCXN4c7DGdRyklnoLPsKWraFv9igGoRhmw5DDtIPsTm_u-79IZCy4yZdEpB1IBi_WXI3BIIgAwFSwAgTRVN5vh4kfRECLZk5dwBZLhJSzBBt-zTDrKCJVKsy-tEy1s0qmkdyfrywfJU-hTl9S-zHlj-UDg2S_W8xmMmYZ8VJD9MZAuaUwTxu3eLd643UGZCrnZ_TWLLVDtSoczJ9GajAq0NHr2rqlW2AJsA2MXiEhOuviKd0kSBu8nXtZYH-IKbsm6lnRcFdJixXI2JsIRfOqGs)** Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
