clean_body: For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. Dear Peter, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Click to unsubscribe

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: We need these judges
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112124_2&amount=25]
Team,
With Donald Trump set to take office in January, the Senate must act swiftly to confirm President Biden’s judicial nominees.
Securing these appointments is one of the most productive actions supporters of voting rights can take to protect the judiciary from a right-wing shift and preserve progress on key issues like voting rights, reproductive rights, and environmental protections.
Currently, more than a dozen Biden judicial nominees are awaiting confirmation, including federal district and appeals court judges who are crucial to upholding constitutional rights and balanced justice . If these seats are left open, Trump will have the opportunity to pack the courts with judges who could dismantle decades of progress.
The time is now — let’s not lose this critical opportunity: Tell the Senate to confirm these judges now >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]
Senator Elizabeth Warren put it bluntly in a recent op-ed: " [We] need to act like the clock is running out—because it is ."
We call on the Senate to immediately confirm all pending judicial nominees. This is our chance to protect the judiciary from an extremist shift and to ensure that our courts reflect the values of fairness, justice, and equality for all Americans.
Add your name to urge the Senate to prioritize judicial confirmations and stand firm for a fair and balanced judiciary >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/tell-senate-democrats-confirm-bidens-judges-now?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions&refcode=1124judges]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=112124_2&amount=25]

Currently, more than a dozen Biden judicial nominees are awaiting confirmation, including federal district and appeals court judges who are crucial to upholding constitutional rights and balanced justice . If these seats are left open, Trump will have the opportunity to pack the courts with judges who could dismantle decades of progress. The time is now — let’s not lose this critical opportunity: Tell the Senate to confirm these judges now >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] Senator Elizabeth Warren put it bluntly in a recent op-ed: " [We] need to act like the clock is running out—because it is ." We call on the Senate to immediately confirm all pending judicial nominees. This is our chance to protect the judiciary from an extremist shift and to ensure that our courts reflect the values of fairness, justice, and equality for all Americans. Add your name to urge the Senate to prioritize judicial confirmations and stand firm for a fair and balanced judiciary >> [] SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

Hold onto your ruby slippers, folks! Donald Trump has just pulled back the curtain by selecting Mehmet Oz—yes, the Dr. Oz of daytime TV fame and fraudulent diet pills—down the yellow brick road to lead the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS).
This decision has us spinning like a tornado in Kansas! With a whopping $2.6 trillion budget and over 100 million Americans depending on these programs, we simply cannot trust someone whose medical advice is shakier than a house caught in a cyclone.
**Friend, we aren’t in Kansas anymore. The flying monkeys are loose!**
**[Let's pull back the curtain on this risky appointment. We need someone who can navigate this complex landscape, not a wizard waving a wand of smoke and mirrors! We need a trusted figure with a heart, courage, and a brain - and a commitment to evidence-based healthcare. ** Liars, fraudsters, and quacks, oh my! Stand with us to protect our healthcare system. -Able Dems elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Left Ledger 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . This tour isn’t just about what’s on Josh’s mind; it’s about listening to what’s on the minds of the hardworking people who live here.

In just the first days of this campaign, we’ve heard from families directly that our state is too expensive and costs are too high. People love Jersey, but they’re struggling with high taxes, rising costs, and a lack of affordable housing. **We can fix this.

New Jersey families deserve a leader who puts their needs first, who understands their struggles, and who will fight tooth and nail to deliver results. Josh is running to be the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs” Governor who solves problems and gets it done.**

[**Click here to chip in, then join us at a diner near you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97464583/513505606/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20241121_FR_Diners_0_3MO_TeamGottheimer_NA_NA_1.1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTQzZDQ1Yy01OGE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Qcj-6INC7FARE1-Aegy-2aSz9RCtaSUfrC-exz0DAU=&emci=639eba56-58a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=2543d45c-58a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=37438246)

Team Gottheimer

body:
Endlessly scrolling through Netflix without being able to decide what to watch is an all-too-common problem, but it’s easier to solve if you have a specific genre in mind. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snbnzy&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

| Endlessly scrolling through Netflix without being able to decide what to watch is an all-too-common problem, but it’s easier to solve if you have a specific genre in mind. And while most of the history dramas streaming on the platform aren’t exactly historical themselves, as Netflix’s catalogue is known to skew toward newer films, that doesn’t mean they aren’t worth watching. Here are five of the best, which tell stories ranging from complex biographies to a single day in World War I.

clean_body: Endlessly scrolling through Netflix without being able to decide what to watch is an all-too-common problem, but it’s easier to solve if you have a specific genre in mind. | Endlessly scrolling through Netflix without being able to decide what to watch is an all-too-common problem, but it’s easier to solve if you have a specific genre in mind. And while most of the history dramas streaming on the platform aren’t exactly historical themselves, as Netflix’s catalogue is known to skew toward newer films, that doesn’t mean they aren’t worth watching. Here are five of the best, which tell stories ranging from complex biographies to a single day in World War I. | Advertisement | More on Movies | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|---|--- Recommended Reading | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|---|--- Advertisement | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- A daily digest of history's most fascinating happenings. | Want to unsubscribe? | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2024 History Facts. name: Democrats Win Seats PAC
subject: we need to stand united
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democrats Win Seats PAC
body:
Our mission at DWS PAC is to strategically direct resources to help elect Democrats around the country, and our success depends on support from thousands of donors across the country. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.dwspac.com/p/bg-w4eO8DEWuKhf2unAuQg2?unsubscribedata=9NbdSQR43maYIbI8%2FQqiPi5UvfKfFjE%2BLqENt2L6sF6co6OXwS8k4q%2Fuh9Zp7Q7DeD8ufi7eemXAd771Nde23uELEfZLKwzwwtdVwdore1zWpBGfO7rLG8t%2FYWCtA5vMUEdZrbk%2BYf9Ohc3NLpCXj1vW9Uz53fo6C7wHATiUAXwS4ICP%2BWOu3GWhI6NHmTz4tf0787skxlKujJlq%2BSZyHf0BKMFHEvd0Dok49zjBEsOGCGG44BrCu4ctrHx1ZiMFruudctO2oaaV%2BJ99ru98bTwqnNFaI7fjnnwIJZWV7Lr48X8P0dBi355QnB%2FtcQu9eWdGP7xsVD82OOBzUjX3ji7F9TiZd8e3dSajLZb3bQ1MAwFAJNhXLhcpUeuGlv57oV2QxbIFyFG7%2FwVHOHXS6s6BlKMx%2F5SvZRZ562mwR8U%3D).

| Peter, losing at the top of the ticket this cycle was heartbreaking — but thanks to the hard work of supporters like you, we won several key House races across the country.

We have a bold, new class of freshmen representatives ready to roll up their sleeves and fight for the American people. You helped elect from the Red-to-Blue list: • Shomari Figures (AL-02)
• George Whitesides (CA-27)
• Dave Min (CA-47)
• April McClain Delaney (MD-06)
• Kristen McDonald Rivet (MI-08)
• Laura Gillen (NY-04)
• Josh Riley (NY-19)
• John Mannion (NY-22)

# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.

clean_body: The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way It's a voice America needs | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Reader,I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there's also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way. The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. | | | | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

subject: Our last line of defense against Trump’s agenda

body:
State leaders are leading the charge.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97464692/513506119/1328794144?refcode=ea.625ecd47-59a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.625ecd47-59a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyNWVjZDQ3LTU5YTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cLoHAB8EzgJOjsvYV_Vj3-Pve4thdLeTwAPgJPjprrs=&emci=d1493711-4ca8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&emdi=625ecd47-59a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ceid=4823105)
---
The stakes couldn’t be higher. In just under two months, Donald Trump will reclaim the presidency with a cabinet of fossil fuel loyalists and a reckless agenda to undo decades of climate progress. **And while it’s easy to feel hopeless, state and local leaders are showing us that resilience matters — they’re taking bold action to protect our planet, our rights, and our future:**
* **California Governor Gavin Newsom** has called a special legislative session to craft “Trump-proof” laws and bolster legal resources at the state level to protect climate action, reproductive freedom, and more.
* **Washington State Attorney General Bob Ferguson** is assembling a coalition of state leaders to preemptively challenge Trump’s extreme federal policies in court.
* **Democratic governors in Colorado and Illinois** are leading a new initiative, “Governors Safeguarding Democracy,” to help states protect the rule of law from Trump’s fascist agenda.

**These leaders understand what’s at stake. At JanePAC, so do we.** Across the country, dozens of JanePAC-endorsed climate champions have secured key victories this year. From state legislatures to city councils to public utility boards, they’re stepping into critical positions to create clean energy policies, enforce pollution limits, and block Big Oil’s attempts to exploit their power. **[But we can’t stop there. Expanding our firewall of climate leaders is more critical than ever. Trump and his allies won’t wait to attack our progress, and we can’t wait to defend it. We must act now to expand this coalition and elect even more champions in 2025. This fight demands all of us. Will you chip in a few dollars today to help us fortify this defense and build a climate movement that can take on Trump’s agenda?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97464693/513506120/2105508926?refcode=ea.625ecd47-59a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.625ecd47-59a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyNWVjZDQ3LTU5YTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cLoHAB8EzgJOjsvYV_Vj3-Pve4thdLeTwAPgJPjprrs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97464694/513506123/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.625ecd47-59a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.625ecd47-59a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyNWVjZDQ3LTU5YTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cLoHAB8EzgJOjsvYV_Vj3-Pve4thdLeTwAPgJPjprrs=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97464695/513506125/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.625ecd47-59a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.625ecd47-59a8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyNWVjZDQ3LTU5YTgtZWYxMS04OGQwLTYwNDViZGQ2MmRiNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cLoHAB8EzgJOjsvYV_Vj3-Pve4thdLeTwAPgJPjprrs=)

| | My friend, Remember the BILLION dollars that Kamala Harris raised in her 100-day campaign? Well, reports are starting to give us a clear picture of how mismanaged her campaign was. The Harris campaign paid Oprah Winfrey, Beyonce, and other celebrities for endorsements and ended her campaign with 20 million dollars in debt. They spent **$450,000 a day** to run an ad on the Las Vegas sphere.
---
[](http://links.arenawins.com/u/click?_t=f9ef163c38f94024905cc6b5e55f222e&_m=82f55f06e51c47f6907b4802bcdc6b11&_e=4IK3uR2teipryNDzXkaV9Dbkyz3vj8JkmmNkCVv5zPpnqFlSVqYfky_oCEqbzYUKI06sIkQaOSDRJVdExyEmS08JBypxW6t1pElBJZSds9Jf7lwj4QszscNW3FqIIGTUFYsl7cCL02vdPXQU3nRJxE2iuc6AvGfOebEIx6fwyKgL5mSHuSqeEQzflNf5-X8_qRTc4echJLmfx0HNdX2qdb-q2o3gezTuTPsgSLoHeAcVKbmqk-sX6gwZAGMx9GIIYGTuq6cdL5xvMvrk1uq5D0zU5_o9XcX2AIk11JBn00XtYitn-uKzQprzgJrL4DVoGYpOW6FkHtB9ClHfd5CouA%3D%3D)

_**... And she was going to fix our economy?**_ It’s clear we need leaders who will prioritize fiscal responsibility, not celebrity endorsements. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. * Reducing the national debt

| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=d0a7494765df48d99034e434da509f66&_e=-eCYrVvjkQ2MOYKNfalK32PWL7Q5DQN7pR8bGLt7NwR2Qp_UExN4tlvAOdaOdU5qbzSWN0LIBk8bETewmcGxX9Jzf1h_xZTIlDK3H3SSg8qXpqC0y0vqX5UaTM03XFxmNDowiOdGS2xNxebm6GqqVbJbLpqUfGOO9bcKh3kdZbvnaMeVxTkSGHRHsiME-gMxbIazIsxKT7zaKS8ZqZLAJJ7WWxVL-95upGKajuQA9RdnygxZSG1vpC9c2WEHYqKTRQw--ykrMEyppu-oj6vuRmKM4rlGtVhR5BAm7bIxwJ38q_Z9BH91Q2ptkxFDr_OyQMS7wWpjNba7ut_CjZUpvpsyzz70alJe9aVBdcg1KvJnr-jtA2N4HbAh8ghpgs8a)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=d0a7494765df48d99034e434da509f66&_e=-eCYrVvjkQ2MOYKNfalK32PWL7Q5DQN7pR8bGLt7NwR2Qp_UExN4tlvAOdaOdU5qbzSWN0LIBk8bETewmcGxX9Jzf1h_xZTIlDK3H3SSg8qXpqC0y0vqX5UaTM03XFxmNDowiOdGS2xNxebm6GqqVbJbLpqUfGOO9bcKh3kdZbvnaMeVxTkSGHRHsiME-gMxbIazIsxKT7zaKS8ZqZLAJPrYyXBbu5oSbgHoUUoo1AZ-yAxef1js1hTMgJXsOllTa3NpPcy-6ULfAJh-stJ_usLxgub2T-Kpj3upvITEf8U1AnEIWOK56nUFzSvNMc-N48ehr-nk9zKvM1ptIvMWxzTyfN5K9odi4iXp9y8pi0ZDNuaE0LiSQ7EHgI7dboBo)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |

Peter — One of North Carolina’s closest and most consequential elections this year is headed to a recount: Democrat Allison Riggs is up in the final count but needs our help to hold onto her seat on the state Supreme Court. Allison faced a tough election to keep her seat earlier this month, and while she has come out ahead in the vote count, the margin is _less than one percent._ This is why your vote always matters, Peter. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97465913/513510055/289245820?refcode=ea.292230c3-5fa8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.292230c3-5fa8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTIyMzBjMy01ZmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkBMN12H-fPsR7Is0bxUpbssHt3yaLgqyivp0qW-oAU=) Allison’s Republican opponent has called for a recount, so we need to protect her victory. **[You can help make sure Allison holds onto this critical victory by contributing to her Recount Fund here >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97465915/513510057/289245820?refcode=ea.292230c3-5fa8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.292230c3-5fa8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTIyMzBjMy01ZmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkBMN12H-fPsR7Is0bxUpbssHt3yaLgqyivp0qW-oAU=)** I was proud to appoint Allison to our state Supreme Court. After a successful career fighting for fairness and defending people’s constitutional rights as a litigator and Court of Appeals Judge, Allison has continued to stand up for North Carolinians in her first year as a Supreme Court Justice. This state Supreme Court election could have critical consequences for the future of reproductive rights and voting rights in North Carolina. Allison’s victory may also give Democrats a path to flipping back the court in 2028. **[This election isn’t over yet, Peter. Allison still needs us — and I’m counting on you to join me and support her recount efforts with a donation. Click here to give >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97465917/513510059/289245820?refcode=ea.292230c3-5fa8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.292230c3-5fa8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTIyMzBjMy01ZmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkBMN12H-fPsR7Is0bxUpbssHt3yaLgqyivp0qW-oAU=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97465919/513510061/289245820?refcode=ea.292230c3-5fa8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&ms=ea.292230c3-5fa8-ef11-88d0-6045bdd62db6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTIyMzBjMy01ZmE4LWVmMTEtODhkMC02MDQ1YmRkNjJkYjYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FkBMN12H-fPsR7Is0bxUpbssHt3yaLgqyivp0qW-oAU=)

---
# FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW
---
| | Reader,**I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns.

I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism.

**But there's also far more to what the Sun is building.

As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be.

I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust.

The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored.

The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way.

**The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun.** A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.**My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly.**

I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths.

They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts.
---
| | [Join the Sun Now →](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fd72f0e0467c4ad3abe05d0248173056&_e=2LOBk0JJdvc6Rg9gHWKyEG2qTLvGHYDtGXefffJVQFVk9eS2KjQnJRJM7ZohB_b1fnXQh5cX9TKV3WgDeuMHB83c1VUBxd7PC8LpgYA4zmGGSkw9C6xcWEnUd1KKs8U5k64LsmrDQJw9GiMY8rmqMStILSqWeP9Po2sR1yY2MV-AX_p6OZ6XCskReg6I4pI4-CAUJMU4eN3jT60B4eQJb7PLRZR5i8Hr_lrX22hmv-YoU526Bk8gj7cpTfz1KaRQPYz8rTKr4-X7n-i7PWTjcnmdOrgWPyFq9yUAH04fpLeg2PpNjGE_frNzhVl9IAI9hVhmyOg65xxdTki7lDGPqnjtwFHTCz-e576XJLNkYN8y4BcmBQwfhMkdyRUEst9I)
---

clean_body: I've never seen journalism so abused. It's a voice America needs | | | | FROM THE DESK OF LARRY KUDLOW | | Reader,I am pleased to share with you that The New York Sun, one of my daily must-read papers, is now the exclusive publisher of my regular columns. I invite you to consider joining the Sun to receive unlimited access to my latest commentary, alongside some of the finest American journalism. But there's also far more to what the Sun is building. As you know, journalism isn't what it used to be. I've been in the business for decades, and never before have I seen this once noble profession so abused. The major papers are no longer on the side of the American people, and we are right to withhold our trust. The impact on our democracy is considerable. Without real accountability, the worst actors in government and at corporate institutions have free reign, and patriotic, hard-working Americans are being sidelined and ignored. The antidote is to join the movement to build a better alternative. That's the American way. The charge to restore American journalism is being led by the Sun. A proudly all-American, principled publication that has plenty of room for conservative thought and conservative writers, the Sun has upheld the highest journalistic standards since 1833. That's 18 years before the New York Times published its first number.My decision for the New York Sun to become the exclusive publisher of my regular columns was not taken lightly. I value their work and have been impressed by their team, but I know they have a hell of a battle ahead. They are the David facing many Goliaths. They will only succeed if we join with them in this grassroots national effort. Joining the Sun costs as little as a penny a day. I encourage you to sign up today. Every single person counts. | | | | Please join me in the fight to restore America's journalism. This is one mission that our country desperately needs. | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Larry Kudlow Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: There’s still time: Fight for clean air. Protect public lands. Confirm more judges.
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTE3OTQ1NDIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjEwMDMzNDUzOAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — last week, we asked for your help to protect the environment
and our democracy before Trump takes office in January. The response has been overwhelming — so many environmentalists have stepped up
to help us fight for cleaner air safeguards, protections for public lands, and
for federal judges who will protect our communities and our rights. Support from LCV members is crucial as we scale up our grassroots campaign to
demand action before January. We need to keep the momentum going, Peter, but we haven’t heard from
you yet. Please, make an annual gift to power LCV’s work today. Support from our members is what will allow our teams to protect our environment from Donald Trump’s pro-polluter agenda. https://links.messages.lcv. Onward, LCV Membership Team RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/YYbZBxE~ Peter — with many of us still reeling from the results of the election,
I truly hope you are finding some ways to take care of yourself this week. We’re reaching out because there is a short, but important, window where there
is still an opportunity to advance important protections for the environment and
our democracy: The EPA needs to keep protecting clean air safeguards. If it acts quickly, Trump won’t be able to immediately block the rules.President Biden can protect public lands, including designating new national monuments.The U.S. Senate needs to confirm as many pro-environment, pro-democracy judges as possible, before Trump takes office. This work is INCREDIBLY important and time-sensitive— and we’re mobilizing our supporters and elected allies to make sure it happens
NOW. We’re counting on people like you — people who care about our environment
and our climate — to have our back. Please, secure your annual LCV membership today. Every new annual member who joins will help ensure that our teams have what they need to advocate, organize, and press elected leaders to protect our environment from Donald Trump’s pro-polluter agenda. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/x_ RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/qjPNcm_2z~M_ We know what a second Trump administration will bring: free rein for polluters,
worsening climate change, and massive giveaways of public lands to corporate polluters. What we do right now— before Inauguration Day in January — will influence how much we can limit
Trump’s damage on day one. People like you and me have the power to slow, weaken, or even disrupt Trump’s
extreme Project 2025 agenda, but only if we act TOGETHER. It’s going to be hard
work — it will take a collective and sustained effort to stop Trump from
eliminating the National Weather Service, gutting environmental agencies,
removing protections for our air and water, and handing over our parks and
monuments to drilling and mining. LCV and our state affiliates have stood up to Trump before — and won — but only by building a powerful movement ready to fiercely defend bedrock
environmental protections, Peter. I know it’s been a grueling election season, but the environment needs our help today — so we’re asking: Secure your annual LCV membership right now. By locking in your support today, you’ll play a key role in protecting our environment, climate, and democracy from Trump’s dirty and corrupt agenda. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_ This isn’t the email I want to be sending, Peter. But I’m grateful to
have you by our side at this critical moment for our future. I hope you’ll join
us in the important fights ahead. Onward, Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=11794542&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDMzNDUzOAS2&spReportId=MjEwMDMzNDUzOAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=11794542&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjEwMDMzNDUzOAS2&spReportId=MjEwMDMzNDUzOAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

But I’m grateful to have you by our side at this critical moment for our future. I hope you’ll join us in the important fights ahead. name: Bob Casey
subject: Thank you, Pennsylvania.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024
body:
This has been the honor of a lifetime.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=4886%2E552475%2EsbenE7)
Hi Peter,
I just called Dave McCormick to congratulate him on his election to represent Pennsylvania in the United States Senate.
As the first count of ballots is completed, Pennsylvanians can move forward with the knowledge that their voices were heard, whether their vote was the first to be counted or the last.
This race was one of the closest in our Commonwealth’s history, decided by less than a quarter of a point.
I am grateful to the thousands of people who worked to make sure every eligible vote cast could be counted, including election officials in all 67 counties.
When a Pennsylvanian takes the time to cast a legal vote, often waiting in long lines and taking time away from their work and family, they deserve to know that their vote will count. That’s democracy.
I’m proud of the work we’ve done since Election Day to enfranchise voters across the state -- no matter whom they voted for -- and to ensure that the democratic process could unfold.
In just a few days, we built an organization of 350 staff across the state, joined by more than a thousand volunteers, who helped more than 6,000 Pennsylvania voters make a plan to fix small issues with their ballot so their votes would be counted.
From the 100-year-old woman in Butler County, who voted in every election since she was eligible, to the 19-year-old in Montgomery County who cast her ballot for the very first time, we made sure those voices were heard.
And we stood up against efforts to silence and disenfranchise voters in every corner of the Commonwealth. Thanks to our work in the courts, nearly a thousand eligible voters in Philadelphia will have their votes counted, despite efforts to throw them out.
This work mattered. And I am grateful to the many people who helped with this effort.
As you know, no public official serves alone, and I have been blessed by the love and support of my wife, Terese, and our daughters, Elyse, Caroline, Julia, and Marena, all these years.
I especially want to thank my campaign manager, Tiernan Donohue, our campaign staff, and our supporters for all the work they did to help my 2024 campaign, and all those who have worked on and supported my previous campaigns over the years.
I also want to thank my current Senate staff, led by my Chief of Staff, Kristen Gentile, for their exemplary public service to the people of our Commonwealth, and all the previous staff who served with me dating back to 2007.
But most of all, I want to thank the people of Pennsylvania for granting me the privilege of serving them for 28 consecutive years in public office, as Auditor General, State Treasurer, and United States Senator. Every day I have served in public office, I’ve fought for Pennsylvania workers, children, seniors, people with disabilities, and our veterans.
During that time, I’ve been guided by an inscription on the Finance Building in Harrisburg: “All public service is a trust, given in faith and accepted in honor.”
Thank you for the trust you have placed in me for all these years. It has been the honor of my lifetime.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=4886%2E552475%2EsbenE7)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=4886%2E552475%2EsbenE7)

Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY Pennsylvania Senate Victory Fund 2024

* **TOP NEWS**

"**'A game changer': UT System announces free tuition for qualifying Texas families,** " Dallas Morning News' **Aar on Torres **and **Marcela Rodrigues** -- "Students whose families make less than $100,000 annually will get free tuition and waived fees at any of the academic universities in the University of Texas System, the board of regents announced Wednesday.

The initiative is an expansion of the Promise Plus Program, a needs-based financial aid program approved by the board in 2022. The UT System expects that more than 7 million Texas families will meet the income requirements for the new program, officials said.

Starting in fall 2025, eligible students accepted into UT academic universities, such as UT Dallas and UT Arlington, will have 100% of their tuition and fees paid for.

To qualify, students must be Texas residents and full-time undergraduate students.

UT System Chancellor **James B. Milliken** said this program is a "game changer" that will make "enormous, real difference" to improve college access for all Texans.

Chairman **Kevin P. Eltife** said the move is important for families across the state who hadn't previously thought about college as a possibility.

"This is so meaningful," he said. "There are so many people out there that don't think they have the opportunity to go on to higher education. They think it's out of their reach."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/e420833c-08ef-47f4-a1f3-488bfca358ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/e420833c-08ef-47f4-a1f3-488bfca358ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The system has about 256,000 students across 14 universities and health centers.

The average net price for full-time, in-state students to attend UT Arlington in 2022-23 was $14,956 with the the average amount of grant and scholarship aid awarded at $11,015, according to federal data. At UT Dallas, that average net price was $13,464, and the average amount of aid awarded was $14,643.

Eltife said being in a position where students can attend a UT institution without going into debt "is very important to all of us."

"As long as we are here, we will continue our work to provide an affordable, accessible education to all who choose to attend a UT institution," Eltife added." ($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) TOP NEWS "'A game changer': UT System announces free tuition for qualifying Texas families, " Dallas Morning News' Aar on Torres and Marcela Rodrigues -- "Students whose families make less than $100,000 annually will get free tuition and waived fees at any of the academic universities in the University of Texas System, the board of regents announced Wednesday. The initiative is an expansion of the Promise Plus Program, a needs-based financial aid program approved by the board in 2022. The UT System expects that more than 7 million Texas families will meet the income requirements for the new program, officials said. Starting in fall 2025, eligible students accepted into UT academic universities, such as UT Dallas and UT Arlington, will have 100% of their tuition and fees paid for. To qualify, students must be Texas residents and full-time undergraduate students. UT System Chancellor James B. Milliken said this program is a "game changer" that will make "enormous, real difference" to improve college access for all Texans. Chairman Kevin P. Eltife said the move is important for families across the state who hadn't previously thought about college as a possibility. "This is so meaningful," he said. "There are so many people out there that don't think they have the opportunity to go on to higher education. They think it's out of their reach." The system has about 256,000 students across 14 universities and health centers. The average net price for full-time, in-state students to attend UT Arlington in 2022-23 was $14,956 with the the average amount of grant and scholarship aid awarded at $11,015, according to federal data. At UT Dallas, that average net price was $13,464, and the average amount of aid awarded was $14,643. Eltife said being in a position where students can attend a UT institution without going into debt "is very important to all of us." "As long as we are here, we will continue our work to provide an affordable, accessible education to all who choose to attend a UT institution," Eltife added." ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. "**'A game changer': UT System announces free tuition for qualifying Texas families,** " Dallas Morning News' **Aar on Torres **and **Marcela Rodrigues** -- "Students whose families make less than $100,000 annually will get free tuition and waived fees at any of the academic universities in the University of Texas System, the board of regents announced Wednesday.

The initiative is an expansion of the Promise Plus Program, a needs-based financial aid program approved by the board in 2022. The UT System expects that more than 7 million Texas families will meet the income requirements for the new program, officials said.

Starting in fall 2025, eligible students accepted into UT academic universities, such as UT Dallas and UT Arlington, will have 100% of their tuition and fees paid for.

To qualify, students must be Texas residents and full-time undergraduate students.

UT System Chancellor **James B. Milliken** said this program is a "game changer" that will make "enormous, real difference" to improve college access for all Texans.

Chairman **Kevin P. Eltife** said the move is important for families across the state who hadn't previously thought about college as a possibility.

"This is so meaningful," he said. "There are so many people out there that don't think they have the opportunity to go on to higher education. They think it's out of their reach."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/9ae8ad51-5f71-4824-ad28-ab8236779482?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/9ae8ad51-5f71-4824-ad28-ab8236779482?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The system has about 256,000 students across 14 universities and health centers.

The average net price for full-time, in-state students to attend UT Arlington in 2022-23 was $14,956 with the the average amount of grant and scholarship aid awarded at $11,015, according to federal data. At UT Dallas, that average net price was $13,464, and the average amount of aid awarded was $14,643.

Eltife said being in a position where students can attend a UT institution without going into debt "is very important to all of us."

"As long as we are here, we will continue our work to provide an affordable, accessible education to all who choose to attend a UT institution," Eltife added." name: Team Truth to Power
subject: Cutting through Trump’s chaos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
Katie is going to break out her trusted whiteboard in a grassroots discussion this Sunday.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39315%2E3422442%2EqA5cyy)
Derek,
Katie has never been a typical politician. She understands that many Americans, who are often busy with job and family responsibilities, don’t have the time in their day to sort through an overwhelming influx of news. That’s why she first started using the whiteboard in Congress—to make it easy for people to get engaged.
Trump’s political appointments and policy proposals have the potential to cause serious harm to Americans. At the same time, he creates a lot of noise and chaos, making it hard for people to keep up.
Katie is going to break out her trusted whiteboard in a grassroots discussion this Sunday to break things down in an accessible way.
**We Need More Whiteboards**
Sunday, November 24, 5pm PT
_Zoom link provided upon donation of any amount_
**[A donation of any amount, whether it’s $5 or $50, will get you access to the virtual Zoom this Sunday to hear directly from Katie. Secure your spot to join this discussion today!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241121-zoom?refcode=em20241121-39315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39315_3422442_qA5cyy&akid=39315%2E3422442%2EqA5cyy)**

Katie hopes to see you there!
Team TTP

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: 19 Senators rebuked AIPAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Yesterday, the U.S. Senate voted for the first time ever on Joint
Resolutions of Disapproval to block new shipments of U.S.-made weapons and
military equipment to Israel.

Sen. Bernie Sanders introduced these resolutions to hold the Israeli
government accountable for its war crimes against Palestinian and Lebanese
civilians over the past year. Only 18 other senators joined him.

That doesn’t sound like a lot, and though it isn’t enough to block illegal
weapons sales and stop this genocide, it is a massive rebuke against
AIPAC. The right-wing megadonor-funded lobby group is rapidly losing
legitimacy among the electorate and electeds, even in the most
undemocratic of institutions.

Though it has taken over a year since the start of Israel’s ethnic
cleansing campaign, the 19 senators who voted against sending more weapons
to Israel should be commended, especially knowing that the Biden
administration and Democratic leadership like Sen. Chuck Schumer put
immense pressure on the Senate to vote against these resolutions, even
using AIPAC talking points suggesting that a vote in favor would be aiding
Hamas.

AIPAC was also out in full force yesterday trying to block these
resolutions, and even attacked our calls to urge voters to participate in
their democracy:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241121?refcode=em20241121-36170&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36170_1203867_EPx1tE&akid=36170%2E1203867%2EEPx1tE ]AD_4nXcGH8mVTbHwaVsqxLUEx4GozvqDcwcV-RuF5eYxVzX3HEBlCP8OW0jV9Klq6_xQkELdeS0TvZ64_dyTktFjRi67SKgZAGOQUfF7XfQN8siozCBpQ4F0ZaJw.png

To work so hard to arm the culprits of genocide after you've already lost
an election is one of the more depraved acts of this administration and
the Democratic Party establishment. It just goes to show how unserious
Democrats are about rooting out the corporate lobbyist influences in our
Party and listening to the majority of its base.

We’re working to recruit more progressive, working class leaders to run
for office and join these 19 senators in Congress in the fight for justice
and human rights for ALL. Unlike corporate Democrats, we rely on
grassroots donations from emails like this to do it.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241121?refcode=em20241121-36170&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36170_1203867_EPx1tE&akid=36170%2E1203867%2EEPx1tE ]If you can, please pitch in $5 or more today to fuel
Justice Democrats’ 2026 Candidate Recruitment Fund and ensure we have the
resources to send more human rights champions to Congress →

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241121?refcode=em20241121-36170&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36170_1203867_EPx1tE&akid=36170%2E1203867%2EEPx1tE ]Contribute $5

AIPAC is powerful, but its grip on Washington is slipping the more that we
speak out and support leaders who are brave enough to fight back and stand
on the right side of history.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241121-36170-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36170_1203867_EPx1tE&akid=36170%2E1203867%2EEPx1tE

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36170%2E1203867%2EEPx1tE

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
I’m thrilled to introduce an extraordinary opportunity for you...

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=90bf7e0a53f740efbe64268c29d9caf6&_t=Ce8mGvIZtKjYic-JWgIJ-n80B3xN1eg2su8kf3WayvLVHbZRc7_TzJgE5RNFZzqqOPZrw4aoj_dtvFdfvUZOWWus4LrOuBdGnZrKfDPt-nq5wdNoxyKJ1ujSDpifVpsf)_

| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=90bf7e0a53f740efbe64268c29d9caf6&_e=yjN7iN5p2OuS4oG7i00_ZreV2TKIC9zQRJNdqXis1_w7IbdDXu8GcSU1XiyOWpADNSA8s_TH7pB16XYm26iL0JDQ32yZkyBCCSfcp_7ebr_2MXJLcC2K_AqqH20fru3C-XjQs_eLH1NBNAunHGWKt7imiZ1j69dlaTFStZvoV0hbhlPs5FkiPoyJn1rJRF3U1rmLMK1TpPY5WnYfMLTNDmUc1y3l9ILcdQXJJnWQuvjG__8X-PRN9k-SFrQI9Ag4dMZUq9sgSKOwVuL24g6YoklU3juGzXDAG0mvs4KLOwA225X-ztew2P5iBHkRGoyrU98rPJySCSn--PbuAtuIXgakEWt5_SvKm37YdQq8t81Sillj9Stfq9Phl3hLoZOtfrSF29xDKucTV1nZelLRq7DiQ1EsE1urj5Idxxcp2Mo%3D)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

I'm thrilled to introduce an extraordinary opportunity for you...

Perhaps you've wondered where the artwork accompanying the lectures in our free online courses comes from. We hear this especially for one of our most popular courses, "The Genesis Story."

The Book of Genesis has inspired some of Western Civilization's greatest artists to produce iconic works. You may be familiar with Michelangelo's "The Creation of Adam" and Rembrandt's "The Sacrifice of Issac."

I can still remember seeing "The Creation of Adam" right after I graduated from Hillsdale at the Sistine Chapel...

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=90bf7e0a53f740efbe64268c29d9caf6&_e=yjN7iN5p2OuS4oG7i00_ZreV2TKIC9zQRJNdqXis1_w7IbdDXu8GcSU1XiyOWpADNSA8s_TH7pB16XYm26iL0JDQ32yZkyBCCSfcp_7ebr_2MXJLcC2K_AqqH20fru3C-XjQs_eLH1NBNAunHGWKt7imiZ1j69dlaTFStZvoV0hbhlPs5FkiPoyJn1rJRF3U1rmLMK1TpPY5WnYfMLTNDmUc1y3l9ILcdQXJJnWQuvjG__8X-PRN9k-SFrQI9Ag4SAYUhtbN5w21Lq3HeogKRj0l17H3P2_f42FB4jZZg9x7St7YuGQeP9XR0X7aazkjKfS8fofD71ePqSpLOwBu-4AkFfDkrXPqHHs4HuohHdF4YlniW9S9fRZKsGayfpvB3DG86f-loaedaoBxe2ItT_7qOw_jh3z3iMHUdXmijF4%3D) **We 've compiled these paintings, along with many others featured in this course, into a brand-new coffee table book, "The Genesis Story: Course Companion." And I'd like you to receive a copy.**

With this exclusive book--available only from Hillsdale College--you can read the passages from the Book of Genesis that led Michelangelo, Rembrandt, Gustave Dore, and other masters to create these incredible works of art.

And with these works all in one place, you and your family can enjoy page after page of divinely inspired art.

**You can reserve your copy of "The Genesis Story: Course Companion," an exclusive hard-cover book from Hillsdale College, for a generous donation of $100 or more by clicking the secure link below: **

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/genesis-story-course-companion-book](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=90bf7e0a53f740efbe64268c29d9caf6&_e=yjN7iN5p2OuS4oG7i00_ZreV2TKIC9zQRJNdqXis1_w7IbdDXu8GcSU1XiyOWpADNSA8s_TH7pB16XYm26iL0JDQ32yZkyBCCSfcp_7ebr_2MXJLcC2K_AqqH20fru3C-XjQs_eLH1NBNAunHGWKt7imiZ1j69dlaTFStZvoV0hbhlPs5FkiPoyJn1rJRF3U1rmLMK1TpPY5WnYfMLTNDmUc1y3l9ILcdQXJJnWQuvjG__8X-PRN9k-SFrQI9Ag4vXe0H9KVaXe6XY0y4PUFIHPKJZg7qgbR5BX9tY3-1PPkghCnZe1AkAWnwkf9hmq5WK9RDn-FU3jKjI3Y6P1owkEctZGIwDP0mOaYNzCkOoaQ3dbmc9Xkbd4FZYUCVax8xzN2CWtUqQpQn4hq3QH2tchq7dgJRZlbDh3mE42BDIk%3D)**

Thanks again for your continued support and generosity. I hope you'll enjoy this beautiful book.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---

As a California Assemblymember, Adam fought against the state water grab, increased funding for public safety, and paved the way for rural health care expansion. Adam is in a dead heat against John Duarte for CA-13. This race was decided by 500 votes in 2022, and it will come down to a similar margin this year. | Volunteer with Team Pelosi to ensure every last vote is counted! | Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District.
